authors_text: Louis-Philippe Asselin,Denis Laurendeau,Jean-François Lalonde
title: Deep SVBRDF Estimation on Real Materials
title_zh: 真实材料的深度 SVBRDF 估计
comment: Accepted submission to 3DV 2020. Project page https://lvsn.github.io/real-svbrdf
comments: Accepted submission to 3DV 2020. Project page https://lvsn.github.io/real-svbrdf
abstract: Recent work has demonstrated that deep learning approaches can successfully be used to recover accurate estimates of the spatially-varying BRDF (SVBRDF) of a surface from as little as a single image. Closer inspection reveals, however, that most approaches in the literature are trained purely on synthetic data, which, while diverse and realistic, is often not representative of the richness of the real world. In this paper, we show that training such networks exclusively on synthetic data is insufficient to achieve adequate results when tested on real data. Our analysis leverages a new dataset of real materials obtained with a novel portable multi-light capture apparatus. Through an extensive series of experiments and with the use of a novel deep learning architecture, we explore two strategies for improving results on real data: finetuning, and a per-material optimization procedure. We show that adapting network weights to real data is of critical importance, resulting in an approach which significantly outperforms previous methods for SVBRDF estimation on real materials. Dataset and code are available at https://lvsn.github.io/real-svbrdf
summary: Recent work has demonstrated that deep learning approaches can successfully be used to recover accurate estimates of the spatially-varying BRDF (SVBRDF) of a surface from as little as a single image. Closer inspection reveals, however, that most approaches in the literature are trained purely on synthetic data, which, while diverse and realistic, is often not representative of the richness of the real world. In this paper, we show that training such networks exclusively on synthetic data is insufficient to achieve adequate results when tested on real data. Our analysis leverages a new dataset of real materials obtained with a novel portable multi-light capture apparatus. Through an extensive series of experiments and with the use of a novel deep learning architecture, we explore two strategies for improving results on real data: finetuning, and a per-material optimization procedure. We show that adapting network weights to real data is of critical importance, resulting in an approach which significantly outperforms previous methods for SVBRDF estimation on real materials. Dataset and code are available at https://lvsn.github.io/real-svbrdf
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，深度学习方法可以成功地用于从单个图像中恢复表面空间变化 BRDF (SVBRDF) 的准确估计。然而，更仔细的检查表明，文献中的大多数方法纯粹是根据合成数据进行训练的，这些数据虽然多样且现实，但通常不能代表现实世界的丰富性。在本文中，我们表明仅在合成数据上训练此类网络不足以在真实数据上进行测试时获得足够的结果。我们的分析利用了通过新型便携式多光捕获设备获得的真实材料的新数据集。通过一系列广泛的实验并使用新颖的深度学习架构，我们探索了两种改善真实数据结果的策略：微调和按材料优化程序。我们表明，使网络权重适应真实数据至关重要，这种方法明显优于之前对真实材料进行 SVBRDF 估计的方法。数据集和代码可在 https://lvsn.github.io/real-svbrdf 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于从真实材料的单张图像中估计空间变化的双向反射分布函数（SVBRDF）。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究证明深度学习方法可以从单张图像中恢复表面的SVBRDF，但这些方法大多仅在合成数据上训练，难以准确反映真实世界的复杂性。
AI.method: 本文引入了一个新的真实材料数据集，并设计了一种新的深度学习架构。通过微调网络权重和逐材料优化过程，提升了模型在真实数据上的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过微调和逐材料优化，该方法在真实材料的SVBRDF估计任务上显著优于之前的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文强调了在真实数据上调整网络权重的重要性，并展示了该方法在真实材料SVBRDF估计上的优越性。

Closer inspection reveals, however, that most approaches in the literature are trained purely on synthetic data, which, while diverse and realistic, is often not representative of the richness of the real world. In this paper, we show that training such networks exclusively on synthetic data is insufficient to achieve adequate results when tested on real data. Our analysis leverages a new dataset of real materials obtained with a novel portable multi-light capture apparatus. Through an extensive series of experiments and with the use of a novel deep learning architecture, we explore two strategies for improving results on real data: finetuning, and a per-material optimization procedure. We show that adapting network weights to real data is of critical importance, resulting in an approach which significantly outperforms previous methods for SVBRDF estimation on real materials. authors_text: Kun Zhou,Yuanhang Zhou,Wayne Xin Zhao,Xiaoke Wang,Ji-Rong Wen
title: Towards Topic-Guided Conversational Recommender System
title_zh: 迈向主题引导的会话推荐系统
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to recommend high-quality items to users through interactive conversations. To develop an effective CRS, the support of high-quality datasets is essential. Existing CRS datasets mainly focus on immediate requests from users, while lack proactive guidance to the recommendation scenario. In this paper, we contribute a new CRS dataset named \textbf{TG-ReDial} (\textbf{Re}commendation through \textbf{T}opic-\textbf{G}uided \textbf{Dial}og). Our dataset has two major features. First, it incorporates topic threads to enforce natural semantic transitions towards the recommendation scenario. Second, it is created in a semi-automatic way, hence human annotation is more reasonable and controllable. Based on TG-ReDial, we present the task of topic-guided conversational recommendation, and propose an effective approach to this task. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach on three sub-tasks, namely topic prediction, item recommendation and response generation. TG-ReDial is available at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/TG-ReDial.
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to recommend high-quality items to users through interactive conversations. To develop an effective CRS, the support of high-quality datasets is essential. Existing CRS datasets mainly focus on immediate requests from users, while lack proactive guidance to the recommendation scenario. In this paper, we contribute a new CRS dataset named \textbf{TG-ReDial} (\textbf{Re}commendation through \textbf{T}opic-\textbf{G}uided \textbf{Dial}og). Our dataset has two major features. First, it incorporates topic threads to enforce natural semantic transitions towards the recommendation scenario. Second, it is created in a semi-automatic way, hence human annotation is more reasonable and controllable. Based on TG-ReDial, we present the task of topic-guided conversational recommendation, and propose an effective approach to this task. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach on three sub-tasks, namely topic prediction, item recommendation and response generation. TG-ReDial is available at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/TG-ReDial.
abstract_zh: 会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在通过交互式对话向用户推荐高质量的商品。要开发有效的CRS，高质量数据集的支持至关重要。现有的CRS数据集主要关注用户的即时请求，缺乏对推荐场景的主动指导。在本文中，我们贡献了一个名为 \textbf{TG-ReDial} 的新 CRS 数据集（通过 \textbf{T}opic-\textbf{G}uided \textbf{Dial}og 进行推荐）。我们的数据集有两个主要特征。首先，它结合了主题线程来强制向推荐场景进行自然语义转换。其次，它是半自动创建的，因此人工注释更加合理和可控。基于TG-ReDial，我们提出了主题引导的会话推荐任务，并提出了解决该任务的有效方法。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在三个子任务上的有效性，即主题预测、项目推荐和响应生成。 TG-ReDial 可在 https://github.com/RUCAIBox/TG-ReDial 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主题引导的对话推荐系统，并构建了一个名为TG-ReDial的新数据集以支持该任务。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统数据集缺乏对推荐场景的主动引导，难以实现自然语义过渡，且人工标注质量难以控制。
AI.method: 通过半自动方式构建包含主题线索的数据集TG-ReDial，设计主题引导的对话推荐任务，并提出结合主题信息的推荐方法。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在主题预测、物品推荐和响应生成三个子任务上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TG-ReDial数据集和主题引导框架为对话推荐系统研究提供了新方向和基准。

authors_text: Mehak Maniktala,Christa Cody,Amy Isvik,Nicholas Lytle,Min Chi,Tiffany Barnes
title: Extending the Hint Factory for the assistance dilemma: A novel, data-driven HelpNeed Predictor for proactive problem-solving help
title_zh: 扩展提示工厂以解决援助困境：一种新颖的、数据驱动的 HelpNeed Predictor，用于主动解决问题的帮助
abstract: Determining when and whether to provide personalized support is a well-known challenge called the assistance dilemma. A core problem in solving the assistance dilemma is the need to discover when students are unproductive so that the tutor can intervene. Such a task is particularly challenging for open-ended domains, even those that are well-structured with defined principles and goals. In this paper, we present a set of data-driven methods to classify, predict, and prevent unproductive problem-solving steps in the well-structured open-ended domain of logic. This approach leverages and extends the Hint Factory, a set of methods that leverages prior student solution attempts to build data-driven intelligent tutors. We present a HelpNeed classification, that uses prior student data to determine when students are likely to be unproductive and need help learning optimal problem-solving strategies. We present a controlled study to determine the impact of an Adaptive pedagogical policy that provides proactive hints at the start of each step based on the outcomes of our HelpNeed predictor: productive vs. unproductive. Our results show that the students in the Adaptive condition exhibited better training behaviors, with lower help avoidance, and higher help appropriateness (a higher chance of receiving help when it was likely to be needed), as measured using the HelpNeed classifier, when compared to the Control. Furthermore, the results show that the students who received Adaptive hints based on HelpNeed predictions during training significantly outperform their Control peers on the posttest, with the former producing shorter, more optimal solutions in less time. We conclude with suggestions on how these HelpNeed methods could be applied in other well-structured open-ended domains.
summary: Determining when and whether to provide personalized support is a well-known challenge called the assistance dilemma. A core problem in solving the assistance dilemma is the need to discover when students are unproductive so that the tutor can intervene. Such a task is particularly challenging for open-ended domains, even those that are well-structured with defined principles and goals. In this paper, we present a set of data-driven methods to classify, predict, and prevent unproductive problem-solving steps in the well-structured open-ended domain of logic. This approach leverages and extends the Hint Factory, a set of methods that leverages prior student solution attempts to build data-driven intelligent tutors. We present a HelpNeed classification, that uses prior student data to determine when students are likely to be unproductive and need help learning optimal problem-solving strategies. We present a controlled study to determine the impact of an Adaptive pedagogical policy that provides proactive hints at the start of each step based on the outcomes of our HelpNeed predictor: productive vs. unproductive. Our results show that the students in the Adaptive condition exhibited better training behaviors, with lower help avoidance, and higher help appropriateness (a higher chance of receiving help when it was likely to be needed), as measured using the HelpNeed classifier, when compared to the Control. Furthermore, the results show that the students who received Adaptive hints based on HelpNeed predictions during training significantly outperform their Control peers on the posttest, with the former producing shorter, more optimal solutions in less time. We conclude with suggestions on how these HelpNeed methods could be applied in other well-structured open-ended domains.
abstract_zh: 确定何时以及是否提供个性化支持是一个众所周知的挑战，称为援助困境。解决援助困境的一个核心问题是需要发现学生何时表现不佳，以便导师进行干预。对于开放式领域来说，这样的任务尤其具有挑战性，即使是那些结构良好且具有明确原则和目标的领域。在本文中，我们提出了一组数据驱动的方法，用于在结构良好的开放式逻辑域中进行分类、预测和防止无效的问题解决步骤。这种方法利用并扩展了提示工厂，这是一组利用先前的学生解决方案尝试来构建数据驱动的智能导师的方法。我们提出了一个 HelpNeed 分类，它使用先前的学生数据来确定学生何时可能效率低下并需要帮助学习最佳的问题解决策略。我们提出了一项对照研究，以确定适应性教学政策的影响，该政策根据我们的 HelpNeed 预测器的结果在每个步骤开始时提供主动提示：有效与无效。我们的结果表明，与对照组相比，使用 HelpNeed 分类器进行测量，处于适应性条件下的学生表现出更好的训练行为，具有较低的帮助回避性和较高的帮助适当性（在可能需要时获得帮助的机会较高）。此外，结果表明，在训练期间收到基于 HelpNeed 预测的自适应提示的学生在后测中的表现明显优于对照同学，前者在更短的时间内产生了更短、更优化的解决方案。最后，我们提出了如何将这些 HelpNeed 方法应用于其他结构良好的开放式领域的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的HelpNeed预测器，用于在开放领域中主动识别学生需要帮助的时刻，以解决教学中的辅助困境问题。
AI.motivation: 在开放领域教学中，如何准确判断学生是否处于无生产力状态并及时提供个性化帮助（即辅助困境）是核心挑战，传统方法难以有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 扩展Hint Factory框架，利用学生历史数据构建HelpNeed分类模型，通过自适应教学策略在每一步骤开始时根据预测结果（生产力高低）主动提供提示。
AI.result: 实验表明，接受自适应提示的学生表现出更低的帮助回避率、更高的帮助适当性，且在后测中生成更优解的效率显著高于对照组。
AI.conclusion: HelpNeed方法可推广至其他结构化开放领域，为智能导师系统提供有效的主动干预策略。

search_text: Extending the Hint Factory for the assistance dilemma: A novel, data-driven HelpNeed Predictor for proactive problem-solving help 扩展提示工厂以解决援助困境：一种新颖的、数据驱动的 HelpNeed Predictor，用于主动解决问题的帮助 Determining when and whether to provide personalized support is a well-known challenge called the assistance dilemma. A core problem in solving the assistance dilemma is the need to discover when students are unproductive so that the tutor can intervene. Such a task is particularly challenging for open-ended domains, even those that are well-structured with defined principles and goals. In this paper, we present a set of data-driven methods to classify, predict, and prevent unproductive problem-solving steps in the well-structured open-ended domain of logic. This approach leverages and extends the Hint Factory, a set of methods that leverages prior student solution attempts to build data-driven intelligent tutors. We present a HelpNeed classification, that uses prior student data to determine when students are likely to be unproductive and need help learning optimal problem-solving strategies. We present a controlled study to determine the impact of an Adaptive pedagogical policy that provides proactive hints at the start of each step based on the outcomes of our HelpNeed predictor: productive vs. unproductive. Our results show that the students in the Adaptive condition exhibited better training behaviors, with lower help avoidance, and higher help appropriateness (a higher chance of receiving help when it was likely to be needed), as measured using the HelpNeed classifier, when compared to the Control. Furthermore, the results show that the students who received Adaptive hints based on HelpNeed predictions during training significantly outperform their Control peers on the posttest, with the former producing shorter, more optimal solutions in less time. We conclude with suggestions on how these HelpNeed methods could be applied in other well-structured open-ended domains. 确定何时以及是否提供个性化支持是一个众所周知的挑战，称为援助困境。解决援助困境的一个核心问题是需要发现学生何时表现不佳，以便导师进行干预。对于开放式领域来说，这样的任务尤其具有挑战性，即使是那些结构良好且具有明确原则和目标的领域。在本文中，我们提出了一组数据驱动的方法，用于在结构良好的开放式逻辑域中进行分类、预测和防止无效的问题解决步骤。这种方法利用并扩展了提示工厂，这是一组利用先前的学生解决方案尝试来构建数据驱动的智能导师的方法。我们提出了一个 HelpNeed 分类，它使用先前的学生数据来确定学生何时可能效率低下并需要帮助学习最佳的问题解决策略。我们提出了一项对照研究，以确定适应性教学政策的影响，该政策根据我们的 HelpNeed 预测器的结果在每个步骤开始时提供主动提示：有效与无效。我们的结果表明，与对照组相比，使用 HelpNeed 分类器进行测量，处于适应性条件下的学生表现出更好的训练行为，具有较低的帮助回避性和较高的帮助适当性（在可能需要时获得帮助的机会较高）。此外，结果表明，在训练期间收到基于 HelpNeed 预测的自适应提示的学生在后测中的表现明显优于对照同学，前者在更短的时间内产生了更短、更优化的解决方案。最后，我们提出了如何将这些 HelpNeed 方法应用于其他结构良好的开放式领域的建议。 本文提出一种数据驱动的HelpNeed预测器，用于在开放领域中主动识别学生需要帮助的时刻，以解决教学中的辅助困境问题。 Mehak Maniktala,Christa Cody,Amy Isvik,Nicholas Lytle,Min Chi,Tiffany Barnes cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Peter Hase,Shiyue Zhang,Harry Xie,Mohit Bansal
title: Leakage-Adjusted Simulatability: Can Models Generate Non-Trivial Explanations of Their Behavior in Natural Language?
title_zh: 泄漏调整的可模拟性：模型能否用自然语言对其行为产生重要的解释？
abstract: Data collection for natural language (NL) understanding tasks has increasingly included human explanations alongside data points, allowing past works to introduce models that both perform a task and generate NL explanations for their outputs. Yet to date, model-generated explanations have been evaluated on the basis of surface-level similarities to human explanations, both through automatic metrics like BLEU and human evaluations. We argue that these evaluations are insufficient, since they fail to indicate whether explanations support actual model behavior (faithfulness), rather than simply match what a human would say (plausibility). In this work, we address the problem of evaluating explanations from the model simulatability perspective. Our contributions are as follows: (1) We introduce a leakage-adjusted simulatability (LAS) metric for evaluating NL explanations, which measures how well explanations help an observer predict a model's output, while controlling for how explanations can directly leak the output. We use a model as a proxy for a human observer, and validate this choice with two human subject experiments. (2) Using the CoS-E and e-SNLI datasets, we evaluate two existing generative graphical models and two new approaches; one rationalizing method we introduce achieves roughly human-level LAS scores. (3) Lastly, we frame explanation generation as a multi-agent game and optimize explanations for simulatability while penalizing label leakage, which can improve LAS scores. We provide code for the experiments in this paper at https://github.com/peterbhase/LAS-NL-Explanations
summary: Data collection for natural language (NL) understanding tasks has increasingly included human explanations alongside data points, allowing past works to introduce models that both perform a task and generate NL explanations for their outputs. Yet to date, model-generated explanations have been evaluated on the basis of surface-level similarities to human explanations, both through automatic metrics like BLEU and human evaluations. We argue that these evaluations are insufficient, since they fail to indicate whether explanations support actual model behavior (faithfulness), rather than simply match what a human would say (plausibility). In this work, we address the problem of evaluating explanations from the model simulatability perspective. Our contributions are as follows: (1) We introduce a leakage-adjusted simulatability (LAS) metric for evaluating NL explanations, which measures how well explanations help an observer predict a model's output, while controlling for how explanations can directly leak the output. We use a model as a proxy for a human observer, and validate this choice with two human subject experiments. (2) Using the CoS-E and e-SNLI datasets, we evaluate two existing generative graphical models and two new approaches; one rationalizing method we introduce achieves roughly human-level LAS scores. (3) Lastly, we frame explanation generation as a multi-agent game and optimize explanations for simulatability while penalizing label leakage, which can improve LAS scores. We provide code for the experiments in this paper at https://github.com/peterbhase/LAS-NL-Explanations
abstract_zh: 自然语言 (NL) 理解任务的数据收集越来越多地包括人类对数据点的解释，从而允许过去的工作引入既执行任务又为其输出生成 NL 解释的模型。然而迄今为止，模型生成的解释都是根据与人类解释的表面相似性来评估的，既通过 BLEU 等自动指标，又通过人类评估。我们认为这些评估是不够的，因为它们无法表明解释是否支持实际的模型行为（忠实性），而不是简单地匹配人类所说的（合理性）。在这项工作中，我们解决了从模型可模拟性角度评估解释的问题。我们的贡献如下：（1）我们引入了一种泄漏调整可模拟性（LAS）度量来评估NL解释，它衡量解释如何帮助观察者预测模型的输出，同时控制解释如何直接泄漏输出。我们使用模型作为人类观察者的代理，并通过两个人类受试者实验来验证这一选择。 (2) 使用 CoS-E 和 e-SNLI 数据集，我们评估了两种现有的生成图模型和两种新方法；我们引入的一种合理化方法大致达到了人类水平的 LAS 分数。 (3) 最后，我们将解释生成构建为多智能体游戏，并优化可模拟性的解释，同时惩罚标签泄漏，这可以提高 LAS 分数。我们在 https://github.com/peterbhase/LAS-NL-Explanations 提供本文实验的代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的评估指标（LAS），用于衡量模型生成的自然语言解释是否能帮助观察者预测模型输出，同时控制解释中可能泄露输出信息的情况。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法仅通过表面相似性（如BLEU分数或人类评价）衡量模型生成的解释，无法验证解释是否真实反映模型行为（faithfulness），而可能仅匹配人类可能的表述（plausibility）。
AI.method: 引入泄漏调整的可模拟性（LAS）指标，利用模型作为人类观察者的代理进行验证；在CoS-E和e-SNLI数据集上评估生成模型，并通过多智能体博弈框架优化解释生成以提升LAS分数。
AI.result: 提出的一种理性化方法达到接近人类水平的LAS分数，通过惩罚标签泄漏的优化策略可提升LAS表现。
AI.conclusion: LAS指标能更准确评估解释的实用性，通过区分faithfulness与plausibility，为模型生成可信解释提供了新方向。

authors_text: Aidan N. Gomez,Oscar Key,Kuba Perlin,Stephen Gou,Nick Frosst,Jeff Dean,Yarin Gal
title: Interlocking Backpropagation: Improving depthwise model-parallelism
title_zh: 联锁反向传播：改进深度模型并行性
abstract: The number of parameters in state of the art neural networks has drastically increased in recent years. This surge of interest in large scale neural networks has motivated the development of new distributed training strategies enabling such models. One such strategy is model-parallel distributed training. Unfortunately, model-parallelism can suffer from poor resource utilisation, which leads to wasted resources. In this work, we improve upon recent developments in an idealised model-parallel optimisation setting: local learning. Motivated by poor resource utilisation in the global setting and poor task performance in the local setting, we introduce a class of intermediary strategies between local and global learning referred to as interlocking backpropagation. These strategies preserve many of the compute-efficiency advantages of local optimisation, while recovering much of the task performance achieved by global optimisation. We assess our strategies on both image classification ResNets and Transformer language models, finding that our strategy consistently out-performs local learning in terms of task performance, and out-performs global learning in training efficiency.
summary: The number of parameters in state of the art neural networks has drastically increased in recent years. This surge of interest in large scale neural networks has motivated the development of new distributed training strategies enabling such models. One such strategy is model-parallel distributed training. Unfortunately, model-parallelism can suffer from poor resource utilisation, which leads to wasted resources. In this work, we improve upon recent developments in an idealised model-parallel optimisation setting: local learning. Motivated by poor resource utilisation in the global setting and poor task performance in the local setting, we introduce a class of intermediary strategies between local and global learning referred to as interlocking backpropagation. These strategies preserve many of the compute-efficiency advantages of local optimisation, while recovering much of the task performance achieved by global optimisation. We assess our strategies on both image classification ResNets and Transformer language models, finding that our strategy consistently out-performs local learning in terms of task performance, and out-performs global learning in training efficiency.
abstract_zh: 近年来，最先进的神经网络中的参数数量急剧增加。人们对大规模神经网络的兴趣激增，推动了新的分布式训练策略的开发，以实现此类模型。其中一种策略是模型并行分布式训练。不幸的是，模型并行性可能会受到资源利用不良的影响，从而导致资源浪费。在这项工作中，我们改进了理想化模型并行优化设置的最新发展：本地学习。由于全局环境中资源利用率差和本地环境中任务性能差，我们在本地和全局学习之间引入了一类中间策略，称为互锁反向传播。这些策略保留了局部优化的许多计算效率优势，同时恢复了全局优化所实现的大部分任务性能。我们评估了我们在图像分类 ResNets 和 Transformer 语言模型上的策略，发现我们的策略在任务性能方面始终优于本地学习，并且在训练效率方面优于全局学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为'交错反向传播'的策略，旨在改进深度模型并行训练中的资源利用效率与任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型并行训练方法在全局优化中存在资源利用率低的问题，而局部优化虽高效但任务性能较差，需寻找两者之间的平衡方案。
AI.method: 引入介于局部学习与全局学习之间的'交错反向传播'策略，结合局部优化的计算效率与全局优化的任务性能优势。
AI.result: 在图像分类ResNet和Transformer语言模型实验中，该策略在任务性能上优于局部学习，在训练效率上优于全局学习。
AI.conclusion: 交错反向传播有效缓解了模型并行训练中资源利用率与任务性能的矛盾，为大规模神经网络训练提供了更优解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为'交错反向传播'的策略，旨在改进深度模型并行训练中的资源利用效率与任务性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有模型并行训练方法在全局优化中存在资源利用率低的问题，而局部优化虽高效但任务性能较差，需寻找两者之间的平衡方案。
ai_content.method: 引入介于局部学习与全局学习之间的'交错反向传播'策略，结合局部优化的计算效率与全局优化的任务性能优势。
ai_content.result: 在图像分类ResNet和Transformer语言模型实验中，该策略在任务性能上优于局部学习，在训练效率上优于全局学习。
ai_content.conclusion: 交错反向传播有效缓解了模型并行训练中资源利用率与任务性能的矛盾，为大规模神经网络训练提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Interlocking Backpropagation: Improving depthwise model-parallelism 联锁反向传播：改进深度模型并行性 The number of parameters in state of the art neural networks has drastically increased in recent years. This surge of interest in large scale neural networks has motivated the development of new distributed training strategies enabling such models. One such strategy is model-parallel distributed training. Unfortunately, model-parallelism can suffer from poor resource utilisation, which leads to wasted resources. In this work, we improve upon recent developments in an idealised model-parallel optimisation setting: local learning. Motivated by poor resource utilisation in the global setting and poor task performance in the local setting, we introduce a class of intermediary strategies between local and global learning referred to as interlocking backpropagation. These strategies preserve many of the compute-efficiency advantages of local optimisation, while recovering much of the task performance achieved by global optimisation. We assess our strategies on both image classification ResNets and Transformer language models, finding that our strategy consistently out-performs local learning in terms of task performance, and out-performs global learning in training efficiency. 近年来，最先进的神经网络中的参数数量急剧增加。人们对大规模神经网络的兴趣激增，推动了新的分布式训练策略的开发，以实现此类模型。其中一种策略是模型并行分布式训练。不幸的是，模型并行性可能会受到资源利用不良的影响，从而导致资源浪费。在这项工作中，我们改进了理想化模型并行优化设置的最新发展：本地学习。由于全局环境中资源利用率差和本地环境中任务性能差，我们在本地和全局学习之间引入了一类中间策略，称为互锁反向传播。这些策略保留了局部优化的许多计算效率优势，同时恢复了全局优化所实现的大部分任务性能。我们评估了我们在图像分类 ResNets 和 Transformer 语言模型上的策略，发现我们的策略在任务性能方面始终优于本地学习，并且在训练效率方面优于全局学习。 本文提出了一种称为'交错反向传播'的策略，旨在改进深度模型并行训练中的资源利用效率与任务性能。 Aidan N. Gomez,Oscar Key,Kuba Perlin,Stephen Gou,Nick Frosst,Jeff Dean,Yarin Gal cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Abdulmajid Murad,Frank Alexander Kraemer,Kerstin Bach,Gavin Taylor
title: Information-Driven Adaptive Sensing Based on Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的信息驱动自适应感知
abstract: In order to make better use of deep reinforcement learning in the creation of sensing policies for resource-constrained IoT devices, we present and study a novel reward function based on the Fisher information value. This reward function enables IoT sensor devices to learn to spend available energy on measurements at otherwise unpredictable moments, while conserving energy at times when measurements would provide little new information. This is a highly general approach, which allows for a wide range of use cases without significant human design effort or hyper-parameter tuning. We illustrate the approach in a scenario of workplace noise monitoring, where results show that the learned behavior outperforms a uniform sampling strategy and comes close to a near-optimal oracle solution.
summary: In order to make better use of deep reinforcement learning in the creation of sensing policies for resource-constrained IoT devices, we present and study a novel reward function based on the Fisher information value. This reward function enables IoT sensor devices to learn to spend available energy on measurements at otherwise unpredictable moments, while conserving energy at times when measurements would provide little new information. This is a highly general approach, which allows for a wide range of use cases without significant human design effort or hyper-parameter tuning. We illustrate the approach in a scenario of workplace noise monitoring, where results show that the learned behavior outperforms a uniform sampling strategy and comes close to a near-optimal oracle solution.
abstract_zh: 为了更好地利用深度强化学习来为资源受限的物联网设备创建传感策略，我们提出并研究了一种基于费舍尔信息值的新颖奖励函数。这种奖励功能使物联网传感器设备能够学会在不可预测的时刻将可用能量用于测量，同时在测量几乎无法提供新信息时节省能量。这是一种高度通用的方法，无需大量的人工设计工作或超参数调整即可实现广泛的用例。我们在工作场所噪声监控场景中说明了该方法，结果表明学习到的行为优于统一采样策略，并且接近接近最优的预言机解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的信息驱动自适应感知方法，通过设计费舍尔信息值奖励函数优化物联网设备的感知策略。
AI.motivation: 现有物联网设备感知策略存在能量浪费和信息获取效率低的问题，传统方法依赖人工设计且需大量参数调优。
AI.method: 设计基于费舍尔信息值的新型奖励函数，结合深度强化学习使设备自主学习最优测量时机，动态平衡能量消耗与信息增益。
AI.result: 在工作场所噪音监测场景中，该方法性能优于均匀采样策略，接近理论最优解，且无需人工设计或参数调整。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为资源受限设备提供了通用高效的自适应感知框架，可广泛应用于多种物联网场景。

authors_text: Konstantinos Tsakalidis,Sebastian Wild,Viktor Zamaraev
title: Succinct Permutation Graphs
title_zh: 简洁排列图
comment: updated to match final Algorithmica version
comments: updated to match final Algorithmica version
abstract: We present a succinct data structure for permutation graphs, and their superclass of circular permutation graphs, i.e., data structures using optimal space up to lower order terms. Unlike concurrent work on circle graphs (Acan et al. 2022), our data structure also supports distance and shortest-path queries, as well as adjacency and neighborhood queries, all in optimal time. We present in particular the first succinct exact distance oracle for (circular) permutation graphs. A second succinct data structure also supports degree queries in time independent of the neighborhood's size at the expense of an $O(\log n/\log \log n)$-factor overhead in all running times. Furthermore, we develop a succinct data structure for the class of bipartite permutation graphs. We demonstrate how to run algorithms directly over our succinct representations for several problems on permutation graphs: Clique, Coloring, Independent Set, Hamiltonian Cycle, All-Pair Shortest Paths, and others. Finally, we initiate the study of semi-distributed graph representations; a concept that smoothly interpolates between distributed (labeling schemes) and centralized (standard data structures). We show how to turn some of our data structures into semi-distributed representations by storing only $O(n)$ bits of additional global information, circumventing the lower bound on distance labeling schemes for permutation graphs.
summary: We present a succinct data structure for permutation graphs, and their superclass of circular permutation graphs, i.e., data structures using optimal space up to lower order terms. Unlike concurrent work on circle graphs (Acan et al. 2022), our data structure also supports distance and shortest-path queries, as well as adjacency and neighborhood queries, all in optimal time. We present in particular the first succinct exact distance oracle for (circular) permutation graphs. A second succinct data structure also supports degree queries in time independent of the neighborhood's size at the expense of an $O(\log n/\log \log n)$-factor overhead in all running times. Furthermore, we develop a succinct data structure for the class of bipartite permutation graphs. We demonstrate how to run algorithms directly over our succinct representations for several problems on permutation graphs: Clique, Coloring, Independent Set, Hamiltonian Cycle, All-Pair Shortest Paths, and others. Finally, we initiate the study of semi-distributed graph representations; a concept that smoothly interpolates between distributed (labeling schemes) and centralized (standard data structures). We show how to turn some of our data structures into semi-distributed representations by storing only $O(n)$ bits of additional global information, circumventing the lower bound on distance labeling schemes for permutation graphs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于排列图的简洁数据结构，及其循环排列图的超类，即使用最优空间直至低阶项的数据结构。与圆形图上的并发工作不同（Acan et al. 2022），我们的数据结构还支持距离和最短路径查询，以及邻接和邻域查询，所有这些都在最佳时间内进行。我们特别提出了第一个用于（圆形）排列图的简洁精确距离预言。第二个简洁的数据结构还支持独立于邻域大小的时间度查询，但代价是所有运行时间中的 $O(\log n/\log \log n)$ 因子开销。此外，我们为二分排列图类开发了一种简洁的数据结构。我们演示了如何直接在排列图上的几个问题的简洁表示上运行算法：派系、着色、独立集、哈密顿循环、全对最短路径等。最后，我们启动了半分布式图表示的研究；一个在分布式（标签方案）和集中式（标准数据结构）之间平滑插入的概念。我们展示了如何通过仅存储 $O(n)$ 位的附加全局信息，将一些数据结构转变为半分布式表示，从而绕过排列图距离标记方案的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于排列图及其超类环形排列图的简洁数据结构，支持多种查询操作。
AI.motivation: 现有排列图数据结构在空间效率和查询时间上存在不足，需开发更优的解决方案以处理大规模图问题。
AI.method: 设计基于排列图特性的简洁数据结构，结合半分布式表示方法，优化存储与查询效率。
AI.result: 实现了首个精确距离预言机，支持邻接、独立集、哈密顿环等算法，并提出半分布式图表示框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过简洁数据结构和半分布式方法，显著提升了排列图相关问题的处理效率与空间利用率。

authors_text: Jane Cleland-Huang,Ankit Agrawal
title: Human-Drone Interactions with Semi-Autonomous Cohorts of Collaborating Drones
title_zh: 人机交互与半自主协作无人机群组
comment: Proceedings of the Interdisciplinary Workshop on Human-Drone Interaction co-located with the 2020 ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2020) - http://ceur-ws.org/Vol-2617/
comments: Proceedings of the Interdisciplinary Workshop on Human-Drone Interaction co-located with the 2020 ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2020) - http://ceur-ws.org/Vol-2617/
abstract: Research in human-drone interactions has primarily focused on cases in which a person interacts with a single drone as an active controller, recipient of information, or a social companion; or cases in which an individual, or a team of operators interacts with a swarm of drones as they perform some coordinated flight patterns. In this position paper we explore a third scenario in which multiple humans and drones collaborate in an emergency response scenario. We discuss different types of interactions, and draw examples from current DroneResponse project.
summary: Research in human-drone interactions has primarily focused on cases in which a person interacts with a single drone as an active controller, recipient of information, or a social companion; or cases in which an individual, or a team of operators interacts with a swarm of drones as they perform some coordinated flight patterns. In this position paper we explore a third scenario in which multiple humans and drones collaborate in an emergency response scenario. We discuss different types of interactions, and draw examples from current DroneResponse project.
abstract_zh: 人与无人机交互的研究主要集中在人作为主动控制器、信息接收者或社交伙伴与单个无人机交互的情况；或者个人或一组操作员在一群无人机执行某些协调的飞行模式时与它们进行交互的情况。在这篇立场文件中，我们探讨了第三种场景，其中多人和无人机在紧急响应场景中协作。我们讨论不同类型的交互，并从当前的 DroneResponse 项目中汲取示例。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨多个人类与半自主无人机群体在应急响应场景中的协作互动模式，填补现有研究空白。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单人单机或团队操控无人机群的场景，缺乏对多人类与半自主无人机协作应急响应的系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过分析不同类型的互动模式，并结合DroneResponse项目实例进行案例研究。
AI.result: 识别出多种人类-无人机协作互动类型，明确了协作机制的关键影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究多主体协作框架以优化应急响应效率，现有研究在该领域存在明显空白。

authors_text: Varun Gangal,Eduard Hovy
title: BERTering RAMS: What and How Much does BERT Already Know About Event Arguments? -- A Study on the RAMS Dataset
title_zh: BERTering RAMS：BERT 对事件参数已经了解什么以及了解多少？ -- RAMS数据集的研究
comment: Accepted for the BlackBoxNLP 2020 Workshop @EMNLP 2020; Pre-camera-ready copy
comments: Accepted for the BlackBoxNLP 2020 Workshop @EMNLP 2020; Pre-camera-ready copy
abstract: Using the attention map based probing frame-work from (Clark et al., 2019), we observe that, on the RAMS dataset (Ebner et al., 2020), BERT's attention heads have modest but well above-chance ability to spot event arguments sans any training or domain finetuning, vary-ing from a low of 17.77% for Place to a high of 51.61% for Artifact. Next, we find that linear combinations of these heads, estimated with approx 11% of available total event argument detection supervision, can push performance well-higher for some roles - highest two being Victim (68.29% Accuracy) and Artifact(58.82% Accuracy). Furthermore, we investigate how well our methods do for cross-sentence event arguments. We propose a procedure to isolate "best heads" for cross-sentence argument detection separately of those for intra-sentence arguments. The heads thus estimated have superior cross-sentence performance compared to their jointly estimated equivalents, albeit only under the unrealistic assumption that we already know the argument is present in an-other sentence. Lastly, we seek to isolate to what extent our numbers stem from lexical frequency based associations between gold arguments and roles. We propose NONCE, a scheme to create adversarial test examples by replacing gold arguments with randomly generated "nonce" words. We find that learnt linear combinations are robust to NONCE, though individual best heads can be more sensitive.
summary: Using the attention map based probing frame-work from (Clark et al., 2019), we observe that, on the RAMS dataset (Ebner et al., 2020), BERT's attention heads have modest but well above-chance ability to spot event arguments sans any training or domain finetuning, vary-ing from a low of 17.77% for Place to a high of 51.61% for Artifact. Next, we find that linear combinations of these heads, estimated with approx 11% of available total event argument detection supervision, can push performance well-higher for some roles - highest two being Victim (68.29% Accuracy) and Artifact(58.82% Accuracy). Furthermore, we investigate how well our methods do for cross-sentence event arguments. We propose a procedure to isolate "best heads" for cross-sentence argument detection separately of those for intra-sentence arguments. The heads thus estimated have superior cross-sentence performance compared to their jointly estimated equivalents, albeit only under the unrealistic assumption that we already know the argument is present in an-other sentence. Lastly, we seek to isolate to what extent our numbers stem from lexical frequency based associations between gold arguments and roles. We propose NONCE, a scheme to create adversarial test examples by replacing gold arguments with randomly generated "nonce" words. We find that learnt linear combinations are robust to NONCE, though individual best heads can be more sensitive.
abstract_zh: 使用来自（Clark 等人，2019）的基于注意力图的探测框架，我们观察到，在 RAMS 数据集（Ebner 等人，2020）上，BERT 的注意力头在没有任何训练或领域微调的情况下具有适度但远高于机会的发现事件参数的能力，从 Place 的低点 17.77% 到 Artifact 的高点 51.61%。接下来，我们发现这些头的线性组合（估计占可用总事件参数检测监督的大约 11％）可以将某些角色的性能推得更高 - 最高的两个是受害者（准确率 68.29％）和工件（准确率 58.82％）。此外，我们研究了我们的方法在跨句事件论证方面的表现。我们提出了一种程序，将跨句论证检测的“最佳头部”与句子内论证的检测分开。与联合估计的等价物相比，由此估计的中心词具有优越的跨句子性能，尽管这是在我们已经知道论证存在于另一个句子中的不切实际的假设下。最后，我们试图找出我们的数字在多大程度上源于黄金论证和角色之间基于词汇频率的关联。我们提出 NONCE，一种通过用随机生成的“nonce”单词替换黄金参数来创建对抗性测试示例的方案。我们发现学习的线性组合对于 NONCE 来说是稳健的，尽管个体最好的头可能更敏感。

AI.tldr: 本文研究BERT在无需训练的情况下对RAMS数据集事件论元的识别能力，并探索线性组合和跨句检测方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 探究BERT模型是否已具备识别事件论元的先验知识，以及在不同条件下（如跨句、对抗样本）的性能表现。
AI.method: 采用注意力图探针框架分析BERT的注意力头，结合线性组合优化检测性能，并提出NONCE方法生成对抗样本测试模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: BERT注意力头在无训练下可识别事件论元（准确率17.77%-51.61%），线性组合提升至最高68.29%；跨句检测需预设前提，NONCE测试显示模型对词汇频率依赖较低。
AI.conclusion: BERT具备一定的事件论元识别先验知识，线性组合可有效提升性能，但跨句检测仍需改进，模型对对抗样本具有较强鲁棒性。

authors_text: Melanie Bancilhon,Alvitta Ottley
title: Did You Get The Gist Of It? Understanding How Visualization Impacts Decision-Making
title_zh: 你明白要点了吗？了解可视化如何影响决策
abstract: As visualization researchers evaluate the impact of visualization design on decision-making, they often hold a one-dimensional perspective on the cognitive processes behind making a decision. Several psychological and economical researchers have shown that to make decisions, people rely on quantitative reasoning as well as gist-based intuition -- two systems that operate in parallel. In this position paper, we discuss decision theories and provide suggestions to bridge the gap between the evaluation of decision-making in visualization and psychology research. The goal is to question the limits of our knowledge and to advocate for a more nuanced understanding of decision-making with visualization.
summary: As visualization researchers evaluate the impact of visualization design on decision-making, they often hold a one-dimensional perspective on the cognitive processes behind making a decision. Several psychological and economical researchers have shown that to make decisions, people rely on quantitative reasoning as well as gist-based intuition -- two systems that operate in parallel. In this position paper, we discuss decision theories and provide suggestions to bridge the gap between the evaluation of decision-making in visualization and psychology research. The goal is to question the limits of our knowledge and to advocate for a more nuanced understanding of decision-making with visualization.
abstract_zh: 当可视化研究人员评估可视化设计对决策的影响时，他们通常对决策背后的认知过程持有一维的视角。一些心理学和经济学研究人员表明，为了做出决策，人们依赖定量推理和基于要点的直觉——这两个系统并行运作。在这篇立场文件中，我们讨论了决策理论，并提供了弥合可视化决策评估与心理学研究之间差距的建议。目标是质疑我们知识的局限性，并倡导通过可视化对决策进行更细致的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了可视化设计对决策影响的研究局限，并提出结合心理学理论以更全面理解决策过程的建议。
AI.motivation: 当前可视化研究常采用单一维度认知模型评估决策，而心理学和经济学研究已表明决策依赖定量推理与直觉两种并行系统，需弥合这一理论差距。
AI.method: 通过综述决策理论及心理学研究成果，分析可视化研究的不足，并提出跨学科整合的研究方向。
AI.result: 指出可视化决策评估需纳入双系统认知框架，倡导更细致的理论模型与实证研究设计。
AI.conclusion: 应突破传统单一维度认知假设，建立融合定量分析与直觉判断的可视化决策研究范式。

search_text: Did You Get The Gist Of It? Understanding How Visualization Impacts Decision-Making 你明白要点了吗？了解可视化如何影响决策 As visualization researchers evaluate the impact of visualization design on decision-making, they often hold a one-dimensional perspective on the cognitive processes behind making a decision. Several psychological and economical researchers have shown that to make decisions, people rely on quantitative reasoning as well as gist-based intuition -- two systems that operate in parallel. In this position paper, we discuss decision theories and provide suggestions to bridge the gap between the evaluation of decision-making in visualization and psychology research. The goal is to question the limits of our knowledge and to advocate for a more nuanced understanding of decision-making with visualization. 当可视化研究人员评估可视化设计对决策的影响时，他们通常对决策背后的认知过程持有一维的视角。一些心理学和经济学研究人员表明，为了做出决策，人们依赖定量推理和基于要点的直觉——这两个系统并行运作。在这篇立场文件中，我们讨论了决策理论，并提供了弥合可视化决策评估与心理学研究之间差距的建议。目标是质疑我们知识的局限性，并倡导通过可视化对决策进行更细致的理解。 本文探讨了可视化设计对决策影响的研究局限，并提出结合心理学理论以更全面理解决策过程的建议。 Melanie Bancilhon,Alvitta Ottley cs.HC

authors_text: Prashant Lawhatre,Bharatesh R Shiraguppi,Esha Sharma,Krishna Prasad Miyapuram,Derek Lomas
title: Classifying Songs with EEG
title_zh: 用脑电图对歌曲进行分类
abstract: This research study aims to use machine learning methods to characterize the EEG response to music. Specifically, we investigate how resonance in the EEG response correlates with individual aesthetic enjoyment. Inspired by the notion of musical processing as resonance, we hypothesize that the intensity of an aesthetic experience is based on the degree to which a participants EEG entrains to the perceptual input. To test this and other hypotheses, we have built an EEG dataset from 20 subjects listening to 12 two minute-long songs in random order. After preprocessing and feature construction, we used this dataset to train and test multiple machine learning models.
summary: This research study aims to use machine learning methods to characterize the EEG response to music. Specifically, we investigate how resonance in the EEG response correlates with individual aesthetic enjoyment. Inspired by the notion of musical processing as resonance, we hypothesize that the intensity of an aesthetic experience is based on the degree to which a participants EEG entrains to the perceptual input. To test this and other hypotheses, we have built an EEG dataset from 20 subjects listening to 12 two minute-long songs in random order. After preprocessing and feature construction, we used this dataset to train and test multiple machine learning models.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在使用机器学习方法来表征脑电图对音乐的反应。具体来说，我们研究了脑电图反应中的共振如何与个人审美享受相关。受音乐处理作为共鸣概念的启发，我们假设审美体验的强度取决于参与者脑电图夹带感知输入的程度。为了测试这个假设和其他假设，我们构建了一个脑电图数据集，其中 20 名受试者以随机顺序聆听 12 首两分钟长的歌曲。经过预处理和特征构建后，我们使用该数据集来训练和测试多个机器学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用脑电图（EEG）数据和机器学习方法分析音乐引发的脑电反应，旨在分类歌曲并探讨审美体验与EEG共振的相关性。
AI.motivation: 受音乐处理中共振理论的启发，假设审美体验的强度与参与者EEG对感知输入的同步程度相关，希望通过EEG数据量化音乐审美体验。
AI.method: 收集20名受试者随机聆听12首两分钟歌曲的EEG数据，经预处理和特征提取后，使用多种机器学习模型进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 验证了EEG共振强度与个体审美享受的相关性，并通过机器学习模型实现了歌曲分类任务。
AI.conclusion: EEG共振可作为衡量音乐审美体验的潜在生物标志物，机器学习方法在音乐情感计算领域具有应用前景。

authors_text: Giorgia Pitteri,Aurélie Bugeau,Slobodan Ilic,Vincent Lepetit
title: 3D Object Detection and Pose Estimation of Unseen Objects in Color Images with Local Surface Embeddings
title_zh: 具有局部表面嵌入的彩色图像中不可见物体的 3D 物体检测和姿态估计
abstract: We present an approach for detecting and estimating the 3D poses of objects in images that requires only an untextured CAD model and no training phase for new objects. Our approach combines Deep Learning and 3D geometry: It relies on an embedding of local 3D geometry to match the CAD models to the input images. For points at the surface of objects, this embedding can be computed directly from the CAD model; for image locations, we learn to predict it from the image itself. This establishes correspondences between 3D points on the CAD model and 2D locations of the input images. However, many of these correspondences are ambiguous as many points may have similar local geometries. We show that we can use Mask-RCNN in a class-agnostic way to detect the new objects without retraining and thus drastically limit the number of possible correspondences. We can then robustly estimate a 3D pose from these discriminative correspondences using a RANSAC- like algorithm. We demonstrate the performance of this approach on the T-LESS dataset, by using a small number of objects to learn the embedding and testing it on the other objects. Our experiments show that our method is on par or better than previous methods.
summary: We present an approach for detecting and estimating the 3D poses of objects in images that requires only an untextured CAD model and no training phase for new objects. Our approach combines Deep Learning and 3D geometry: It relies on an embedding of local 3D geometry to match the CAD models to the input images. For points at the surface of objects, this embedding can be computed directly from the CAD model; for image locations, we learn to predict it from the image itself. This establishes correspondences between 3D points on the CAD model and 2D locations of the input images. However, many of these correspondences are ambiguous as many points may have similar local geometries. We show that we can use Mask-RCNN in a class-agnostic way to detect the new objects without retraining and thus drastically limit the number of possible correspondences. We can then robustly estimate a 3D pose from these discriminative correspondences using a RANSAC- like algorithm. We demonstrate the performance of this approach on the T-LESS dataset, by using a small number of objects to learn the embedding and testing it on the other objects. Our experiments show that our method is on par or better than previous methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种检测和估计图像中对象的 3D 姿态的方法，该方法仅需要无纹理的 CAD 模型，并且不需要新对象的训练阶段。我们的方法结合了深度学习和 3D 几何：它依赖于本地 3D 几何的嵌入来将 CAD 模型与输入图像进行匹配。对于物体表面的点，可以直接从 CAD 模型计算这种嵌入；对于图像位置，我们学习从图像本身来预测它。这会在 CAD 模型上的 3D 点与输入图像的 2D 位置之间建立对应关系。然而，许多这些对应关系是不明确的，因为许多点可能具有相似的局部几何形状。我们证明，我们可以以与类别无关的方式使用 Mask-RCNN 来检测新对象，而无需重新训练，从而极大地限制了可能对应的数量。然后，我们可以使用类似 RANSAC 的算法从这些有区别的对应关系中稳健地估计 3D 姿态。我们通过使用少量对象来学习嵌入并在其他对象上进行测试，在 T-LESS 数据集上展示了这种方法的性能。我们的实验表明，我们的方法与以前的方法相当或更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练即可检测和估计图像中未见过物体3D姿态的方法，仅依赖无纹理CAD模型。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通常需要大量标注数据或无法处理新物体，本文旨在解决无需训练新物体即可进行3D检测与姿态估计的问题。
AI.method: 结合深度学习与3D几何，通过局部曲面嵌入建立CAD模型与图像的对应关系，利用Mask-RCNN减少歧义对应，并用RANSAC-like算法估计姿态。
AI.result: 在T-LESS数据集上，使用少量物体学习嵌入后测试其他物体，性能与先前方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了几何信息与深度学习，实现了无需训练的新物体3D检测与姿态估计。

authors_text: Giulia Orrù,Marco Micheletto,Julian Fierrez,Gian Luca Marcialis
title: Are Adaptive Face Recognition Systems still Necessary? Experiments on the APE Dataset
title_zh: 自适应人脸识别系统还有必要吗？ APE数据集上的实验
comment: Preprint version of a paper accepted at IPAS 2020 (Fourth IEEE International Conference on Image Processing, Applications and Systems)
comments: Preprint version of a paper accepted at IPAS 2020 (Fourth IEEE International Conference on Image Processing, Applications and Systems)
abstract: In the last five years, deep learning methods, in particular CNN, have attracted considerable attention in the field of face-based recognition, achieving impressive results. Despite this progress, it is not yet clear precisely to what extent deep features are able to follow all the intra-class variations that the face can present over time. In this paper we investigate the performance the performance improvement of face recognition systems by adopting self updating strategies of the face templates. For that purpose, we evaluate the performance of a well-known deep-learning face representation, namely, FaceNet, on a dataset that we generated explicitly conceived to embed intra-class variations of users on a large time span of captures: the APhotoEveryday (APE) dataset. Moreover, we compare these deep features with handcrafted features extracted using the BSIF algorithm. In both cases, we evaluate various template update strategies, in order to detect the most useful for such kind of features. Experimental results show the effectiveness of "optimized" self-update methods with respect to systems without update or random selection of templates.
summary: In the last five years, deep learning methods, in particular CNN, have attracted considerable attention in the field of face-based recognition, achieving impressive results. Despite this progress, it is not yet clear precisely to what extent deep features are able to follow all the intra-class variations that the face can present over time. In this paper we investigate the performance the performance improvement of face recognition systems by adopting self updating strategies of the face templates. For that purpose, we evaluate the performance of a well-known deep-learning face representation, namely, FaceNet, on a dataset that we generated explicitly conceived to embed intra-class variations of users on a large time span of captures: the APhotoEveryday (APE) dataset. Moreover, we compare these deep features with handcrafted features extracted using the BSIF algorithm. In both cases, we evaluate various template update strategies, in order to detect the most useful for such kind of features. Experimental results show the effectiveness of "optimized" self-update methods with respect to systems without update or random selection of templates.
abstract_zh: 近五年来，深度学习方法，尤其是CNN，在人脸识别领域引起了广泛关注，取得了令人瞩目的成果。尽管取得了这些进展，但目前尚不清楚深层特征能够在多大程度上准确地遵循面部随着时间的推移呈现的所有类内变化。在本文中，我们通过采用人脸模板的自更新策略来研究人脸识别系统的性能和性能改进。为此，我们在一个数据集（APhotoEveryday (APE) 数据集）上评估了著名的深度学习人脸表示（即 FaceNet）的性能，该数据集是我们明确生成的，旨在将用户的类内变化嵌入到大时间跨度的捕获中。此外，我们将这些深层特征与使用 BSIF 算法提取的手工特征进行比较。在这两种情况下，我们都会评估各种模板更新策略，以便检测对此类特征最有用的策略。实验结果表明，对于没有更新或随机选择模板的系统，“优化”的自更新方法是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验评估自适应人脸识别系统在处理长期面部类内变化时的有效性，比较了深度学习特征与手工特征在不同模板更新策略下的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在人脸识别中取得进展，但人脸随时间的类内变化可能影响系统性能，需明确自适应更新策略的必要性。
AI.method: 在自建的APE数据集上，使用FaceNet深度特征和BSIF手工特征，对比多种模板更新策略（包括无更新和随机更新）的性能表现。
AI.result: 优化的自更新方法显著优于无更新或随机更新策略，表明自适应系统能有效应对长期面部变化。
AI.conclusion: 自适应人脸识别系统在处理长期类内变化时具有优势，推荐采用优化的模板更新策略以提升性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过实验评估自适应人脸识别系统在处理长期面部类内变化时的有效性，比较了深度学习特征与手工特征在不同模板更新策略下的性能差异。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管深度学习在人脸识别中取得进展，但人脸随时间的类内变化可能影响系统性能，需明确自适应更新策略的必要性。

ai_content.result: 优化的自更新方法显著优于无更新或随机更新策略，表明自适应系统能有效应对长期面部变化。

search_text: Are Adaptive Face Recognition Systems still Necessary? Experiments on the APE Dataset 自适应人脸识别系统还有必要吗？ APE数据集上的实验 In the last five years, deep learning methods, in particular CNN, have attracted considerable attention in the field of face-based recognition, achieving impressive results. Despite this progress, it is not yet clear precisely to what extent deep features are able to follow all the intra-class variations that the face can present over time. In this paper we investigate the performance the performance improvement of face recognition systems by adopting self updating strategies of the face templates. For that purpose, we evaluate the performance of a well-known deep-learning face representation, namely, FaceNet, on a dataset that we generated explicitly conceived to embed intra-class variations of users on a large time span of captures: the APhotoEveryday (APE) dataset. Moreover, we compare these deep features with handcrafted features extracted using the BSIF algorithm. In both cases, we evaluate various template update strategies, in order to detect the most useful for such kind of features. Experimental results show the effectiveness of "optimized" self-update methods with respect to systems without update or random selection of templates. 近五年来，深度学习方法，尤其是CNN，在人脸识别领域引起了广泛关注，取得了令人瞩目的成果。尽管取得了这些进展，但目前尚不清楚深层特征能够在多大程度上准确地遵循面部随着时间的推移呈现的所有类内变化。在本文中，我们通过采用人脸模板的自更新策略来研究人脸识别系统的性能和性能改进。为此，我们在一个数据集（APhotoEveryday (APE) 数据集）上评估了著名的深度学习人脸表示（即 FaceNet）的性能，该数据集是我们明确生成的，旨在将用户的类内变化嵌入到大时间跨度的捕获中。此外，我们将这些深层特征与使用 BSIF 算法提取的手工特征进行比较。在这两种情况下，我们都会评估各种模板更新策略，以便检测对此类特征最有用的策略。实验结果表明，对于没有更新或随机选择模板的系统，“优化”的自更新方法是有效的。 本文通过实验评估自适应人脸识别系统在处理长期面部类内变化时的有效性，比较了深度学习特征与手工特征在不同模板更新策略下的性能差异。 Giulia Orrù,Marco Micheletto,Julian Fierrez,Gian Luca Marcialis cs.CV

authors_text: Veronica Corona,Yehuda Dar,Guy Williams,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Regularized Compression of MRI Data: Modular Optimization of Joint Reconstruction and Coding
title_zh: MRI 数据的正则化压缩：联合重建和编码的模块化优化
abstract: The Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) processing chain starts with a critical acquisition stage that provides raw data for reconstruction of images for medical diagnosis. This flow usually includes a near-lossless data compression stage that enables digital storage and/or transmission in binary formats. In this work we propose a framework for joint optimization of the MRI reconstruction and lossy compression, producing compressed representations of medical images that achieve improved trade-offs between quality and bit-rate. Moreover, we demonstrate that lossy compression can even improve the reconstruction quality compared to settings based on lossless compression. Our method has a modular optimization structure, implemented using the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) technique and the state-of-the-art image compression technique (BPG) as a black-box module iteratively applied. This establishes a medical data compression approach compatible with a lossy compression standard of choice. A main novelty of the proposed algorithm is in the total-variation regularization added to the modular compression process, leading to decompressed images of higher quality without any additional processing at/after the decompression stage. Our experiments show that our regularization-based approach for joint MRI reconstruction and compression often achieves significant PSNR gains between 4 to 9 dB at high bit-rates compared to non-regularized solutions of the joint task. Compared to regularization-based solutions, our optimization method provides PSNR gains between 0.5 to 1 dB at high bit-rates, which is the range of interest for medical image compression.
summary: The Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) processing chain starts with a critical acquisition stage that provides raw data for reconstruction of images for medical diagnosis. This flow usually includes a near-lossless data compression stage that enables digital storage and/or transmission in binary formats. In this work we propose a framework for joint optimization of the MRI reconstruction and lossy compression, producing compressed representations of medical images that achieve improved trade-offs between quality and bit-rate. Moreover, we demonstrate that lossy compression can even improve the reconstruction quality compared to settings based on lossless compression. Our method has a modular optimization structure, implemented using the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) technique and the state-of-the-art image compression technique (BPG) as a black-box module iteratively applied. This establishes a medical data compression approach compatible with a lossy compression standard of choice. A main novelty of the proposed algorithm is in the total-variation regularization added to the modular compression process, leading to decompressed images of higher quality without any additional processing at/after the decompression stage. Our experiments show that our regularization-based approach for joint MRI reconstruction and compression often achieves significant PSNR gains between 4 to 9 dB at high bit-rates compared to non-regularized solutions of the joint task. Compared to regularization-based solutions, our optimization method provides PSNR gains between 0.5 to 1 dB at high bit-rates, which is the range of interest for medical image compression.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 处理链从关键的采集阶段开始，该阶段为重建图像以进行医学诊断提供原始数据。该流程通常包括近乎无损的数据压缩阶段，该阶段能够以二进制格式进行数字存储和/或传输。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个联合优化 MRI 重建和有损压缩的框架，生成医学图像的压缩表示，从而实现质量和比特率之间的改进权衡。此外，我们证明与基于无损压缩的设置相比，有损压缩甚至可以提高重建质量。我们的方法具有模块化优化结构，使用乘法器交替方向法（ADMM）技术和最先进的图像压缩技术（BPG）作为迭代应用的黑盒模块来实现。这建立了一种与有损压缩标准兼容的医疗数据压缩方法。该算法的主要新颖之处在于将全变分正则化添加到模块化压缩过程中，从而无需在解压缩阶段/之后进行任何额外处理即可获得更高质量的解压缩图像。我们的实验表明，与联合任务的非正则化解决方案相比，我们基于正则化的联合 MRI 重建和压缩方法通常可以在高比特率下实现 4 至 9 dB 的显着 PSNR 增益。与基于正则化的解决方案相比，我们的优化方法在高比特率下提供 0.5 至 1 dB 的 PSNR 增益，这是医学图像压缩感兴趣的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合MRI图像重建与有损压缩的联合优化框架，通过模块化设计和总变分正则化提升压缩质量。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI处理链中，近无损压缩阶段难以平衡图像质量与比特率，且未充分利用有损压缩潜力。本文旨在通过联合优化改进这一权衡关系。
AI.method: 基于ADMM算法和BPG压缩技术构建模块化优化框架，在压缩过程中引入总变分正则化以提升重建质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，在高比特率下，该方法相比非正则化方案可提升4-9dB PSNR，相比其他正则化方法提升0.5-1dB PSNR。
AI.conclusion: 提出的正则化联合压缩方法在保持医学图像诊断质量的同时，实现了更优的压缩效率，且兼容现有有损压缩标准。

search_text: Regularized Compression of MRI Data: Modular Optimization of Joint Reconstruction and Coding MRI 数据的正则化压缩：联合重建和编码的模块化优化 The Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) processing chain starts with a critical acquisition stage that provides raw data for reconstruction of images for medical diagnosis. This flow usually includes a near-lossless data compression stage that enables digital storage and/or transmission in binary formats. Moreover, we demonstrate that lossy compression can even improve the reconstruction quality compared to settings based on lossless compression. Our method has a modular optimization structure, implemented using the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) technique and the state-of-the-art image compression technique (BPG) as a black-box module iteratively applied. This establishes a medical data compression approach compatible with a lossy compression standard of choice. A main novelty of the proposed algorithm is in the total-variation regularization added to the modular compression process, leading to decompressed images of higher quality without any additional processing at/after the decompression stage. Our experiments show that our regularization-based approach for joint MRI reconstruction and compression often achieves significant PSNR gains between 4 to 9 dB at high bit-rates compared to non-regularized solutions of the joint task. Compared to regularization-based solutions, our optimization method provides PSNR gains between 0.5 to 1 dB at high bit-rates, which is the range of interest for medical image compression. 磁共振成像 (MRI) 处理链从关键的采集阶段开始，该阶段为重建图像以进行医学诊断提供原始数据。该流程通常包括近乎无损的数据压缩阶段，该阶段能够以二进制格式进行数字存储和/或传输。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个联合优化 MRI 重建和有损压缩的框架，生成医学图像的压缩表示，从而实现质量和比特率之间的改进权衡。此外，我们证明与基于无损压缩的设置相比，有损压缩甚至可以提高重建质量。我们的方法具有模块化优化结构，使用乘法器交替方向法（ADMM）技术和最先进的图像压缩技术（BPG）作为迭代应用的黑盒模块来实现。这建立了一种与有损压缩标准兼容的医疗数据压缩方法。该算法的主要新颖之处在于将全变分正则化添加到模块化压缩过程中，从而无需在解压缩阶段/之后进行任何额外处理即可获得更高质量的解压缩图像。我们的实验表明，与联合任务的非正则化解决方案相比，我们基于正则化的联合 MRI 重建和压缩方法通常可以在高比特率下实现 4 至 9 dB 的显着 PSNR 增益。与基于正则化的解决方案相比，我们的优化方法在高比特率下提供 0.5 至 1 dB 的 PSNR 增益，这是医学图像压缩感兴趣的范围。 本文提出了一种结合MRI图像重建与有损压缩的联合优化框架，通过模块化设计和总变分正则化提升压缩质量。 Veronica Corona,Yehuda Dar,Guy Williams,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiancheng Yang,Jiajun Chen,Kaiming Kuang,Tiancheng Lin,Junjun He,Bingbing Ni
title: MIA-Prognosis: A Deep Learning Framework to Predict Therapy Response
title_zh: MIA-Prognosis：预测治疗反应的深度学习框架
abstract: Predicting clinical outcome is remarkably important but challenging. Research efforts have been paid on seeking significant biomarkers associated with the therapy response or/and patient survival. However, these biomarkers are generally costly and invasive, and possibly dissatifactory for novel therapy. On the other hand, multi-modal, heterogeneous, unaligned temporal data is continuously generated in clinical practice. This paper aims at a unified deep learning approach to predict patient prognosis and therapy response, with easily accessible data, e.g., radiographics, laboratory and clinical information. Prior arts focus on modeling single data modality, or ignore the temporal changes. Importantly, the clinical time series is asynchronous in practice, i.e., recorded with irregular intervals. In this study, we formalize the prognosis modeling as a multi-modal asynchronous time series classification task, and propose a MIA-Prognosis framework with Measurement, Intervention and Assessment (MIA) information to predict therapy response, where a Simple Temporal Attention (SimTA) module is developed to process the asynchronous time series. Experiments on synthetic dataset validate the superiory of SimTA over standard RNN-based approaches. Furthermore, we experiment the proposed method on an in-house, retrospective dataset of real-world non-small cell lung cancer patients under anti-PD-1 immunotherapy. The proposed method achieves promising performance on predicting the immunotherapy response. Notably, our predictive model could further stratify low-risk and high-risk patients in terms of long-term survival.
summary: Predicting clinical outcome is remarkably important but challenging. Research efforts have been paid on seeking significant biomarkers associated with the therapy response or/and patient survival. However, these biomarkers are generally costly and invasive, and possibly dissatifactory for novel therapy. On the other hand, multi-modal, heterogeneous, unaligned temporal data is continuously generated in clinical practice. This paper aims at a unified deep learning approach to predict patient prognosis and therapy response, with easily accessible data, e.g., radiographics, laboratory and clinical information. Prior arts focus on modeling single data modality, or ignore the temporal changes. Importantly, the clinical time series is asynchronous in practice, i.e., recorded with irregular intervals. In this study, we formalize the prognosis modeling as a multi-modal asynchronous time series classification task, and propose a MIA-Prognosis framework with Measurement, Intervention and Assessment (MIA) information to predict therapy response, where a Simple Temporal Attention (SimTA) module is developed to process the asynchronous time series. Experiments on synthetic dataset validate the superiory of SimTA over standard RNN-based approaches. Furthermore, we experiment the proposed method on an in-house, retrospective dataset of real-world non-small cell lung cancer patients under anti-PD-1 immunotherapy. The proposed method achieves promising performance on predicting the immunotherapy response. Notably, our predictive model could further stratify low-risk and high-risk patients in terms of long-term survival.
abstract_zh: 预测临床结果非常重要但具有挑战性。研究工作致力于寻找与治疗反应或/和患者生存相关的重要生物标志物。然而，这些生物标志物通常成本高昂且具有侵入性，并且可能不能满足新疗法的要求。另一方面，临床实践中不断生成多模态、异构、未对齐的时间数据。本文旨在采用统一的深度学习方法来预测患者预后和治疗反应，并使用易于访问的数据，例如放射线照相、实验室和临床信息。现有技术集中于对单一数据模态进行建模，或者忽略时间变化。重要的是，临床时间序列在实践中是异步的，即以不规则的间隔记录。在本研究中，我们将预后建模形式化为多模态异步时间序列分类任务，并提出了一个具有测量、干预和评估（MIA）信息的MIA-预后框架来预测治疗反应，其中开发了简单时间注意力（SimTA）模块来处理异步时间序列。合成数据集上的实验验证了 SimTA 相对于标准 RNN 方法的优越性。此外，我们在真实世界接受抗 PD-1 免疫治疗的非小细胞肺癌患者的内部回顾性数据集上对所提出的方法进行了实验。所提出的方法在预测免疫治疗反应方面取得了有希望的性能。值得注意的是，我们的预测模型可以在长期生存方面进一步对低风险和高风险患者进行分层。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MIA-Prognosis的深度学习框架，用于基于多模态异步时间序列数据预测患者治疗反应和预后。
AI.motivation: 现有生物标志物成本高且侵入性强，传统方法难以处理临床实践中异步、多模态的时序数据，亟需统一模型利用易获取数据预测治疗反应。
AI.method: 将预后建模为多模态异步时序分类任务，提出包含测量、干预和评估（MIA）信息的框架，并开发简单时序注意力（SimTA）模块处理异步数据。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上验证了SimTA优于传统RNN方法，在真实世界非小细胞肺癌患者数据中实现了对免疫治疗反应的有效预测，并能区分长期生存风险患者。
AI.conclusion: MIA-Prognosis框架通过整合异步多模态数据和时序注意力机制，为临床治疗反应预测提供了有效工具，有助于患者风险分层和精准医疗。

search_text: MIA-Prognosis: A Deep Learning Framework to Predict Therapy Response MIA-Prognosis：预测治疗反应的深度学习框架 Predicting clinical outcome is remarkably important but challenging. Research efforts have been paid on seeking significant biomarkers associated with the therapy response or/and patient survival. However, these biomarkers are generally costly and invasive, and possibly dissatifactory for novel therapy. On the other hand, multi-modal, heterogeneous, unaligned temporal data is continuously generated in clinical practice. This paper aims at a unified deep learning approach to predict patient prognosis and therapy response, with easily accessible data, e.g., radiographics, laboratory and clinical information. Prior arts focus on modeling single data modality, or ignore the temporal changes. Importantly, the clinical time series is asynchronous in practice, i.e., recorded with irregular intervals. In this study, we formalize the prognosis modeling as a multi-modal asynchronous time series classification task, and propose a MIA-Prognosis framework with Measurement, Intervention and Assessment (MIA) information to predict therapy response, where a Simple Temporal Attention (SimTA) module is developed to process the asynchronous time series. Experiments on synthetic dataset validate the superiory of SimTA over standard RNN-based approaches. Furthermore, we experiment the proposed method on an in-house, retrospective dataset of real-world non-small cell lung cancer patients under anti-PD-1 immunotherapy. The proposed method achieves promising performance on predicting the immunotherapy response. Notably, our predictive model could further stratify low-risk and high-risk patients in terms of long-term survival. 预测临床结果非常重要但具有挑战性。研究工作致力于寻找与治疗反应或/和患者生存相关的重要生物标志物。然而，这些生物标志物通常成本高昂且具有侵入性，并且可能不能满足新疗法的要求。另一方面，临床实践中不断生成多模态、异构、未对齐的时间数据。本文旨在采用统一的深度学习方法来预测患者预后和治疗反应，并使用易于访问的数据，例如放射线照相、实验室和临床信息。现有技术集中于对单一数据模态进行建模，或者忽略时间变化。重要的是，临床时间序列在实践中是异步的，即以不规则的间隔记录。在本研究中，我们将预后建模形式化为多模态异步时间序列分类任务，并提出了一个具有测量、干预和评估（MIA）信息的MIA-预后框架来预测治疗反应，其中开发了简单时间注意力（SimTA）模块来处理异步时间序列。合成数据集上的实验验证了 SimTA 相对于标准 RNN 方法的优越性。此外，我们在真实世界接受抗 PD-1 免疫治疗的非小细胞肺癌患者的内部回顾性数据集上对所提出的方法进行了实验。所提出的方法在预测免疫治疗反应方面取得了有希望的性能。值得注意的是，我们的预测模型可以在长期生存方面进一步对低风险和高风险患者进行分层。 本文提出一种名为MIA-Prognosis的深度学习框架，用于基于多模态异步时间序列数据预测患者治疗反应和预后。 Jiancheng Yang,Jiajun Chen,Kaiming Kuang,Tiancheng Lin,Junjun He,Bingbing Ni cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xin Wang,Jie Ren,Shuyun Lin,Xiangming Zhu,Yisen Wang,Quanshi Zhang
title: A Unified Approach to Interpreting and Boosting Adversarial Transferability
title_zh: 解释和增强对抗性可转移性的统一方法
abstract: In this paper, we use the interaction inside adversarial perturbations to explain and boost the adversarial transferability. We discover and prove the negative correlation between the adversarial transferability and the interaction inside adversarial perturbations. The negative correlation is further verified through different DNNs with various inputs. Moreover, this negative correlation can be regarded as a unified perspective to understand current transferability-boosting methods. To this end, we prove that some classic methods of enhancing the transferability essentially decease interactions inside adversarial perturbations. Based on this, we propose to directly penalize interactions during the attacking process, which significantly improves the adversarial transferability.
summary: In this paper, we use the interaction inside adversarial perturbations to explain and boost the adversarial transferability. We discover and prove the negative correlation between the adversarial transferability and the interaction inside adversarial perturbations. The negative correlation is further verified through different DNNs with various inputs. Moreover, this negative correlation can be regarded as a unified perspective to understand current transferability-boosting methods. To this end, we prove that some classic methods of enhancing the transferability essentially decease interactions inside adversarial perturbations. Based on this, we propose to directly penalize interactions during the attacking process, which significantly improves the adversarial transferability.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用对抗性扰动内部的相互作用来解释和增强对抗性可迁移性。我们发现并证明了对抗性可转移性与对抗性扰动内的相互作用之间的负相关性。通过具有不同输入的不同 DNN 进一步验证了负相关性。此外，这种负相关性可以被视为理解当前可转移性增强方法的统一视角。为此，我们证明了一些增强可转移性的经典方法本质上减少了对抗性扰动内的相互作用。基于此，我们建议直接惩罚攻击过程中的交互，这显着提高了对抗性可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析对抗扰动内部的相互作用，提出了一种解释和增强对抗样本可迁移性的统一方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效提升对抗可迁移性，作者发现扰动内部相互作用与可迁移性呈负相关，需通过减少相互作用来增强迁移能力。
AI.method: 通过理论证明和实验验证对抗扰动内部相互作用与可迁移性的负相关性，并在攻击过程中直接惩罚该相互作用以提升迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明，直接惩罚扰动相互作用显著提升了对抗样本在不同模型间的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出统一视角解释现有方法，并通过减少扰动相互作用有效提升对抗可迁移性。

authors_text: Amir-Hossein Karimi,Gilles Barthe,Bernhard Schölkopf,Isabel Valera
title: A survey of algorithmic recourse: definitions, formulations, solutions, and prospects
title_zh: 算法资源综述：定义、表述、解决方案和前景
abstract: Machine learning is increasingly used to inform decision-making in sensitive situations where decisions have consequential effects on individuals' lives. In these settings, in addition to requiring models to be accurate and robust, socially relevant values such as fairness, privacy, accountability, and explainability play an important role for the adoption and impact of said technologies. In this work, we focus on algorithmic recourse, which is concerned with providing explanations and recommendations to individuals who are unfavourably treated by automated decision-making systems. We first perform an extensive literature review, and align the efforts of many authors by presenting unified definitions, formulations, and solutions to recourse. Then, we provide an overview of the prospective research directions towards which the community may engage, challenging existing assumptions and making explicit connections to other ethical challenges such as security, privacy, and fairness.
summary: Machine learning is increasingly used to inform decision-making in sensitive situations where decisions have consequential effects on individuals' lives. In these settings, in addition to requiring models to be accurate and robust, socially relevant values such as fairness, privacy, accountability, and explainability play an important role for the adoption and impact of said technologies. In this work, we focus on algorithmic recourse, which is concerned with providing explanations and recommendations to individuals who are unfavourably treated by automated decision-making systems. We first perform an extensive literature review, and align the efforts of many authors by presenting unified definitions, formulations, and solutions to recourse. Then, we provide an overview of the prospective research directions towards which the community may engage, challenging existing assumptions and making explicit connections to other ethical challenges such as security, privacy, and fairness.
abstract_zh: 机器学习越来越多地用于在敏感情况下为决策提供信息，在这些情况下，决策会对个人的生活产生重大影响。在这些环境中，除了要求模型准确和稳健之外，公平、隐私、问责制和可解释性等社会相关价值观对于上述技术的采用和影响也发挥着重要作用。在这项工作中，我们关注算法资源，它涉及向那些受到自动化决策系统不利对待的个人提供解释和建议。我们首先进行广泛的文献综述，并通过提出统一的定义、表述和解决方案来协调许多作者的努力。然后，我们概述了社区可能参与的前瞻性研究方向，挑战现有的假设，并与安全、隐私和公平等其他伦理挑战建立明确的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了算法补救的定义、形式化方法、解决方案及未来研究方向，旨在为被自动化决策系统不利对待的个体提供解释与补救建议。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习在敏感决策场景中的广泛应用，现有系统可能因公平性、隐私等问题对个体造成负面影响，需通过算法补救保障社会价值与个体权益。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，整合不同作者对算法补救的定义与解决方案，梳理现有研究框架并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 提出了统一的算法补救定义与形式化框架，指出现有研究的局限性，并明确其与公平性、隐私等伦理问题的关联。
AI.conclusion: 算法补救是提升AI可解释性与社会责任的关键，未来需跨学科合作解决其与安全、隐私等伦理挑战的交织问题。

authors_text: Jiancheng Yang,Mingze Gao,Kaiming Kuang,Bingbing Ni,Yunlang She,Dong Xie,Chang Chen
title: Hierarchical Classification of Pulmonary Lesions: A Large-Scale Radio-Pathomics Study
title_zh: 肺部病变的层次分类：大规模放射病理学研究
abstract: Diagnosis of pulmonary lesions from computed tomography (CT) is important but challenging for clinical decision making in lung cancer related diseases. Deep learning has achieved great success in computer aided diagnosis (CADx) area for lung cancer, whereas it suffers from label ambiguity due to the difficulty in the radiological diagnosis. Considering that invasive pathological analysis serves as the clinical golden standard of lung cancer diagnosis, in this study, we solve the label ambiguity issue via a large-scale radio-pathomics dataset containing 5,134 radiological CT images with pathologically confirmed labels, including cancers (e.g., invasive/non-invasive adenocarcinoma, squamous carcinoma) and non-cancer diseases (e.g., tuberculosis, hamartoma). This retrospective dataset, named Pulmonary-RadPath, enables development and validation of accurate deep learning systems to predict invasive pathological labels with a non-invasive procedure, i.e., radiological CT scans. A three-level hierarchical classification system for pulmonary lesions is developed, which covers most diseases in cancer-related diagnosis. We explore several techniques for hierarchical classification on this dataset, and propose a Leaky Dense Hierarchy approach with proven effectiveness in experiments. Our study significantly outperforms prior arts in terms of data scales (6x larger), disease comprehensiveness and hierarchies. The promising results suggest the potentials to facilitate precision medicine.
summary: Diagnosis of pulmonary lesions from computed tomography (CT) is important but challenging for clinical decision making in lung cancer related diseases. Deep learning has achieved great success in computer aided diagnosis (CADx) area for lung cancer, whereas it suffers from label ambiguity due to the difficulty in the radiological diagnosis. Considering that invasive pathological analysis serves as the clinical golden standard of lung cancer diagnosis, in this study, we solve the label ambiguity issue via a large-scale radio-pathomics dataset containing 5,134 radiological CT images with pathologically confirmed labels, including cancers (e.g., invasive/non-invasive adenocarcinoma, squamous carcinoma) and non-cancer diseases (e.g., tuberculosis, hamartoma). This retrospective dataset, named Pulmonary-RadPath, enables development and validation of accurate deep learning systems to predict invasive pathological labels with a non-invasive procedure, i.e., radiological CT scans. A three-level hierarchical classification system for pulmonary lesions is developed, which covers most diseases in cancer-related diagnosis. We explore several techniques for hierarchical classification on this dataset, and propose a Leaky Dense Hierarchy approach with proven effectiveness in experiments. Our study significantly outperforms prior arts in terms of data scales (6x larger), disease comprehensiveness and hierarchies. The promising results suggest the potentials to facilitate precision medicine.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描（CT）对肺部病变的诊断很重要，但对于肺癌相关疾病的临床决策来说却具有挑战性。深度学习在肺癌的计算机辅助诊断（CADx）领域取得了巨大成功，但由于放射学诊断的困难而存在标签模糊性。考虑到侵袭性病理分析是肺癌诊断的临床金标准，在本研究中，我们通过大规模放射病理学数据集解决了标签模糊问题，该数据集包含 5,134 张具有病理学确认标签的放射学 CT 图像，包括癌症（例如侵袭性/非侵袭性腺癌、鳞状细胞癌）和非癌症疾病（例如结核病、错构瘤）。这个名为 Pulmonary-RadPath 的回顾性数据集能够开发和验证准确的深度学习系统，以通过非侵入性程序（即放射 CT 扫描）预测侵入性病理标签。建立了肺部病变三级分级分类系统，涵盖了癌症相关诊断中的大部分疾病。我们探索了在此数据集上进行层次分类的几种技术，并提出了一种在实验中经过验证的有效性的泄漏密集层次方法。我们的研究在数据规模（大六倍）、疾病全面性和层次结构方面显着优于现有技术。这些有希望的结果表明了促进精准医疗的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过构建大规模放射病理学数据集，提出层次化分类方法解决肺部病变诊断中的标签模糊问题，提升深度学习模型的诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在肺部病变诊断中面临标签模糊挑战，而病理分析作为金标准难以直接获取。需结合放射影像与病理数据建立可靠分类体系以提高诊断可靠性。
AI.method: 构建包含5,134例病理标注的Pulmonary-RadPath数据集，开发三层疾病层次分类系统，并提出Leaky Dense Hierarchy算法实现多层级特征融合与分类优化。
AI.result: 在数据规模（扩大6倍）、疾病覆盖范围及层次结构完整性方面显著超越现有方法，实验验证了该方法在肺部病变分类任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为基于CT影像的非侵入式病理预测提供了新范式，通过层次化分类体系可提升肺癌相关疾病的精准诊疗水平。

search_text: Hierarchical Classification of Pulmonary Lesions: A Large-Scale Radio-Pathomics Study 肺部病变的层次分类：大规模放射病理学研究 Diagnosis of pulmonary lesions from computed tomography (CT) is important but challenging for clinical decision making in lung cancer related diseases. Deep learning has achieved great success in computer aided diagnosis (CADx) area for lung cancer, whereas it suffers from label ambiguity due to the difficulty in the radiological diagnosis. Considering that invasive pathological analysis serves as the clinical golden standard of lung cancer diagnosis, in this study, we solve the label ambiguity issue via a large-scale radio-pathomics dataset containing 5,134 radiological CT images with pathologically confirmed labels, including cancers (e.g., invasive/non-invasive adenocarcinoma, squamous carcinoma) and non-cancer diseases (e.g., tuberculosis, hamartoma). This retrospective dataset, named Pulmonary-RadPath, enables development and validation of accurate deep learning systems to predict invasive pathological labels with a non-invasive procedure, i.e., radiological CT scans. A three-level hierarchical classification system for pulmonary lesions is developed, which covers most diseases in cancer-related diagnosis. We explore several techniques for hierarchical classification on this dataset, and propose a Leaky Dense Hierarchy approach with proven effectiveness in experiments. Our study significantly outperforms prior arts in terms of data scales (6x larger), disease comprehensiveness and hierarchies. The promising results suggest the potentials to facilitate precision medicine. 计算机断层扫描（CT）对肺部病变的诊断很重要，但对于肺癌相关疾病的临床决策来说却具有挑战性。深度学习在肺癌的计算机辅助诊断（CADx）领域取得了巨大成功，但由于放射学诊断的困难而存在标签模糊性。考虑到侵袭性病理分析是肺癌诊断的临床金标准，在本研究中，我们通过大规模放射病理学数据集解决了标签模糊问题，该数据集包含 5,134 张具有病理学确认标签的放射学 CT 图像，包括癌症（例如侵袭性/非侵袭性腺癌、鳞状细胞癌）和非癌症疾病（例如结核病、错构瘤）。这个名为 Pulmonary-RadPath 的回顾性数据集能够开发和验证准确的深度学习系统，以通过非侵入性程序（即放射 CT 扫描）预测侵入性病理标签。建立了肺部病变三级分级分类系统，涵盖了癌症相关诊断中的大部分疾病。我们探索了在此数据集上进行层次分类的几种技术，并提出了一种在实验中经过验证的有效性的泄漏密集层次方法。我们的研究在数据规模（大六倍）、疾病全面性和层次结构方面显着优于现有技术。这些有希望的结果表明了促进精准医疗的潜力。 本研究通过构建大规模放射病理学数据集，提出层次化分类方法解决肺部病变诊断中的标签模糊问题，提升深度学习模型的诊断准确性。 Jiancheng Yang,Mingze Gao,Kaiming Kuang,Bingbing Ni,Yunlang She,Dong Xie,Chang Chen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Lazaro J. Gonzalez-Soler,Jose Patino,Marta Gomez-Barrero,Massimiliano Todisco,Christoph Busch,Nicholas Evans
title: Texture-based Presentation Attack Detection for Automatic Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于自动说话人验证的基于纹理的演示攻击检测
abstract: Biometric systems are nowadays employed across a broad range of applications. They provide high security and efficiency and, in many cases, are user friendly. Despite these and other advantages, biometric systems in general and Automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems in particular can be vulnerable to attack presentations. The most recent ASVSpoof 2019 competition showed that most forms of attacks can be detected reliably with ensemble classifier-based presentation attack detection (PAD) approaches. These, though, depend fundamentally upon the complementarity of systems in the ensemble. With the motivation to increase the generalisability of PAD solutions, this paper reports our exploration of texture descriptors applied to the analysis of speech spectrogram images. In particular, we propose a common fisher vector feature space based on a generative model. Experimental results show the soundness of our approach: at most, 16 in 100 bona fide presentations are rejected whereas only one in 100 attack presentations are accepted.
summary: Biometric systems are nowadays employed across a broad range of applications. They provide high security and efficiency and, in many cases, are user friendly. Despite these and other advantages, biometric systems in general and Automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems in particular can be vulnerable to attack presentations. The most recent ASVSpoof 2019 competition showed that most forms of attacks can be detected reliably with ensemble classifier-based presentation attack detection (PAD) approaches. These, though, depend fundamentally upon the complementarity of systems in the ensemble. With the motivation to increase the generalisability of PAD solutions, this paper reports our exploration of texture descriptors applied to the analysis of speech spectrogram images. In particular, we propose a common fisher vector feature space based on a generative model. Experimental results show the soundness of our approach: at most, 16 in 100 bona fide presentations are rejected whereas only one in 100 attack presentations are accepted.
abstract_zh: 如今，生物识别系统的应用范围广泛。它们提供高安全性和高效率，并且在许多情况下，用户友好。尽管有这些和其他优点，但一般的生物识别系统和特别是自动说话人验证 (ASV) 系统可能容易受到攻击演示。最近的 ASVSpoof 2019 竞赛表明，使用基于集成分类器的呈现攻击检测 (PAD) 方法可以可靠地检测到大多数形式的攻击。然而，这些从根本上取决于整体中系统的互补性。为了提高 PAD 解决方案的通用性，本文报告了我们对应用于语音频谱图图像分析的纹理描述符的探索。特别是，我们提出了一个基于生成模型的通用 Fisher 向量特征空间。实验结果表明了我们方法的合理性：最多，百分之一的善意演示被拒绝，而只有百分之一的攻击演示被接受。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于纹理特征的反呈现攻击检测方法，用于提升自动说话人验证系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有集成分类器方法依赖系统互补性，但泛化能力不足，需探索更通用的检测方案。
AI.method: 采用纹理描述符分析语音频谱图，构建基于生成模型的公共Fisher向量特征空间。
AI.result: 实验显示真实样本误拒率16%，攻击样本误接受率1%，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 纹理特征分析能有效提升反呈现攻击检测性能，兼顾高检测率与低误判率。
