authors_text: Cathrin Elich,Martin R. Oswald,Marc Pollefeys,Joerg Stueckler
title: Weakly Supervised Learning of Multi-Object 3D Scene Decompositions Using Deep Shape Priors
title_zh: 使用深度形状先验的多对象 3D 场景分解的弱监督学习
comment: Preprint accepted to Computer Vision and Image Understanding
comments: Preprint accepted to Computer Vision and Image Understanding
abstract: Representing scenes at the granularity of objects is a prerequisite for scene understanding and decision making. We propose PriSMONet, a novel approach based on Prior Shape knowledge for learning Multi-Object 3D scene decomposition and representations from single images. Our approach learns to decompose images of synthetic scenes with multiple objects on a planar surface into its constituent scene objects and to infer their 3D properties from a single view. A recurrent encoder regresses a latent representation of 3D shape, pose and texture of each object from an input RGB image. By differentiable rendering, we train our model to decompose scenes from RGB-D images in a self-supervised way. The 3D shapes are represented continuously in function-space as signed distance functions which we pre-train from example shapes in a supervised way. These shape priors provide weak supervision signals to better condition the challenging overall learning task. We evaluate the accuracy of our model in inferring 3D scene layout, demonstrate its generative capabilities, assess its generalization to real images, and point out benefits of the learned representation.
summary: Representing scenes at the granularity of objects is a prerequisite for scene understanding and decision making. We propose PriSMONet, a novel approach based on Prior Shape knowledge for learning Multi-Object 3D scene decomposition and representations from single images. Our approach learns to decompose images of synthetic scenes with multiple objects on a planar surface into its constituent scene objects and to infer their 3D properties from a single view. A recurrent encoder regresses a latent representation of 3D shape, pose and texture of each object from an input RGB image. By differentiable rendering, we train our model to decompose scenes from RGB-D images in a self-supervised way. The 3D shapes are represented continuously in function-space as signed distance functions which we pre-train from example shapes in a supervised way. These shape priors provide weak supervision signals to better condition the challenging overall learning task. We evaluate the accuracy of our model in inferring 3D scene layout, demonstrate its generative capabilities, assess its generalization to real images, and point out benefits of the learned representation.
abstract_zh: 以对象的粒度表示场景是场景理解和决策的先决条件。我们提出了 PriSMONet，这是一种基于先验形状知识的新颖方法，用于学习多对象 3D 场景分解和单个图像的表示。我们的方法学习将平面上具有多个对象的合成场景的图像分解为其组成的场景对象，并从单个视图推断它们的 3D 属性。循环编码器从输入 RGB 图像中回归每个对象的 3D 形状、姿势和纹理的潜在表示。通过可微分渲染，我们训练模型以自我监督的方式分解 RGB-D 图像中的场景。 3D 形状在函数空间中连续表示为有符号距离函数，我们以监督方式从示例形状中对其进行预训练。这些形状先验提供了微弱的监督信号，可以更好地调节具有挑战性的整体学习任务。我们评估模型在推断 3D 场景布局方面的准确性，展示其生成能力，评估其对真实图像的泛化，并指出学习表示的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PriSMONet，利用深度形状先验知识，从单张图像中学习多物体3D场景分解与表征。
AI.motivation: 场景理解需要以物体粒度表示场景，但现有方法依赖强监督或难以处理弱标注数据，需探索弱监督学习方法。
AI.method: 采用循环编码器从RGB图像回归物体3D形状、姿态和纹理的潜在表示，通过可微渲染实现RGB-D图像的自监督训练，并用预训练的符号距离函数表示形状先验。
AI.result: 模型在3D场景布局推理、生成能力及对真实图像的泛化能力方面表现优异，验证了所学表征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 形状先验为弱监督场景分解提供了有效条件，PriSMONet在单视图3D重建任务中展现出应用潜力。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Learning of Multi-Object 3D Scene Decompositions Using Deep Shape Priors 使用深度形状先验的多对象 3D 场景分解的弱监督学习 Representing scenes at the granularity of objects is a prerequisite for scene understanding and decision making. We propose PriSMONet, a novel approach based on Prior Shape knowledge for learning Multi-Object 3D scene decomposition and representations from single images. Our approach learns to decompose images of synthetic scenes with multiple objects on a planar surface into its constituent scene objects and to infer their 3D properties from a single view. A recurrent encoder regresses a latent representation of 3D shape, pose and texture of each object from an input RGB image. By differentiable rendering, we train our model to decompose scenes from RGB-D images in a self-supervised way. The 3D shapes are represented continuously in function-space as signed distance functions which we pre-train from example shapes in a supervised way. These shape priors provide weak supervision signals to better condition the challenging overall learning task. We evaluate the accuracy of our model in inferring 3D scene layout, demonstrate its generative capabilities, assess its generalization to real images, and point out benefits of the learned representation. 以对象的粒度表示场景是场景理解和决策的先决条件。我们提出了 PriSMONet，这是一种基于先验形状知识的新颖方法，用于学习多对象 3D 场景分解和单个图像的表示。我们的方法学习将平面上具有多个对象的合成场景的图像分解为其组成的场景对象，并从单个视图推断它们的 3D 属性。循环编码器从输入 RGB 图像中回归每个对象的 3D 形状、姿势和纹理的潜在表示。通过可微分渲染，我们训练模型以自我监督的方式分解 RGB-D 图像中的场景。 3D 形状在函数空间中连续表示为有符号距离函数，我们以监督方式从示例形状中对其进行预训练。这些形状先验提供了微弱的监督信号，可以更好地调节具有挑战性的整体学习任务。我们评估模型在推断 3D 场景布局方面的准确性，展示其生成能力，评估其对真实图像的泛化，并指出学习表示的好处。 本文提出PriSMONet，利用深度形状先验知识，从单张图像中学习多物体3D场景分解与表征。 Cathrin Elich,Martin R. Oswald,Marc Pollefeys,Joerg Stueckler cs.CV

authors_text: Meng Qu,Junkun Chen,Louis-Pascal Xhonneux,Yoshua Bengio,Jian Tang
title: RNNLogic: Learning Logic Rules for Reasoning on Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: RNNLogic：学习知识图推理的逻辑规则
abstract: This paper studies learning logic rules for reasoning on knowledge graphs. Logic rules provide interpretable explanations when used for prediction as well as being able to generalize to other tasks, and hence are critical to learn. Existing methods either suffer from the problem of searching in a large search space (e.g., neural logic programming) or ineffective optimization due to sparse rewards (e.g., techniques based on reinforcement learning). To address these limitations, this paper proposes a probabilistic model called RNNLogic. RNNLogic treats logic rules as a latent variable, and simultaneously trains a rule generator as well as a reasoning predictor with logic rules. We develop an EM-based algorithm for optimization. In each iteration, the reasoning predictor is first updated to explore some generated logic rules for reasoning. Then in the E-step, we select a set of high-quality rules from all generated rules with both the rule generator and reasoning predictor via posterior inference; and in the M-step, the rule generator is updated with the rules selected in the E-step. Experiments on four datasets prove the effectiveness of RNNLogic.
summary: This paper studies learning logic rules for reasoning on knowledge graphs. Logic rules provide interpretable explanations when used for prediction as well as being able to generalize to other tasks, and hence are critical to learn. Existing methods either suffer from the problem of searching in a large search space (e.g., neural logic programming) or ineffective optimization due to sparse rewards (e.g., techniques based on reinforcement learning). To address these limitations, this paper proposes a probabilistic model called RNNLogic. RNNLogic treats logic rules as a latent variable, and simultaneously trains a rule generator as well as a reasoning predictor with logic rules. We develop an EM-based algorithm for optimization. In each iteration, the reasoning predictor is first updated to explore some generated logic rules for reasoning. Then in the E-step, we select a set of high-quality rules from all generated rules with both the rule generator and reasoning predictor via posterior inference; and in the M-step, the rule generator is updated with the rules selected in the E-step. Experiments on four datasets prove the effectiveness of RNNLogic.
abstract_zh: 本文研究知识图谱推理的学习逻辑规则。逻辑规则在用于预测时提供可解释的解释，并且能够推广到其他任务，因此对于学习至关重要。现有方法要么面临在大搜索空间中搜索的问题（例如神经逻辑编程），要么由于奖励稀疏而导致优化无效（例如基于强化学习的技术）。为了解决这些限制，本文提出了一种称为 RNNLogic 的概率模型。 RNNLogic 将逻辑规则视为潜在变量，同时用逻辑规则训练规则生成器和推理预测器。我们开发了一种基于 EM 的优化算法。在每次迭代中，首先更新推理预测器以探索一些生成的推理逻辑规则。然后在E步骤中，我们通过后验推理从规则生成器和推理预测器生成的所有规则中选择一组高质量规则；在M步骤中，规则生成器根据E步骤中选择的规则进行更新。在四个数据集上的实验证明了 RNNLogic 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RNNLogic模型，通过学习逻辑规则来提升知识图谱上的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在学习逻辑规则时面临搜索空间过大或优化效率低的问题，亟需一种更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计概率模型RNNLogic，通过EM算法联合训练规则生成器和推理预测器，迭代优化逻辑规则的质量与推理效果。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的实验验证了RNNLogic在逻辑规则学习和推理任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RNNLogic通过联合优化规则生成与推理预测，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为知识图谱推理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zanobya N. Khan
title: Frequency and Spatial domain based Saliency for Pigmented Skin Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 基于频率和空间域的色素皮肤病变分割显着性
abstract: Skin lesion segmentation can be rather a challenging task owing to the presence of artifacts, low contrast between lesion and boundary, color variegation, fuzzy skin lesion borders and heterogeneous background in dermoscopy images. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective saliency-based approach derived in the frequency and spatial domain to detect pigmented skin lesion. Two color models are utilized for the construction of these maps. We suggest a different metric for each color model to design map in the spatial domain via color features. The map in the frequency domain is generated from aggregated images. We adopt a separate fusion scheme to combine salient features in their respective domains. Finally, two-phase saliency integration scheme is devised to combine these maps using pixelwise multiplication. Performance of the proposed method is assessed on PH2 and ISIC 2016 datasets. The outcome of the experiments suggests that the proposed scheme generate better segmentation result as compared to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Skin lesion segmentation can be rather a challenging task owing to the presence of artifacts, low contrast between lesion and boundary, color variegation, fuzzy skin lesion borders and heterogeneous background in dermoscopy images. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective saliency-based approach derived in the frequency and spatial domain to detect pigmented skin lesion. Two color models are utilized for the construction of these maps. We suggest a different metric for each color model to design map in the spatial domain via color features. The map in the frequency domain is generated from aggregated images. We adopt a separate fusion scheme to combine salient features in their respective domains. Finally, two-phase saliency integration scheme is devised to combine these maps using pixelwise multiplication. Performance of the proposed method is assessed on PH2 and ISIC 2016 datasets. The outcome of the experiments suggests that the proposed scheme generate better segmentation result as compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于皮肤镜图像中存在伪影、病变和边界之间的低对比度、颜色杂色、模糊的皮肤病变边界和异质背景，皮肤病变分割可能是一项相当具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种在频率和空间域中导出的简单而有效的基于显着性的方法来检测色素性皮肤病变。使用两种颜色模型来构建这些地图。我们建议为每个颜色模型使用不同的度量，以通过颜色特征在空间域中设计地图。频域图是根据聚合图像生成的。我们采用单独的融合方案来组合各自领域中的显着特征。最后，设计了两阶段显着性积分方案，以使用像素乘法来组合这些图。所提出方法的性能在 PH2 和 ISIC 2016 数据集上进行评估。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方案产生了更好的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合频率和空间域显著性的方法，用于改善色素性皮肤病变的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 皮肤病变分割面临伪影、对比度低、颜色复杂等挑战，传统方法难以有效处理这些问题。
AI.method: 利用两种颜色模型分别构建空间域显著图和频率域显著图，通过像素级乘法融合两域特征，采用两阶段显著性集成方案实现分割。
AI.result: 在PH2和ISIC 2016数据集上实验表明，该方法分割效果优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效提升皮肤病变分割精度，为相关医学图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Siyuan Li,Haitao Lin,Zelin Zang,Lirong Wu,Jun Xia,Stan Z. Li
title: Invertible Manifold Learning for Dimension Reduction
title_zh: 用于降维的可逆流形学习
comment: ECML-PKDD 2021 camera-ready. 15 pages (main) with 10 pages appendix
comments: ECML-PKDD 2021 camera-ready. 15 pages (main) with 10 pages appendix
abstract: Dimension reduction (DR) aims to learn low-dimensional representations of high-dimensional data with the preservation of essential information. In the context of manifold learning, we define that the representation after information-lossless DR preserves the topological and geometric properties of data manifolds formally, and propose a novel two-stage DR method, called invertible manifold learning (inv-ML) to bridge the gap between theoretical information-lossless and practical DR. The first stage includes a homeomorphic sparse coordinate transformation to learn low-dimensional representations without destroying topology and a local isometry constraint to preserve local geometry. In the second stage, a linear compression is implemented for the trade-off between the target dimension and the incurred information loss in excessive DR scenarios. Experiments are conducted on seven datasets with a neural network implementation of inv-ML, called i-ML-Enc. Empirically, i-ML-Enc achieves invertible DR in comparison with typical existing methods as well as reveals the characteristics of the learned manifolds. Through latent space interpolation on real-world datasets, we find that the reliability of tangent space approximated by the local neighborhood is the key to the success of manifold-based DR algorithms.
summary: Dimension reduction (DR) aims to learn low-dimensional representations of high-dimensional data with the preservation of essential information. In the context of manifold learning, we define that the representation after information-lossless DR preserves the topological and geometric properties of data manifolds formally, and propose a novel two-stage DR method, called invertible manifold learning (inv-ML) to bridge the gap between theoretical information-lossless and practical DR. The first stage includes a homeomorphic sparse coordinate transformation to learn low-dimensional representations without destroying topology and a local isometry constraint to preserve local geometry. In the second stage, a linear compression is implemented for the trade-off between the target dimension and the incurred information loss in excessive DR scenarios. Experiments are conducted on seven datasets with a neural network implementation of inv-ML, called i-ML-Enc. Empirically, i-ML-Enc achieves invertible DR in comparison with typical existing methods as well as reveals the characteristics of the learned manifolds. Through latent space interpolation on real-world datasets, we find that the reliability of tangent space approximated by the local neighborhood is the key to the success of manifold-based DR algorithms.
abstract_zh: 降维（DR）旨在通过保留基本信息来学习高维数据的低维表示。在流形学习的背景下，我们定义信息无损降维后的表示形式保留了数据流形的拓扑和几何特性，并提出了一种新颖的两阶段降维方法，称为可逆流形学习（inv-ML），以弥合理论信息无损降维和实际降维之间的差距。第一阶段包括同胚稀疏坐标变换，以在不破坏拓扑的情况下学习低维表示，以及局部等距约束以保留局部几何形状。第二阶段，实现线性压缩，以权衡目标维度和过度灾难恢复场景下所导致的信息丢失。使用 inv-ML 的神经网络实现（称为 i-ML-Enc）在七个数据集上进行了实验。根据经验，与典型的现有方法相比，i-ML-Enc 实现了可逆 DR，并揭示了学习流形的特征。通过对真实数据集的潜在空间插值，我们发现局部邻域逼近的切线空间的可靠性是基于流形的DR算法成功的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为可逆流形学习（inv-ML）的两阶段降维方法，旨在实现信息无损的流形表示，同时保持数据的拓扑和几何结构。
AI.motivation: 现有降维方法难以在理论上的信息无损与实际应用中实现的降维效果之间取得平衡，需设计兼顾拓扑保持与几何约束的算法。
AI.method: 方法分为两阶段：第一阶段通过同胚稀疏坐标变换和局部等距约束学习低维表示；第二阶段引入线性压缩平衡目标维度与信息损失，实验采用神经网络实现i-ML-Enc。
AI.result: i-ML-Enc在七个数据集上实现可逆降维，验证了流形学习的可逆性，并通过潜在空间插值发现局部邻域切空间近似的可靠性是算法成功的关键。
AI.conclusion: 局部邻域对切空间的可靠近似是流形降维算法有效性的核心因素，为后续理论研究和应用提供了新方向。

search_text: Invertible Manifold Learning for Dimension Reduction 用于降维的可逆流形学习 Dimension reduction (DR) aims to learn low-dimensional representations of high-dimensional data with the preservation of essential information. In the context of manifold learning, we define that the representation after information-lossless DR preserves the topological and geometric properties of data manifolds formally, and propose a novel two-stage DR method, called invertible manifold learning (inv-ML) to bridge the gap between theoretical information-lossless and practical DR. The first stage includes a homeomorphic sparse coordinate transformation to learn low-dimensional representations without destroying topology and a local isometry constraint to preserve local geometry. In the second stage, a linear compression is implemented for the trade-off between the target dimension and the incurred information loss in excessive DR scenarios. Experiments are conducted on seven datasets with a neural network implementation of inv-ML, called i-ML-Enc. Empirically, i-ML-Enc achieves invertible DR in comparison with typical existing methods as well as reveals the characteristics of the learned manifolds. Through latent space interpolation on real-world datasets, we find that the reliability of tangent space approximated by the local neighborhood is the key to the success of manifold-based DR algorithms. 降维（DR）旨在通过保留基本信息来学习高维数据的低维表示。在流形学习的背景下，我们定义信息无损降维后的表示形式保留了数据流形的拓扑和几何特性，并提出了一种新颖的两阶段降维方法，称为可逆流形学习（inv-ML），以弥合理论信息无损降维和实际降维之间的差距。第一阶段包括同胚稀疏坐标变换，以在不破坏拓扑的情况下学习低维表示，以及局部等距约束以保留局部几何形状。第二阶段，实现线性压缩，以权衡目标维度和过度灾难恢复场景下所导致的信息丢失。使用 inv-ML 的神经网络实现（称为 i-ML-Enc）在七个数据集上进行了实验。根据经验，与典型的现有方法相比，i-ML-Enc 实现了可逆 DR，并揭示了学习流形的特征。通过对真实数据集的潜在空间插值，我们发现局部邻域逼近的切线空间的可靠性是基于流形的DR算法成功的关键。 本文提出一种名为可逆流形学习（inv-ML）的两阶段降维方法，旨在实现信息无损的流形表示，同时保持数据的拓扑和几何结构。 Siyuan Li,Haitao Lin,Zelin Zang,Lirong Wu,Jun Xia,Stan Z. authors_text: Adrian Shajkofci,Michael Liebling
title: Spatially-Variant CNN-based Point Spread Function Estimation for Blind Deconvolution and Depth Estimation in Optical Microscopy
title_zh: 基于空间变异 CNN 的点扩散函数估计，用于光学显微镜中的盲解卷积和深度估计
abstract: Optical microscopy is an essential tool in biology and medicine. Imaging thin, yet non-flat objects in a single shot (without relying on more sophisticated sectioning setups) remains challenging as the shallow depth of field that comes with high-resolution microscopes leads to unsharp image regions and makes depth localization and quantitative image interpretation difficult. Here, we present a method that improves the resolution of light microscopy images of such objects by locally estimating image distortion while jointly estimating object distance to the focal plane. Specifically, we estimate the parameters of a spatially-variant Point-Spread function (PSF) model using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), which does not require instrument- or object-specific calibration. Our method recovers PSF parameters from the image itself with up to a squared Pearson correlation coefficient of 0.99 in ideal conditions, while remaining robust to object rotation, illumination variations, or photon noise. When the recovered PSFs are used with a spatially-variant and regularized Richardson-Lucy deconvolution algorithm, we observed up to 2.1 dB better signal-to-noise ratio compared to other blind deconvolution techniques. Following microscope-specific calibration, we further demonstrate that the recovered PSF model parameters permit estimating surface depth with a precision of 2 micrometers and over an extended range when using engineered PSFs. Our method opens up multiple possibilities for enhancing images of non-flat objects with minimal need for a priori knowledge about the optical setup.
summary: Optical microscopy is an essential tool in biology and medicine. Imaging thin, yet non-flat objects in a single shot (without relying on more sophisticated sectioning setups) remains challenging as the shallow depth of field that comes with high-resolution microscopes leads to unsharp image regions and makes depth localization and quantitative image interpretation difficult. Here, we present a method that improves the resolution of light microscopy images of such objects by locally estimating image distortion while jointly estimating object distance to the focal plane. Specifically, we estimate the parameters of a spatially-variant Point-Spread function (PSF) model using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), which does not require instrument- or object-specific calibration. Our method recovers PSF parameters from the image itself with up to a squared Pearson correlation coefficient of 0.99 in ideal conditions, while remaining robust to object rotation, illumination variations, or photon noise. When the recovered PSFs are used with a spatially-variant and regularized Richardson-Lucy deconvolution algorithm, we observed up to 2.1 dB better signal-to-noise ratio compared to other blind deconvolution techniques. Following microscope-specific calibration, we further demonstrate that the recovered PSF model parameters permit estimating surface depth with a precision of 2 micrometers and over an extended range when using engineered PSFs. Our method opens up multiple possibilities for enhancing images of non-flat objects with minimal need for a priori knowledge about the optical setup.
abstract_zh: 光学显微镜是生物学和医学的重要工具。单次成像薄但不平坦的物体（不依赖更复杂的切片设置）仍然具有挑战性，因为高分辨率显微镜的浅景深会导致图像区域不清晰，并使深度定位和定量图像解释变得困难。在这里，我们提出了一种方法，通过局部估计图像失真同时联合估计物体到焦平面的距离来提高此类物体的光学显微镜图像的分辨率。具体来说，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）估计空间变化的点扩散函数（PSF）模型的参数，该模型不需要特定于仪器或对象的校准。我们的方法从图像本身恢复 PSF 参数，在理想条件下，平方皮尔逊相关系数高达 0.99，同时对对象旋转、照明变化或光子噪声保持鲁棒性。当恢复的 PSF 与空间变化和正则化的 Richardson-Lucy 反卷积算法一起使用时，我们观察到与其他盲反卷积技术相比，信噪比提高了 2.1 dB。经过特定于显微镜的校准后，我们​​进一步证明，当使用工程 PSF 时，恢复的 PSF 模型参数允许以 2 微米的精度和更大的范围估计表面深度。我们的方法为增强非平面物体的图像提供了多种可能性，而对光学设置的先验知识的需求极小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间可变卷积神经网络（CNN）的点扩散函数（PSF）估计方法，用于光学显微镜中非平面物体的盲去卷积和深度估计。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率光学显微镜因浅景深导致非平面物体成像时出现模糊区域，深度定位和定量分析困难，需无需特定校准的解决方案以提高图像分辨率和深度估计精度。
AI.method: 利用CNN从图像中直接估计空间可变PSF参数，结合正则化Richardson-Lucy去卷积算法实现盲去卷积，并通过工程化PSF模型进行深度估计。
AI.result: PSF参数估计在理想条件下达到0.99的皮尔逊相关系数，去卷积后信噪比提升2.1 dB，深度估计精度达2微米且范围广泛。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过局部PSF估计有效提升非平面物体显微图像质量及深度解析能力，显著减少对光学系统先验知识的依赖。

authors_text: Mack Sweeney,Matthew van Adelsberg,Kathryn Laskey,Carlotta Domeniconi
title: Effects of Model Misspecification on Bayesian Bandits: Case Studies in UX Optimization
title_zh: 模型错误指定对贝叶斯强盗的影响：用户体验优化案例研究
abstract: Bayesian bandits using Thompson Sampling have seen increasing success in recent years. Yet existing value models (of rewards) are misspecified on many real-world problem. We demonstrate this on the User Experience Optimization (UXO) problem, providing a novel formulation as a restless, sleeping bandit with unobserved confounders plus optional stopping. Our case studies show how common misspecifications can lead to sub-optimal rewards, and we provide model extensions to address these, along with a scientific model building process practitioners can adopt or adapt to solve their own unique problems. To our knowledge, this is the first study showing the effects of overdispersion on bandit explore/exploit efficacy, tying the common notions of under- and over-confidence to over- and under-exploration, respectively. We also present the first model to exploit cointegration in a restless bandit, demonstrating that finite regret and fast and consistent optional stopping are possible by moving beyond simpler windowing, discounting, and drift models.
summary: Bayesian bandits using Thompson Sampling have seen increasing success in recent years. Yet existing value models (of rewards) are misspecified on many real-world problem. We demonstrate this on the User Experience Optimization (UXO) problem, providing a novel formulation as a restless, sleeping bandit with unobserved confounders plus optional stopping. Our case studies show how common misspecifications can lead to sub-optimal rewards, and we provide model extensions to address these, along with a scientific model building process practitioners can adopt or adapt to solve their own unique problems. To our knowledge, this is the first study showing the effects of overdispersion on bandit explore/exploit efficacy, tying the common notions of under- and over-confidence to over- and under-exploration, respectively. We also present the first model to exploit cointegration in a restless bandit, demonstrating that finite regret and fast and consistent optional stopping are possible by moving beyond simpler windowing, discounting, and drift models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用汤普森采样的贝叶斯老虎机取得了越来越大的成功。然而，现有的（奖励）价值模型在许多现实问题上都被错误指定。我们在用户体验优化（UXO）问题上证明了这一点，提供了一种新颖的公式，作为一个不安分的、沉睡的强盗，具有未观察到的混杂因素和可选的停止。我们的案例研究表明，常见的错误指定如何导致次优奖励，我们提供模型扩展来解决这些问题，以及实践者可以采用或适应解决自己独特问题的科学模型构建过程。据我们所知，这是第一项显示过度分散对强盗探索/利用效率的影响的研究，将信心不足和过度自信的常见概念分别与过度和探索不足联系起来。我们还提出了第一个在不安分强盗中利用协整的模型，证明通过超越简单的窗口、贴现和漂移模型，有限的遗憾和快速一致的可选停止是可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究模型误设对贝叶斯老虎机算法在用户体验优化中的影响，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有奖励模型在现实问题中常存在误设，导致贝叶斯老虎机算法效果不佳，需探索更适应实际场景的模型构建方法。
AI.method: 将用户体验优化建模为带未观测混杂因素的非静止睡眠老虎机问题，通过案例研究分析误设影响，并扩展模型以处理过度离散化和协整关系。
AI.result: 案例表明常见误设会导致次优奖励，改进模型可有效缓解问题，并首次实现非静止老虎机的有限遗憾与快速停止。
AI.conclusion: 模型误设显著影响算法性能，通过科学建模流程和协整等方法可提升实际应用效果，为从业者提供可复用的解决方案。

search_text: Effects of Model Misspecification on Bayesian Bandits: Case Studies in UX Optimization 模型错误指定对贝叶斯强盗的影响：用户体验优化案例研究 Bayesian bandits using Thompson Sampling have seen increasing success in recent years. Yet existing value models (of rewards) are misspecified on many real-world problem. We demonstrate this on the User Experience Optimization (UXO) problem, providing a novel formulation as a restless, sleeping bandit with unobserved confounders plus optional stopping. Our case studies show how common misspecifications can lead to sub-optimal rewards, and we provide model extensions to address these, along with a scientific model building process practitioners can adopt or adapt to solve their own unique problems. To our knowledge, this is the first study showing the effects of overdispersion on bandit explore/exploit efficacy, tying the common notions of under- and over-confidence to over- and under-exploration, respectively. We also present the first model to exploit cointegration in a restless bandit, demonstrating that finite regret and fast and consistent optional stopping are possible by moving beyond simpler windowing, discounting, and drift models. 近年来，使用汤普森采样的贝叶斯老虎机取得了越来越大的成功。然而，现有的（奖励）价值模型在许多现实问题上都被错误指定。我们在用户体验优化（UXO）问题上证明了这一点，提供了一种新颖的公式，作为一个不安分的、沉睡的强盗，具有未观察到的混杂因素和可选的停止。我们的案例研究表明，常见的错误指定如何导致次优奖励，我们提供模型扩展来解决这些问题，以及实践者可以采用或适应解决自己独特问题的科学模型构建过程。据我们所知，这是第一项显示过度分散对强盗探索/利用效率的影响的研究，将信心不足和过度自信的常见概念分别与过度和探索不足联系起来。我们还提出了第一个在不安分强盗中利用协整的模型，证明通过超越简单的窗口、贴现和漂移模型，有限的遗憾和快速一致的可选停止是可能的。 本文研究模型误设对贝叶斯老虎机算法在用户体验优化中的影响，并提出改进方法。 Mack Sweeney,Matthew van Adelsberg,Kathryn Laskey,Carlotta Domeniconi cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Aashish Sharma,Robby T. Tan,Loong-Fah Cheong
title: Estimation of Camera Response Function using Prediction Consistency and Gradual Refinement with an Extension to Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用预测一致性和逐步细化以及深度学习的扩展来估计相机响应函数
abstract: Most existing methods for CRF estimation from a single image fail to handle general real images. For instance, EdgeCRF based on colour patches extracted from edges works effectively only when the presence of noise is insignificant, which is not the case for many real images; and, CRFNet, a recent method based on fully supervised deep learning works only for the CRFs that are in the training data, and hence fail to deal with other possible CRFs beyond the training data. To address these problems, we introduce a non-deep-learning method using prediction consistency and gradual refinement. First, we rely more on the patches of the input image that provide more consistent predictions. If the predictions from a patch are more consistent, it means that the patch is likely to be less affected by noise or any inferior colour combinations, and hence, it can be more reliable for CRF estimation. Second, we employ a gradual refinement scheme in which we start from a simple CRF model to generate a result which is more robust to noise but less accurate, and then we gradually increase the model's complexity to improve the result. This is because a simple model, while being less accurate, overfits less to noise than a complex model does. Our experiments show that our method outperforms the existing single-image methods for daytime and nighttime real images. We further propose a more efficient deep learning extension that performs test-time training (based on unsupervised losses) on the test input image. This provides our method better generalization performance than CRFNet making it more practically applicable for CRF estimation for general real images.
summary: Most existing methods for CRF estimation from a single image fail to handle general real images. For instance, EdgeCRF based on colour patches extracted from edges works effectively only when the presence of noise is insignificant, which is not the case for many real images; and, CRFNet, a recent method based on fully supervised deep learning works only for the CRFs that are in the training data, and hence fail to deal with other possible CRFs beyond the training data. To address these problems, we introduce a non-deep-learning method using prediction consistency and gradual refinement. First, we rely more on the patches of the input image that provide more consistent predictions. If the predictions from a patch are more consistent, it means that the patch is likely to be less affected by noise or any inferior colour combinations, and hence, it can be more reliable for CRF estimation. Second, we employ a gradual refinement scheme in which we start from a simple CRF model to generate a result which is more robust to noise but less accurate, and then we gradually increase the model's complexity to improve the result. This is because a simple model, while being less accurate, overfits less to noise than a complex model does. Our experiments show that our method outperforms the existing single-image methods for daytime and nighttime real images. We further propose a more efficient deep learning extension that performs test-time training (based on unsupervised losses) on the test input image. This provides our method better generalization performance than CRFNet making it more practically applicable for CRF estimation for general real images.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的单幅图像 CRF 估计方法无法处理一般的真实图像。例如，基于从边缘提取色块的 EdgeCRF 仅当噪声的存在不明显时才有效，但对于许多真实图像而言并非如此；而且，CRFNet 是一种基于完全监督深度学习的最新方法，仅适用于训练数据中的条件随机场，因此无法处理训练数据之外的其他可能的条件随机场。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种使用预测一致性和逐步细化的非深度学习方法。首先，我们更多地依赖输入图像的补丁来提供更一致的预测。如果来自补丁的预测更加一致，则意味着该补丁可能较少受到噪声或任何较差颜色组合的影响，因此对于 CRF 估计来说可以更加可靠。其次，我们采用逐步细化方案，从简单的 CRF 模型开始，生成对噪声更稳健但准确性较低的结果，然后逐渐增加模型的复杂性以改进结果。这是因为简单模型虽然不太准确，但与复杂模型相比，对噪声的过度拟合较少。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在白天和夜间真实图像方面优于现有的单图像方法。我们进一步提出了一种更有效的深度学习扩展，可以对测试输入图像执行测试时训练（基于无监督损失）。这为我们的方法提供了比 CRFNet 更好的泛化性能，使其更实际地适用于一般真实图像的 CRF 估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测一致性和渐进优化的非深度学习方法，并扩展了深度学习方法，以改进真实场景下的相机响应函数（CRF）估计。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像CRF估计方法在处理真实图像时存在局限性，例如对噪声敏感或泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过筛选预测一致性更高的图像块并采用渐进式模型复杂度提升方案，结合测试时训练的深度学习扩展方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在白天和夜间真实图像上的表现优于现有单图像方法，且深度学习扩展提升了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在真实场景CRF估计中具有更高的鲁棒性和实用性，尤其适用于未知CRF情况。

If the predictions from a patch are more consistent, it means that the patch is likely to be less affected by noise or any inferior colour combinations, and hence, it can be more reliable for CRF estimation. Second, we employ a gradual refinement scheme in which we start from a simple CRF model to generate a result which is more robust to noise but less accurate, and then we gradually increase the model's complexity to improve the result. This is because a simple model, while being less accurate, overfits less to noise than a complex model does. Our experiments show that our method outperforms the existing single-image methods for daytime and nighttime real images. We further propose a more efficient deep learning extension that performs test-time training (based on unsupervised losses) on the test input image. authors_text: Jon Haitz Legarreta,Laurent Petit,François Rheault,Guillaume Theaud,Carl Lemaire,Maxime Descoteaux,Pierre-Marc Jodoin
title: Filtering in tractography using autoencoders (FINTA)
title_zh: 使用自动编码器进行纤维束成像过滤 (FINTA)
comment: Preprint. Published in Medical Image Analysis 72 (2021) 102126
comments: Preprint. Published in Medical Image Analysis 72 (2021) 102126
abstract: Current brain white matter fiber tracking techniques show a number of problems, including: generating large proportions of streamlines that do not accurately describe the underlying anatomy; extracting streamlines that are not supported by the underlying diffusion signal; and under-representing some fiber populations, among others. In this paper, we describe a novel autoencoder-based learning method to filter streamlines from diffusion MRI tractography, and hence, to obtain more reliable tractograms. Our method, dubbed FINTA (Filtering in Tractography using Autoencoders) uses raw, unlabeled tractograms to train the autoencoder, and to learn a robust representation of brain streamlines. Such an embedding is then used to filter undesired streamline samples using a nearest neighbor algorithm. Our experiments on both synthetic and in vivo human brain diffusion MRI tractography data obtain accuracy scores exceeding the 90\% threshold on the test set. Results reveal that FINTA has a superior filtering performance compared to conventional, anatomy-based methods, and the RecoBundles state-of-the-art method. Additionally, we demonstrate that FINTA can be applied to partial tractograms without requiring changes to the framework. We also show that the proposed method generalizes well across different tracking methods and datasets, and shortens significantly the computation time for large (>1 M streamlines) tractograms. Together, this work brings forward a new deep learning framework in tractography based on autoencoders, which offers a flexible and powerful method for white matter filtering and bundling that could enhance tractometry and connectivity analyses.
summary: Current brain white matter fiber tracking techniques show a number of problems, including: generating large proportions of streamlines that do not accurately describe the underlying anatomy; extracting streamlines that are not supported by the underlying diffusion signal; and under-representing some fiber populations, among others. In this paper, we describe a novel autoencoder-based learning method to filter streamlines from diffusion MRI tractography, and hence, to obtain more reliable tractograms. Our method, dubbed FINTA (Filtering in Tractography using Autoencoders) uses raw, unlabeled tractograms to train the autoencoder, and to learn a robust representation of brain streamlines. Such an embedding is then used to filter undesired streamline samples using a nearest neighbor algorithm. Our experiments on both synthetic and in vivo human brain diffusion MRI tractography data obtain accuracy scores exceeding the 90\% threshold on the test set. Results reveal that FINTA has a superior filtering performance compared to conventional, anatomy-based methods, and the RecoBundles state-of-the-art method. Additionally, we demonstrate that FINTA can be applied to partial tractograms without requiring changes to the framework. We also show that the proposed method generalizes well across different tracking methods and datasets, and shortens significantly the computation time for large (>1 M streamlines) tractograms. Together, this work brings forward a new deep learning framework in tractography based on autoencoders, which offers a flexible and powerful method for white matter filtering and bundling that could enhance tractometry and connectivity analyses.
abstract_zh: 目前的大脑白质纤维跟踪技术显示出许多问题，包括：生成大比例的流线，无法准确描述底层解剖结构；提取底层扩散信号不支持的流线；以及某些纤维群体的代表性不足等。在本文中，我们描述了一种新颖的基于自动编码器的学习方法，用于从扩散 MRI 纤维束成像中过滤流线，从而获得更可靠的纤维束图。我们的方法被称为 FINTA（使用自动编码器进行纤维束成像过滤），使用原始的、未标记的纤维束图来训练自动编码器，并学习大脑流线的稳健表示。然后，使用最近邻算法，使用这种嵌入来过滤不需要的流线样本。我们对合成和体内人脑扩散 MRI 纤维束成像数据进行的实验在测试集上获得了超过 90% 阈值的准确度分数。结果表明，与传统的基于解剖学的方法和 RecoBundles 最先进的方法相比，FINTA 具有卓越的过滤性能。此外，我们还证明 FINTA 可以应用于部分束图，而无需更改框架。我们还表明，所提出的方法可以很好地推广到不同的跟踪方法和数据集，并显着缩短大型（> 1 M 流线）轨迹图的计算时间。总之，这项工作提出了一种基于自动编码器的纤维束成像的新深度学习框架，它为白质过滤和捆绑提供了一种灵活而强大的方法，可以增强纤维束测量和连接性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自编码器的深度学习框架FINTA，用于过滤扩散MRI纤维追踪中的无效流形，以提高白质纤维成像的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有脑白质纤维追踪技术存在生成不准确流形、提取无信号支持流形及部分纤维群体代表性不足等问题，亟需更高效的过滤方法。
AI.method: 利用未标记的原始纤维追踪数据训练自编码器，学习流形的鲁棒表征，并通过最近邻算法过滤异常样本。
AI.result: 在合成与人体数据集上测试准确率超90%，优于传统解剖学方法和RecoBundles方法，且适用于部分纤维追踪数据，显著缩短大规模数据处理时间。
AI.conclusion: FINTA为白质过滤与束聚分析提供了灵活高效的深度学习方案，有望提升脑连接性研究的准确性。

search_text: Filtering in tractography using autoencoders (FINTA) 使用自动编码器进行纤维束成像过滤 (FINTA) Current brain white matter fiber tracking techniques show a number of problems, including: generating large proportions of streamlines that do not accurately describe the underlying anatomy; extracting streamlines that are not supported by the underlying diffusion signal; and under-representing some fiber populations, among others. In this paper, we describe a novel autoencoder-based learning method to filter streamlines from diffusion MRI tractography, and hence, to obtain more reliable tractograms. Our method, dubbed FINTA (Filtering in Tractography using Autoencoders) uses raw, unlabeled tractograms to train the autoencoder, and to learn a robust representation of brain streamlines. Such an embedding is then used to filter undesired streamline samples using a nearest neighbor algorithm. Our experiments on both synthetic and in vivo human brain diffusion MRI tractography data obtain accuracy scores exceeding the 90\% threshold on the test set. Results reveal that FINTA has a superior filtering performance compared to conventional, anatomy-based methods, and the RecoBundles state-of-the-art method. Additionally, we demonstrate that FINTA can be applied to partial tractograms without requiring changes to the framework. We also show that the proposed method generalizes well across different tracking methods and datasets, and shortens significantly the computation time for large (>1 M streamlines) tractograms. Together, this work brings forward a new deep learning framework in tractography based on autoencoders, which offers a flexible and powerful method for white matter filtering and bundling that could enhance tractometry and connectivity analyses. 目前的大脑白质纤维跟踪技术显示出许多问题，包括：生成大比例的流线，无法准确描述底层解剖结构；提取底层扩散信号不支持的流线；以及某些纤维群体的代表性不足等。在本文中，我们描述了一种新颖的基于自动编码器的学习方法，用于从扩散 MRI 纤维束成像中过滤流线，从而获得更可靠的纤维束图。我们的方法被称为 FINTA（使用自动编码器进行纤维束成像过滤），使用原始的、未标记的纤维束图来训练自动编码器，并学习大脑流线的稳健表示。然后，使用最近邻算法，使用这种嵌入来过滤不需要的流线样本。我们对合成和体内人脑扩散 MRI 纤维束成像数据进行的实验在测试集上获得了超过 90% 阈值的准确度分数。结果表明，与传统的基于解剖学的方法和 RecoBundles 最先进的方法相比，FINTA 具有卓越的过滤性能。此外，我们还证明 FINTA 可以应用于部分束图，而无需更改框架。我们还表明，所提出的方法可以很好地推广到不同的跟踪方法和数据集，并显着缩短大型（> 1 M 流线）轨迹图的计算时间。总之，这项工作提出了一种基于自动编码器的纤维束成像的新深度学习框架，它为白质过滤和捆绑提供了一种灵活而强大的方法，可以增强纤维束测量和连接性分析。 本文提出了一种基于自编码器的深度学习框架FINTA，用于过滤扩散MRI纤维追踪中的无效流形，以提高白质纤维成像的可靠性。 Jon Haitz Legarreta,Laurent Petit,François Rheault,Guillaume Theaud,Carl Lemaire,Maxime Descoteaux,Pierre-Marc Jodoin eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.NC,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Thang Doan,Mehdi Bennani,Bogdan Mazoure,Guillaume Rabusseau,Pierre Alquier
title: A Theoretical Analysis of Catastrophic Forgetting through the NTK Overlap Matrix
title_zh: 通过NTK重叠矩阵对灾难性遗忘进行理论分析
comment: Accepted to AISTATS 2021. Keywords: continual learning, catastrophic forgetting, NTK regime, orthgonal gradient descent
comments: Accepted to AISTATS 2021. Keywords: continual learning, catastrophic forgetting, NTK regime, orthgonal gradient descent
abstract: Continual learning (CL) is a setting in which an agent has to learn from an incoming stream of data during its entire lifetime. Although major advances have been made in the field, one recurring problem which remains unsolved is that of Catastrophic Forgetting (CF). While the issue has been extensively studied empirically, little attention has been paid from a theoretical angle. In this paper, we show that the impact of CF increases as two tasks increasingly align. We introduce a measure of task similarity called the NTK overlap matrix which is at the core of CF. We analyze common projected gradient algorithms and demonstrate how they mitigate forgetting. Then, we propose a variant of Orthogonal Gradient Descent (OGD) which leverages structure of the data through Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Experiments support our theoretical findings and show how our method can help reduce CF on classical CL datasets.
summary: Continual learning (CL) is a setting in which an agent has to learn from an incoming stream of data during its entire lifetime. Although major advances have been made in the field, one recurring problem which remains unsolved is that of Catastrophic Forgetting (CF). While the issue has been extensively studied empirically, little attention has been paid from a theoretical angle. In this paper, we show that the impact of CF increases as two tasks increasingly align. We introduce a measure of task similarity called the NTK overlap matrix which is at the core of CF. We analyze common projected gradient algorithms and demonstrate how they mitigate forgetting. Then, we propose a variant of Orthogonal Gradient Descent (OGD) which leverages structure of the data through Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Experiments support our theoretical findings and show how our method can help reduce CF on classical CL datasets.
abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）是一种代理必须在其整个生命周期中从传入数据流中学习的设置。尽管该领域已经取得了重大进展，但一个反复出现的问题仍未解决，那就是灾难性遗忘（CF）。虽然这个问题已经得到了广泛的实证研究，但从理论角度却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们表明，随着两项任务日益一致，CF 的影响也会增加。我们引入了一种称为 NTK 重叠矩阵的任务相似性度量，它是 CF 的核心。我们分析常见的投影梯度算法并演示它们如何减轻遗忘。然后，我们提出了正交梯度下降（OGD）的一种变体，它通过主成分分析（PCA）利用数据结构。实验支持了我们的理论发现，并展示了我们的方法如何帮助减少经典 CL 数据集上的 CF。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入NTK重叠矩阵理论分析连续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，并提出基于主成分分析的正交梯度下降变体以减轻遗忘。
AI.motivation: 尽管连续学习领域取得进展，但灾难性遗忘的理论机制尚未明确，现有研究多为经验性分析，缺乏理论指导。
AI.method: 提出NTK重叠矩阵量化任务相似性，分析投影梯度算法的遗忘缓解机制，并结合主成分分析改进正交梯度下降方法。
AI.result: 实验验证理论分析有效性，新方法在经典连续学习数据集上显著降低灾难性遗忘程度。
AI.conclusion: NTK重叠矩阵是理解灾难性遗忘的关键理论工具，基于数据结构的正交梯度优化能有效提升连续学习性能。

authors_text: Liliane Momeni,Gül Varol,Samuel Albanie,Triantafyllos Afouras,Andrew Zisserman
title: Watch, read and lookup: learning to spot signs from multiple supervisors
title_zh: 观看、阅读和查找：学习识别多个主管的迹象
comment: Appears in: Asian Conference on Computer Vision 2020 (ACCV 2020) - Oral presentation. 29 pages
comments: Appears in: Asian Conference on Computer Vision 2020 (ACCV 2020) - Oral presentation. 29 pages
abstract: The focus of this work is sign spotting - given a video of an isolated sign, our task is to identify whether and where it has been signed in a continuous, co-articulated sign language video. To achieve this sign spotting task, we train a model using multiple types of available supervision by: (1) watching existing sparsely labelled footage; (2) reading associated subtitles (readily available translations of the signed content) which provide additional weak-supervision; (3) looking up words (for which no co-articulated labelled examples are available) in visual sign language dictionaries to enable novel sign spotting. These three tasks are integrated into a unified learning framework using the principles of Noise Contrastive Estimation and Multiple Instance Learning. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on low-shot sign spotting benchmarks. In addition, we contribute a machine-readable British Sign Language (BSL) dictionary dataset of isolated signs, BSLDict, to facilitate study of this task. The dataset, models and code are available at our project page.
summary: The focus of this work is sign spotting - given a video of an isolated sign, our task is to identify whether and where it has been signed in a continuous, co-articulated sign language video. To achieve this sign spotting task, we train a model using multiple types of available supervision by: (1) watching existing sparsely labelled footage; (2) reading associated subtitles (readily available translations of the signed content) which provide additional weak-supervision; (3) looking up words (for which no co-articulated labelled examples are available) in visual sign language dictionaries to enable novel sign spotting. These three tasks are integrated into a unified learning framework using the principles of Noise Contrastive Estimation and Multiple Instance Learning. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on low-shot sign spotting benchmarks. In addition, we contribute a machine-readable British Sign Language (BSL) dictionary dataset of isolated signs, BSLDict, to facilitate study of this task. The dataset, models and code are available at our project page.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是符号识别——给定一个孤立符号的视频，我们的任务是识别它是否在连续的、共同表达的手语视频中被签名以及在哪里被签名。为了实现这一标志识别任务，我们通过以下方式使用多种类型的可用监督来训练模型：（1）观看现有的稀疏标记的镜头； (2) 阅读提供额外弱监督的相关字幕（签名内容的现成翻译）； （3）在视觉手语词典中查找单词（没有可用的共同表达的标记示例）以实现新颖的符号识别。使用噪声对比估计和多实例学习的原理将这三个任务集成到统一的学习框架中。我们验证了我们的方法在低样本标志识别基准上的有效性。此外，我们还贡献了一个机器可读的英国手语（BSL）孤立符号词典数据集 BSLDict，以促进这项任务的研究。数据集、模型和代码可在我们的项目页面获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多源监督学习来定位连续手语视频中孤立手势的方法，结合稀疏标注视频、字幕文本和手语词典进行训练。
AI.motivation: 手语识别因标注数据稀缺且连续动作复杂而面临挑战，需探索利用多模态弱监督信号提升模型性能。
AI.method: 融合三种监督方式：1) 观察稀疏标注视频；2) 读取字幕文本作为弱监督；3) 查询手语词典获取新词。采用噪声对比估计与多实例学习框架整合多源信息。
AI.result: 在少样本手语定位基准测试中验证方法有效性，并贡献首个机器可读的英国手语孤立词数据集BSLDict。
AI.conclusion: 多监督源联合学习显著提升少样本手语定位能力，开放的数据集为相关研究提供重要资源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多源监督学习来定位连续手语视频中孤立手势的方法，结合稀疏标注视频、字幕文本和手语词典进行训练。
ai_content.motivation: 手语识别因标注数据稀缺且连续动作复杂而面临挑战，需探索利用多模态弱监督信号提升模型性能。
ai_content.method: 融合三种监督方式：1) 观察稀疏标注视频；2) 读取字幕文本作为弱监督；3) 查询手语词典获取新词。采用噪声对比估计与多实例学习框架整合多源信息。
ai_content.result: 在少样本手语定位基准测试中验证方法有效性，并贡献首个机器可读的英国手语孤立词数据集BSLDict。
ai_content.conclusion: 多监督源联合学习显著提升少样本手语定位能力，开放的数据集为相关研究提供重要资源。

search_text: Watch, read and lookup: learning to spot signs from multiple supervisors 观看、阅读和查找：学习识别多个主管的迹象 The focus of this work is sign spotting - given a video of an isolated sign, our task is to identify whether and where it has been signed in a continuous, co-articulated sign language video. To achieve this sign spotting task, we train a model using multiple types of available supervision by: (1) watching existing sparsely labelled footage; (2) reading associated subtitles (readily available translations of the signed content) which provide additional weak-supervision; (3) looking up words (for which no co-articulated labelled examples are available) in visual sign language dictionaries to enable novel sign spotting. These three tasks are integrated into a unified learning framework using the principles of Noise Contrastive Estimation and Multiple Instance Learning. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on low-shot sign spotting benchmarks. In addition, we contribute a machine-readable British Sign Language (BSL) dictionary dataset of isolated signs, BSLDict, to facilitate study of this task. The dataset, models and code are available at our project page. 这项工作的重点是符号识别——给定一个孤立符号的视频，我们的任务是识别它是否在连续的、共同表达的手语视频中被签名以及在哪里被签名。为了实现这一标志识别任务，我们通过以下方式使用多种类型的可用监督来训练模型：（1）观看现有的稀疏标记的镜头； (2) 阅读提供额外弱监督的相关字幕（签名内容的现成翻译）； （3）在视觉手语词典中查找单词（没有可用的共同表达的标记示例）以实现新颖的符号识别。使用噪声对比估计和多实例学习的原理将这三个任务集成到统一的学习框架中。我们验证了我们的方法在低样本标志识别基准上的有效性。此外，我们还贡献了一个机器可读的英国手语（BSL）孤立符号词典数据集 BSLDict，以促进这项任务的研究。数据集、模型和代码可在我们的项目页面获取。 本文提出一种通过多源监督学习来定位连续手语视频中孤立手势的方法，结合稀疏标注视频、字幕文本和手语词典进行训练。 Liliane Momeni,Gül Varol,Samuel Albanie,Triantafyllos Afouras,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

authors_text: Julián Del Gobbo,Rosana Matuk Herrera
title: Unconstrained Text Detection in Manga
title_zh: 漫画中的无约束文本检测
comment: Thesis, University of Buenos Aires. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2009.04042
comments: Thesis, University of Buenos Aires. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2009.04042
abstract: The detection and recognition of unconstrained text is an open problem in research. Text in comic books has unusual styles that raise many challenges for text detection. This work aims to identify text characters at a pixel level in a comic genre with highly sophisticated text styles: Japanese manga. To overcome the lack of a manga dataset with individual character level annotations, we create our own. Most of the literature in text detection use bounding box metrics, which are unsuitable for pixel-level evaluation. Thus, we implemented special metrics to evaluate performance. Using these resources, we designed and evaluated a deep network model, outperforming current methods for text detection in manga in most metrics.
summary: The detection and recognition of unconstrained text is an open problem in research. Text in comic books has unusual styles that raise many challenges for text detection. This work aims to identify text characters at a pixel level in a comic genre with highly sophisticated text styles: Japanese manga. To overcome the lack of a manga dataset with individual character level annotations, we create our own. Most of the literature in text detection use bounding box metrics, which are unsuitable for pixel-level evaluation. Thus, we implemented special metrics to evaluate performance. Using these resources, we designed and evaluated a deep network model, outperforming current methods for text detection in manga in most metrics.
abstract_zh: 无约束文本的检测和识别是研究中的一个悬而未决的问题。漫画书中的文本具有不寻常的风格，这给文本检测带来了许多挑战。这项工作旨在识别具有高度复杂文本样式的漫画类型（日本漫画）中像素级的文本字符。为了克服缺乏具有单个角色级别注释的漫画数据集的问题，我们创建了自己的漫画数据集。大多数文本检测文献都使用边界框度量，这不适合像素级评估。因此，我们实施了特殊的指标来评估绩效。利用这些资源，我们设计并评估了一个深度网络模型，在大多数指标上都优于当前漫画文本检测方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在漫画中进行像素级文本检测的方法，解决复杂文本风格带来的挑战
AI.motivation: 现有文本检测方法难以处理漫画中复杂多样的文本风格，且缺乏像素级评估的数据集和指标
AI.method: 构建带有字符级标注的漫画数据集，设计像素级评估指标，并开发深度学习模型进行文本检测
AI.result: 在多个评估指标上优于现有漫画文本检测方法
AI.conclusion: 通过自建数据集和新指标，提出有效模型，推动了漫画文本检测的发展

authors_text: Aman Kamboj,Rajneesh Rani,Aditya Nigam,Ranjeet Ranjan Jha
title: UESegNet: Context Aware Unconstrained ROI Segmentation Networks for Ear Biometric
title_zh: UESegNet：用于耳朵生物识别的上下文感知无约束 ROI 分割网络
abstract: Biometric-based personal authentication systems have seen a strong demand mainly due to the increasing concern in various privacy and security applications. Although the use of each biometric trait is problem dependent, the human ear has been found to have enough discriminating characteristics to allow its use as a strong biometric measure. To locate an ear in a 2D side face image is a challenging task, numerous existing approaches have achieved significant performance, but the majority of studies are based on the constrained environment. However, ear biometrics possess a great level of difficulties in the unconstrained environment, where pose, scale, occlusion, illuminations, background clutter etc. varies to a great extent. To address the problem of ear localization in the wild, we have proposed two high-performance region of interest (ROI) segmentation models UESegNet-1 and UESegNet-2, which are fundamentally based on deep convolutional neural networks and primarily uses contextual information to localize ear in the unconstrained environment. Additionally, we have applied state-of-the-art deep learning models viz; FRCNN (Faster Region Proposal Network) and SSD (Single Shot MultiBox Detecor) for ear localization task. To test the model's generalization, they are evaluated on six different benchmark datasets viz; IITD, IITK, USTB-DB3, UND-E, UND-J2 and UBEAR, all of which contain challenging images. The performance of the models is compared on the basis of object detection performance measure parameters such as IOU (Intersection Over Union), Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score. It has been observed that the proposed models UESegNet-1 and UESegNet-2 outperformed the FRCNN and SSD at higher values of IOUs i.e. an accuracy of 100\% is achieved at IOU 0.5 on majority of the databases.

However, ear biometrics possess a great level of difficulties in the unconstrained environment, where pose, scale, occlusion, illuminations, background clutter etc. varies to a great extent. To address the problem of ear localization in the wild, we have proposed two high-performance region of interest (ROI) segmentation models UESegNet-1 and UESegNet-2, which are fundamentally based on deep convolutional neural networks and primarily uses contextual information to localize ear in the unconstrained environment. Additionally, we have applied state-of-the-art deep learning models viz; FRCNN (Faster Region Proposal Network) and SSD (Single Shot MultiBox Detecor) for ear localization task. To test the model's generalization, they are evaluated on six different benchmark datasets viz; IITD, IITK, USTB-DB3, UND-E, UND-J2 and UBEAR, all of which contain challenging images. The performance of the models is compared on the basis of object detection performance measure parameters such as IOU (Intersection Over Union), Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score. It has been observed that the proposed models UESegNet-1 and UESegNet-2 outperformed the FRCNN and SSD at higher values of IOUs i.e. an accuracy of 100\% is achieved at IOU 0.5 on majority of the databases.
abstract_zh: 基于生物识别的个人认证系统的需求强劲，主要是由于人们对各种隐私和安全应用的日益关注。尽管每种生物特征的使用都取决于问题，但已发现人耳具有足够的辨别特征，可以将其用作强大的生物特征测量。在二维侧脸图像中定位耳朵是一项具有挑战性的任务，许多现有方法已经取得了显着的性能，但大多数研究都是基于受限环境。然而，耳朵生物识别在无约束的环境中存在很大的困难，其中姿势、尺度、遮挡、照明、背景杂波等变化很大。为了解决野外耳朵定位问题，我们提出了两种高性能感兴趣区域（ROI）分割模型UESegNet-1和UESegNet-2，它们基本上基于深度卷积神经网络，主要使用上下文信息在无约束环境中定位耳朵。此外，我们应用了最先进的深度学习模型，即； FRCNN（更快的区域提议网络）和 SSD（单次多框检测器）用于耳朵定位任务。为了测试模型的泛化性，他们在六个不同的基准数据集上进行了评估，即： IITD、IITK、USTB-DB3、UND-E、UND-J2 和 UBEAR，所有这些都包含具有挑战性的图像。根据 IOU（并集交集）、准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1 分数等目标检测性能测量参数对模型的性能进行比较。据观察，所提出的模型 UESegNet-1 和 UESegNet-2 在较高 IOU 值下优于 FRCNN 和 SSD，即在大多数数据库上以 IOU 0.5 实现 100% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于深度卷积神经网络的上下文感知ROI分割模型UESegNet-1和UESegNet-2，用于解决无约束环境下耳部生物特征定位的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有耳部定位方法多依赖受限环境，难以应对真实场景中的姿态变化、光照差异、遮挡等复杂因素，亟需鲁棒性更强的模型。
AI.method: 设计融合上下文信息的深度CNN架构，结合FRCNN和SSD模型进行对比实验，在六个基准数据集上通过IOU、准确率等指标评估性能。
AI.result: UESegNet系列模型在多数数据集上以IOU 0.5标准达到100%准确率，显著优于FRCNN和SSD等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的上下文感知分割网络有效提升了无约束环境下耳部定位的准确性，为生物特征识别提供了更可靠的解决方案。

To test the model's generalization, they are evaluated on six different benchmark datasets viz; IITD, IITK, USTB-DB3, UND-E, UND-J2 and UBEAR, all of which contain challenging images. The performance of the models is compared on the basis of object detection performance measure parameters such as IOU (Intersection Over Union), Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score. It has been observed that the proposed models UESegNet-1 and UESegNet-2 outperformed the FRCNN and SSD at higher values of IOUs i.e. an accuracy of 100\% is achieved at IOU 0.5 on majority of the databases. 基于生物识别的个人认证系统的需求强劲，主要是由于人们对各种隐私和安全应用的日益关注。尽管每种生物特征的使用都取决于问题，但已发现人耳具有足够的辨别特征，可以将其用作强大的生物特征测量。在二维侧脸图像中定位耳朵是一项具有挑战性的任务，许多现有方法已经取得了显着的性能，但大多数研究都是基于受限环境。然而，耳朵生物识别在无约束的环境中存在很大的困难，其中姿势、尺度、遮挡、照明、背景杂波等变化很大。为了解决野外耳朵定位问题，我们提出了两种高性能感兴趣区域（ROI）分割模型UESegNet-1和UESegNet-2，它们基本上基于深度卷积神经网络，主要使用上下文信息在无约束环境中定位耳朵。此外，我们应用了最先进的深度学习模型，即； FRCNN（更快的区域提议网络）和 SSD（单次多框检测器）用于耳朵定位任务。为了测试模型的泛化性，他们在六个不同的基准数据集上进行了评估，即： IITD、IITK、USTB-DB3、UND-E、UND-J2 和 UBEAR，所有这些都包含具有挑战性的图像。根据 IOU（并集交集）、准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1 分数等目标检测性能测量参数对模型的性能进行比较。据观察，所提出的模型 UESegNet-1 和 UESegNet-2 在较高 IOU 值下优于 FRCNN 和 SSD，即在大多数数据库上以 IOU 0.5 实现 100% 的准确率。 本文提出两种基于深度卷积神经网络的上下文感知ROI分割模型UESegNet-1和UESegNet-2，用于解决无约束环境下耳部生物特征定位的挑战。 Aman Kamboj,Rajneesh Rani,Aditya Nigam,Ranjeet Ranjan Jha cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Adrian Shajkofci,Michael Liebling
title: Free annotated data for deep learning in microscopy? A hitchhiker's guide
title_zh: 用于显微镜深度学习的免费注释数据？搭便车指南
abstract: In microscopy, the time burden and cost of acquiring and annotating large datasets that many deep learning models take as a prerequisite, often appears to make these methods impractical. Can this requirement for annotated data be relaxed? Is it possible to borrow the knowledge gathered from datasets in other application fields and leverage it for microscopy? Here, we aim to provide an overview of methods that have recently emerged to successfully train learning-based methods in bio-microscopy.
summary: In microscopy, the time burden and cost of acquiring and annotating large datasets that many deep learning models take as a prerequisite, often appears to make these methods impractical. Can this requirement for annotated data be relaxed? Is it possible to borrow the knowledge gathered from datasets in other application fields and leverage it for microscopy? Here, we aim to provide an overview of methods that have recently emerged to successfully train learning-based methods in bio-microscopy.
abstract_zh: 在显微镜中，获取和注释大型数据集（许多深度学习模型将其作为先决条件）的时间负担和成本往往使这些方法变得不切实际。对于带注释的数据的这个要求可以放宽吗？是否可以借用从其他应用领域的数据集中收集的知识并将其用于显微镜检查？在这里，我们的目的是概述最近出现的成功训练生物显微镜中基于学习的方法的方法。

AI.tldr: 综述无需大量标注数据的深度学习方法在生物显微镜中的应用
AI.motivation: 解决显微镜领域标注数据获取困难的问题，探索跨领域知识迁移的可行性
AI.method: 通过综述迁移学习、自监督学习和弱监督学习等方法，总结在生物显微镜中训练深度学习模型的有效策略
AI.result: 表明这些方法能有效减少对标注数据的依赖，提升模型性能，降低数据获取成本
AI.conclusion: 结论指出跨领域知识迁移和自监督学习是可行的替代方案，未来需进一步优化方法和验证效果

authors_text: Gareth P. Jones,James M. Hickey,Pietro G. Di Stefano,Charanpal Dhanjal,Laura C. Stoddart,Vlasios Vasileiou
title: Metrics and methods for a systematic comparison of fairness-aware machine learning algorithms
title_zh: 用于系统比较公平感知机器学习算法的指标和方法
abstract: Understanding and removing bias from the decisions made by machine learning models is essential to avoid discrimination against unprivileged groups. Despite recent progress in algorithmic fairness, there is still no clear answer as to which bias-mitigation approaches are most effective. Evaluation strategies are typically use-case specific, rely on data with unclear bias, and employ a fixed policy to convert model outputs to decision outcomes. To address these problems, we performed a systematic comparison of a number of popular fairness algorithms applicable to supervised classification. Our study is the most comprehensive of its kind. It utilizes three real and four synthetic datasets, and two different ways of converting model outputs to decisions. It considers fairness, predictive-performance, calibration quality, and speed of 28 different modelling pipelines, corresponding to both fairness-unaware and fairness-aware algorithms. We found that fairness-unaware algorithms typically fail to produce adequately fair models and that the simplest algorithms are not necessarily the fairest ones. We also found that fairness-aware algorithms can induce fairness without material drops in predictive power. Finally, we found that dataset idiosyncracies (e.g., degree of intrinsic unfairness, nature of correlations) do affect the performance of fairness-aware approaches. Our results allow the practitioner to narrow down the approach(es) they would like to adopt without having to know in advance their fairness requirements.
summary: Understanding and removing bias from the decisions made by machine learning models is essential to avoid discrimination against unprivileged groups. Despite recent progress in algorithmic fairness, there is still no clear answer as to which bias-mitigation approaches are most effective. Evaluation strategies are typically use-case specific, rely on data with unclear bias, and employ a fixed policy to convert model outputs to decision outcomes. To address these problems, we performed a systematic comparison of a number of popular fairness algorithms applicable to supervised classification. Our study is the most comprehensive of its kind. It utilizes three real and four synthetic datasets, and two different ways of converting model outputs to decisions. It considers fairness, predictive-performance, calibration quality, and speed of 28 different modelling pipelines, corresponding to both fairness-unaware and fairness-aware algorithms. We found that fairness-unaware algorithms typically fail to produce adequately fair models and that the simplest algorithms are not necessarily the fairest ones. We also found that fairness-aware algorithms can induce fairness without material drops in predictive power. Finally, we found that dataset idiosyncracies (e.g., degree of intrinsic unfairness, nature of correlations) do affect the performance of fairness-aware approaches. Our results allow the practitioner to narrow down the approach(es) they would like to adopt without having to know in advance their fairness requirements.
abstract_zh: 理解并消除机器学习模型决策中的偏见对于避免对弱势群体的歧视至关重要。尽管最近在算法公平性方面取得了进展，但对于哪种偏见缓解方法最有效仍然没有明确的答案。评估策略通常是特定于用例的，依赖于偏差不明确的数据，并采用固定策略将模型输出转换为决策结果。为了解决这些问题，我们对许多适用于监督分类的流行公平算法进行了系统比较。我们的研究是同类研究中最全面的。它利用三个真实数据集和四个合成数据集，以及将模型输出转换为决策的两种不同方法。它考虑了 28 种不同建模流程的公平性、预测性能、校准质量和速度，对应于不公平感知和公平感知算法。我们发现，不具备公平性的算法通常无法生成足够公平的模型，并且最简单的算法不一定是最公平的算法。我们还发现，公平感知算法可以在预测能力没有实质性下降的情况下引入公平性。最后，我们发现数据集的特质（例如，内在不公平的程度、相关性的性质）确实会影响公平感知方法的性能。我们的结果使从业者能够缩小他们想要采用的方法的范围，而不必提前知道他们的公平性要求。

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了多种公平感知机器学习算法的指标和方法，旨在确定最有效的偏见缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 现有算法公平性评估缺乏统一标准，依赖特定场景且数据偏见不明确，需全面比较不同算法效果。
AI.method: 使用3个真实数据集和4个合成数据集，结合两种决策转换方式，评估28种建模流程的公平性、预测性能等指标。
AI.result: 公平无关算法难以生成公平模型，简单算法未必最公平；公平感知算法可提升公平性而不过度牺牲预测能力，但数据集特性会影响效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果帮助从业者根据实际需求选择合适算法，无需预先明确具体公平性要求。

authors_text: Vineet Goyal,Garud Iyengar,Rajan Udwani
title: Online Allocation of Reusable Resources via Algorithms Guided by Fluid Approximations
title_zh: 通过流体近似引导的算法在线分配可重用资源
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.02430
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.02430
abstract: We consider the problem of online allocation (matching and assortments) of reusable resources where customers arrive sequentially in an adversarial fashion and allocated resources are used or rented for a stochastic duration that is drawn independently from known distributions. Focusing on the case of large inventory, we give an algorithm that is $(1-1/e)$ competitive for general usage distributions. At the heart of our result is the notion of a relaxed online algorithm that is only subjected to fluid approximations of the stochastic elements in the problem. The output of this algorithm serves as a guide for the final algorithm. This leads to a principled approach for seamlessly addressing stochastic elements (such as reusability, customer choice, and combinations thereof) in online resource allocation problems, that may be useful more broadly.
summary: We consider the problem of online allocation (matching and assortments) of reusable resources where customers arrive sequentially in an adversarial fashion and allocated resources are used or rented for a stochastic duration that is drawn independently from known distributions. Focusing on the case of large inventory, we give an algorithm that is $(1-1/e)$ competitive for general usage distributions. At the heart of our result is the notion of a relaxed online algorithm that is only subjected to fluid approximations of the stochastic elements in the problem. The output of this algorithm serves as a guide for the final algorithm. This leads to a principled approach for seamlessly addressing stochastic elements (such as reusability, customer choice, and combinations thereof) in online resource allocation problems, that may be useful more broadly.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑可重用资源的在线分配（匹配和分类）问题，其中客户以对抗方式顺序到达，并且分配的资源在独立于已知分布的随机持续时间内使用或租用。着眼于大库存的情况，我们给出了一种对于一般使用分布具有 $(1-1/e)$ 竞争力的算法。我们结果的核心是宽松在线算法的概念，该算法仅受问题中随机元素的流体近似影响。该算法的输出可作为最终算法的指导。这导致了一种无缝解决在线资源分配问题中的随机因素（例如可重用性、客户选择及其组合）的原则性方法，该方法可能具有更广泛的用途。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在对抗性客户到达和随机资源使用时间的场景下，如何在线分配可重复使用资源，并提出了一种基于流体近似的算法，实现了(1-1/e)的竞争性。
AI.motivation: 现有在线资源分配算法难以同时处理对抗性客户到达和随机资源使用时间的复杂性，尤其在大规模库存场景下缺乏高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计一种放松的在线算法，通过流体近似处理随机元素（如资源使用时长分布），将结果转化为指导实际资源分配的策略。
AI.result: 提出的算法在一般使用分布下达到(1-1/e)的竞争比，为处理随机性和对抗性场景下的资源分配提供了理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在线资源分配问题中融合随机性因素（如可重复使用性、客户选择）提供了系统性框架，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: Online Allocation of Reusable Resources via Algorithms Guided by Fluid Approximations 通过流体近似引导的算法在线分配可重用资源 We consider the problem of online allocation (matching and assortments) of reusable resources where customers arrive sequentially in an adversarial fashion and allocated resources are used or rented for a stochastic duration that is drawn independently from known distributions. Focusing on the case of large inventory, we give an algorithm that is $(1-1/e)$ competitive for general usage distributions. At the heart of our result is the notion of a relaxed online algorithm that is only subjected to fluid approximations of the stochastic elements in the problem. The output of this algorithm serves as a guide for the final algorithm. This leads to a principled approach for seamlessly addressing stochastic elements (such as reusability, customer choice, and combinations thereof) in online resource allocation problems, that may be useful more broadly. 我们考虑可重用资源的在线分配（匹配和分类）问题，其中客户以对抗方式顺序到达，并且分配的资源在独立于已知分布的随机持续时间内使用或租用。着眼于大库存的情况，我们给出了一种对于一般使用分布具有 $(1-1/e)$ 竞争力的算法。我们结果的核心是宽松在线算法的概念，该算法仅受问题中随机元素的流体近似影响。该算法的输出可作为最终算法的指导。这导致了一种无缝解决在线资源分配问题中的随机因素（例如可重用性、客户选择及其组合）的原则性方法，该方法可能具有更广泛的用途。 本文研究了在对抗性客户到达和随机资源使用时间的场景下，如何在线分配可重复使用资源，并提出了一种基于流体近似的算法，实现了(1-1/e)的竞争性。 Vineet Goyal,Garud Iyengar,Rajan Udwani cs.DS

authors_text: Abolfazl Farahani,Sahar Voghoei,Khaled Rasheed,Hamid R. Arabnia
title: A Brief Review of Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 领域适应的简要回顾
abstract: Classical machine learning assumes that the training and test sets come from the same distributions. Therefore, a model learned from the labeled training data is expected to perform well on the test data. However, This assumption may not always hold in real-world applications where the training and the test data fall from different distributions, due to many factors, e.g., collecting the training and test sets from different sources, or having an out-dated training set due to the change of data over time. In this case, there would be a discrepancy across domain distributions, and naively applying the trained model on the new dataset may cause degradation in the performance. Domain adaptation is a sub-field within machine learning that aims to cope with these types of problems by aligning the disparity between domains such that the trained model can be generalized into the domain of interest. This paper focuses on unsupervised domain adaptation, where the labels are only available in the source domain. It addresses the categorization of domain adaptation from different viewpoints. Besides, It presents some successful shallow and deep domain adaptation approaches that aim to deal with domain adaptation problems.
summary: Classical machine learning assumes that the training and test sets come from the same distributions. Therefore, a model learned from the labeled training data is expected to perform well on the test data. However, This assumption may not always hold in real-world applications where the training and the test data fall from different distributions, due to many factors, e.g., collecting the training and test sets from different sources, or having an out-dated training set due to the change of data over time. In this case, there would be a discrepancy across domain distributions, and naively applying the trained model on the new dataset may cause degradation in the performance. Domain adaptation is a sub-field within machine learning that aims to cope with these types of problems by aligning the disparity between domains such that the trained model can be generalized into the domain of interest. This paper focuses on unsupervised domain adaptation, where the labels are only available in the source domain. It addresses the categorization of domain adaptation from different viewpoints. Besides, It presents some successful shallow and deep domain adaptation approaches that aim to deal with domain adaptation problems.
abstract_zh: 经典机器学习假设训练集和测试集来自相同的分布。因此，从标记的训练数据中学习的模型预计在测试数据上表现良好。然而，由于许多因素，例如从不同来源收集训练集和测试集，或者由于数据随时间的变化而导致训练集过时，这种假设在实际应用中可能并不总是成立，其中训练和测试数据来自不同的分布。在这种情况下，域分布之间会存在差异，并且在新数据集上天真地应用经过训练的模型可能会导致性能下降。领域适应是机器学习中的一个子领域，旨在通过调整领域之间的差异来应对这些类型的问题，以便训练后的模型可以推广到感兴趣的领域。本文重点关注无监督域适应，其中标签仅在源域中可用。它从不同的角度解决了领域适应的分类。此外，它还提出了一些成功的浅域和深层域适应方法，旨在解决域适应问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了领域自适应方法，重点探讨了无监督领域自适应的分类及浅层和深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习假设训练集和测试集来自相同分布，但实际应用中数据分布可能因来源或时间变化而不同，导致模型性能下降，需通过领域自适应解决分布差异问题。
AI.method: 从不同视角分类领域自适应问题，并总结浅层和深度学习方法，如特征对齐、对抗训练等技术。
AI.result: 系统梳理了领域自适应的研究方向，介绍了多种有效应对分布差异的算法框架。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应是解决跨域数据分布差异的关键技术，无监督方法在实际应用中具有重要价值，但仍需进一步优化。

authors_text: Bradley Segal,David M. Rubin,Grace Rubin,Adam Pantanowitz
title: Evaluating the Clinical Realism of Synthetic Chest X-Rays Generated Using Progressively Growing GANs
title_zh: 评估使用逐渐生长的 GAN 生成的合成胸部 X 射线的临床真实性
abstract: Chest x-rays are a vital tool in the workup of many patients. Similar to most medical imaging modalities, they are profoundly multi-modal and are capable of visualising a variety of combinations of conditions. There is an ever pressing need for greater quantities of labelled data to develop new diagnostic tools, however this is in direct opposition to concerns regarding patient confidentiality which constrains access through permission requests and ethics approvals. Previous work has sought to address these concerns by creating class-specific GANs that synthesise images to augment training data. These approaches cannot be scaled as they introduce computational trade offs between model size and class number which places fixed limits on the quality that such generates can achieve. We address this concern by introducing latent class optimisation which enables efficient, multi-modal sampling from a GAN and with which we synthesise a large archive of labelled generates. We apply a PGGAN to the task of unsupervised x-ray synthesis and have radiologists evaluate the clinical realism of the resultant samples. We provide an in depth review of the properties of varying pathologies seen on generates as well as an overview of the extent of disease diversity captured by the model. We validate the application of the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) to measure the quality of x-ray generates and find that they are similar to other high resolution tasks. We quantify x-ray clinical realism by asking radiologists to distinguish between real and fake scans and find that generates are more likely to be classed as real than by chance, but there is still progress required to achieve true realism. We confirm these findings by evaluating synthetic classification model performance on real scans. We conclude by discussing the limitations of PGGAN generates and how to achieve controllable, realistic generates.

Similar to most medical imaging modalities, they are profoundly multi-modal and are capable of visualising a variety of combinations of conditions. There is an ever pressing need for greater quantities of labelled data to develop new diagnostic tools, however this is in direct opposition to concerns regarding patient confidentiality which constrains access through permission requests and ethics approvals. Previous work has sought to address these concerns by creating class-specific GANs that synthesise images to augment training data. These approaches cannot be scaled as they introduce computational trade offs between model size and class number which places fixed limits on the quality that such generates can achieve. We address this concern by introducing latent class optimisation which enables efficient, multi-modal sampling from a GAN and with which we synthesise a large archive of labelled generates. We apply a PGGAN to the task of unsupervised x-ray synthesis and have radiologists evaluate the clinical realism of the resultant samples. We provide an in depth review of the properties of varying pathologies seen on generates as well as an overview of the extent of disease diversity captured by the model. We validate the application of the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) to measure the quality of x-ray generates and find that they are similar to other high resolution tasks. We conclude by discussing the limitations of PGGAN generates and how to achieve controllable, realistic generates.
abstract_zh: 胸部 X 光检查是许多患者检查的重要工具。与大多数医学成像模式类似，它们具有深刻的多模式性，并且能够可视化各种条件的组合。人们迫切需要更多的标记数据来开发新的诊断工具，但这与对患者保密性的担忧直接相反，因为患者保密性限制了通过许可请求和道德批准的访问。之前的工作试图通过创建特定类别的 GAN 来解决这些问题，这些 GAN 可以合成图像来增强训练数据。这些方法无法扩展，因为它们引入了模型大小和类别数量之间的计算权衡，这对此类生成可以实现的质量设置了固定限制。我们通过引入潜在类优化来解决这个问题，该优化可以从 GAN 中进行高效、多模式采样，并用它来合成大量标记生成的档案。我们将 PGGAN 应用于无监督 X 射线合成任务，并让放射科医生评估所得样本的临床真实性。我们深入回顾了生成物上看到的不同病理学的特性，并对模型捕获的疾病多样性的程度进行了概述。我们验证了 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 测量 X 射线生成质量的应用，发现它们与其他高分辨率任务类似。我们通过要求放射科医生区分真扫描和假扫描来量化 X 射线临床真实感，并发现生成的图像更有可能被归类为真实的而不是偶然的，但要实现真正的真实感仍然需要取得进展。我们通过评估真实扫描的合成分类模型性能来证实这些发现。最后，我们讨论了 PGGAN 生成的局限性以及如何实现可控、真实的生成。

AI.tldr: 本文使用渐进增长生成对抗网络（PGGAN）生成合成胸部X光片，并评估其临床真实性。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像数据因隐私问题难以获取，需通过合成数据增强诊断工具训练，但现有方法存在模型规模与类别数量的权衡限制。
AI.method: 引入潜在类别优化方法，通过PGGAN实现多模态采样生成大规模标注合成数据，并由放射科医生评估临床真实性，结合FID指标和分类模型验证生成效果。
AI.result: 合成影像被放射科医生误判为真实概率高于随机猜测，但尚未达到完全真实；FID指标显示其质量与高分辨率任务相当，分类模型在真实数据上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: PGGAN生成的合成影像存在局限性，需进一步研究可控且高度真实的生成方法以提升临床应用价值。

We quantify x-ray clinical realism by asking radiologists to distinguish between real and fake scans and find that generates are more likely to be classed as real than by chance, but there is still progress required to achieve true realism. We confirm these findings by evaluating synthetic classification model performance on real scans. We conclude by discussing the limitations of PGGAN generates and how to achieve controllable, realistic generates. 胸部 X 光检查是许多患者检查的重要工具。与大多数医学成像模式类似，它们具有深刻的多模式性，并且能够可视化各种条件的组合。人们迫切需要更多的标记数据来开发新的诊断工具，但这与对患者保密性的担忧直接相反，因为患者保密性限制了通过许可请求和道德批准的访问。之前的工作试图通过创建特定类别的 GAN 来解决这些问题，这些 GAN 可以合成图像来增强训练数据。这些方法无法扩展，因为它们引入了模型大小和类别数量之间的计算权衡，这对此类生成可以实现的质量设置了固定限制。我们通过引入潜在类优化来解决这个问题，该优化可以从 GAN 中进行高效、多模式采样，并用它来合成大量标记生成的档案。我们将 PGGAN 应用于无监督 X 射线合成任务，并让放射科医生评估所得样本的临床真实性。我们深入回顾了生成物上看到的不同病理学的特性，并对模型捕获的疾病多样性的程度进行了概述。我们验证了 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 测量 X 射线生成质量的应用，发现它们与其他高分辨率任务类似。我们通过要求放射科医生区分真扫描和假扫描来量化 X 射线临床真实感，并发现生成的图像更有可能被归类为真实的而不是偶然的，但要实现真正的真实感仍然需要取得进展。我们通过评估真实扫描的合成分类模型性能来证实这些发现。最后，我们讨论了 PGGAN 生成的局限性以及如何实现可控、真实的生成。 本文使用渐进增长生成对抗网络（PGGAN）生成合成胸部X光片，并评估其临床真实性。 Bradley Segal,David M. Rubin,Grace Rubin,Adam Pantanowitz eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao Sun,Nick Pears,Hang Dai
title: A Human Ear Reconstruction Autoencoder
title_zh: 人耳重建自动编码器
abstract: The ear, as an important part of the human head, has received much less attention compared to the human face in the area of computer vision. Inspired by previous work on monocular 3D face reconstruction using an autoencoder structure to achieve self-supervised learning, we aim to utilise such a framework to tackle the 3D ear reconstruction task, where more subtle and difficult curves and features are present on the 2D ear input images. Our Human Ear Reconstruction Autoencoder (HERA) system predicts 3D ear poses and shape parameters for 3D ear meshes, without any supervision to these parameters. To make our approach cover the variance for in-the-wild images, even grayscale images, we propose an in-the-wild ear colour model. The constructed end-to-end self-supervised model is then evaluated both with 2D landmark localisation performance and the appearance of the reconstructed 3D ears.
summary: The ear, as an important part of the human head, has received much less attention compared to the human face in the area of computer vision. Inspired by previous work on monocular 3D face reconstruction using an autoencoder structure to achieve self-supervised learning, we aim to utilise such a framework to tackle the 3D ear reconstruction task, where more subtle and difficult curves and features are present on the 2D ear input images. Our Human Ear Reconstruction Autoencoder (HERA) system predicts 3D ear poses and shape parameters for 3D ear meshes, without any supervision to these parameters. To make our approach cover the variance for in-the-wild images, even grayscale images, we propose an in-the-wild ear colour model. The constructed end-to-end self-supervised model is then evaluated both with 2D landmark localisation performance and the appearance of the reconstructed 3D ears.
abstract_zh: 耳朵作为人类头部的重要组成部分，在计算机视觉领域相比人脸受到的关注要少得多。受到之前使用自动编码器结构实现自监督学习的单目 3D 人脸重建工作的启发，我们的目标是利用这样的框架来解决 3D 耳朵重建任务，其中 2D 耳朵输入图像上存在更微妙和困难的曲线和特征。我们的人耳重建自动编码器 (HERA) 系统可预测 3D 耳朵网格的 3D 耳朵姿势和形状参数，而无需对这些参数进行任何监督。为了使我们的方法涵盖野外图像（甚至灰度图像）的方差，我们提出了野外耳朵颜色模型。然后使用 2D 地标定位性能和重建的 3D 耳朵的外观来评估构建的端到端自监督模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的自监督自动编码器（HERA），用于从2D耳部图像中重建3D耳部形状和姿态。
AI.motivation: 相比人脸，耳部在计算机视觉中研究不足，且其复杂曲面特征更难建模，需探索新方法实现无监督3D重建。
AI.method: 构建HERA系统，通过自监督学习预测3D耳部参数，并设计野外耳部颜色模型以适应不同光照和灰度图像。
AI.result: HERA在2D关键点定位和3D耳部重建外观上均取得有效结果，验证了方法对复杂曲面和无监督学习的适应性。
AI.conclusion: HERA为耳部重建提供了新框架，证明了自监督学习在复杂生物结构建模中的潜力，并扩展了模型对真实场景图像的适应能力。

authors_text: Amir Hossein Estiri,Mohammad Reza Sabramooz,Ali Banaei,Amir Hossein Dehghan,Benyamin Jamialahmadi,Mahdi Jafari Siavoshani
title: A Variational Auto-Encoder Approach for Image Transmission in Wireless Channel
title_zh: 无线信道图像传输的变分自编码器方法
abstract: Recent advancements in information technology and the widespread use of the Internet have led to easier access to data worldwide. As a result, transmitting data through noisy channels is inevitable. Reducing the size of data and protecting it during transmission from corruption due to channel noises are two classical problems in communication and information theory. Recently, inspired by deep neural networks' success in different tasks, many works have been done to address these two problems using deep learning techniques. In this paper, we investigate the performance of variational auto-encoders and compare the results with standard auto-encoders. Our findings suggest that variational auto-encoders are more robust to channel degradation than auto-encoders. Furthermore, we have tried to excel in the human perceptual quality of reconstructed images by using perception-based error metrics as our network's loss function. To this end, we use the structural similarity index (SSIM) as a perception-based metric to optimize the proposed neural network. Our experiments demonstrate that the SSIM metric visually improves the quality of the reconstructed images at the receiver.
summary: Recent advancements in information technology and the widespread use of the Internet have led to easier access to data worldwide. As a result, transmitting data through noisy channels is inevitable. Reducing the size of data and protecting it during transmission from corruption due to channel noises are two classical problems in communication and information theory. Recently, inspired by deep neural networks' success in different tasks, many works have been done to address these two problems using deep learning techniques. In this paper, we investigate the performance of variational auto-encoders and compare the results with standard auto-encoders. Our findings suggest that variational auto-encoders are more robust to channel degradation than auto-encoders. Furthermore, we have tried to excel in the human perceptual quality of reconstructed images by using perception-based error metrics as our network's loss function. To this end, we use the structural similarity index (SSIM) as a perception-based metric to optimize the proposed neural network. Our experiments demonstrate that the SSIM metric visually improves the quality of the reconstructed images at the receiver.
abstract_zh: 信息技术的最新进步和互联网的广泛使用使得在全世界范围内访问数据变得更加容易。因此，通过噪声信道传输数据是不可避免的。减少数据大小并保护数据在传输过程中免受信道噪声的损坏是通信和信息论中的两个经典问题。最近，受到深度神经网络在不同任务中成功的启发，人们已经做了许多工作来利用深度学习技术来解决这两个问题。在本文中，我们研究了变分自动编码器的性能，并将结果与​​标准自动编码器进行了比较。我们的研究结果表明，变分自动编码器比自动编码器对通道降级具有更强的鲁棒性。此外，我们试图通过使用基于感知的误差指标作为我们网络的损失函数，在重建图像的人类感知质量方面表现出色。为此，我们使用结构相似性指数（SSIM）作为基于感知的度量来优化所提出的神经网络。我们的实验表明，SSIM 指标在视觉上提高了接收器处重建图像的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无线信道中使用变分自编码器（VAE）进行图像传输的方法，以提高抗噪声能力和图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 无线信道传输中存在噪声干扰，传统数据压缩和纠错方法难以兼顾效率与质量，需探索基于深度学习的新方案。
AI.method: 比较变分自编码器与标准自编码器性能，并引入结构相似性指数（SSIM）作为感知驱动的损失函数优化网络。
AI.result: 实验表明VAE比标准自编码器更抗信道退化，且SSIM优化显著提升了接收端图像的视觉感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 变分自编码器结合感知损失函数可有效提升无线图像传输的鲁棒性与重建图像的视觉效果。
