authors_text: Yajun An,Zachary Golden,Tarka Wilcox,Renzhi Cao
title: High Definition image classification in Geoscience using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习进行地球科学中的高清图像分类
abstract: High Definition (HD) digital photos taken with drones are widely used in the study of Geoscience. However, blurry images are often taken in collected data, and it takes a lot of time and effort to distinguish clear images from blurry ones. In this work, we apply Machine learning techniques, such as Support Vector Machine (SVM) and Neural Network (NN) to classify HD images in Geoscience as clear and blurry, and therefore automate data cleaning in Geoscience. We compare the results of classification based on features abstracted from several mathematical models. Some of the implementation of our machine learning tool is freely available at: https://github.com/zachgolden/geoai.
summary: High Definition (HD) digital photos taken with drones are widely used in the study of Geoscience. However, blurry images are often taken in collected data, and it takes a lot of time and effort to distinguish clear images from blurry ones. In this work, we apply Machine learning techniques, such as Support Vector Machine (SVM) and Neural Network (NN) to classify HD images in Geoscience as clear and blurry, and therefore automate data cleaning in Geoscience. We compare the results of classification based on features abstracted from several mathematical models. Some of the implementation of our machine learning tool is freely available at: https://github.com/zachgolden/geoai.
abstract_zh: 无人机拍摄的高清（HD）数码照片广泛应用于地球科学研究。然而，在收集的数据中经常出现模糊的图像，并且需要花费大量的时间和精力来区分清晰的图像和模糊的图像。在这项工作中，我们应用支持向量机（SVM）和神经网络（NN）等机器学习技术将地球科学中的高清图像分类为清晰和模糊，从而实现地球科学中数据清洗的自动化。我们比较基于从几个数学模型提取的特征的分类结果。我们的机器学习工具的一些实现可以免费获得：https://github.com/zachgolden/geoai。

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习技术对地球科学领域的高清图像进行清晰与模糊分类，实现自动化数据清洗。
AI.motivation: 无人机拍摄的高清图像在地球科学中应用广泛，但手动区分清晰与模糊图像耗时耗力，需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机（SVM）和神经网络（NN）算法，基于多种数学模型提取的特征进行图像分类对比。
AI.result: 通过不同特征抽象方法的分类结果对比，验证了机器学习在自动化识别清晰图像中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器学习方法为地球科学图像数据清洗提供了可行方案，部分代码已开源供研究使用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文利用机器学习技术对地球科学领域的高清图像进行清晰与模糊分类，实现自动化数据清洗。
ai_content.motivation: 无人机拍摄的高清图像在地球科学中应用广泛，但手动区分清晰与模糊图像耗时耗力，需自动化解决方案。
ai_content.method: 采用支持向量机（SVM）和神经网络（NN）算法，基于多种数学模型提取的特征进行图像分类对比。
ai_content.result: 通过不同特征抽象方法的分类结果对比，验证了机器学习在自动化识别清晰图像中的有效性。

search_text: High Definition image classification in Geoscience using Machine Learning 使用机器学习进行地球科学中的高清图像分类 High Definition (HD) digital photos taken with drones are widely used in the study of Geoscience. However, blurry images are often taken in collected data, and it takes a lot of time and effort to distinguish clear images from blurry ones. In this work, we apply Machine learning techniques, such as Support Vector Machine (SVM) and Neural Network (NN) to classify HD images in Geoscience as clear and blurry, and therefore automate data cleaning in Geoscience. We compare the results of classification based on features abstracted from several mathematical models. Some of the implementation of our machine learning tool is freely available at: https://github.com/zachgolden/geoai. 无人机拍摄的高清（HD）数码照片广泛应用于地球科学研究。然而，在收集的数据中经常出现模糊的图像，并且需要花费大量的时间和精力来区分清晰的图像和模糊的图像。在这项工作中，我们应用支持向量机（SVM）和神经网络（NN）等机器学习技术将地球科学中的高清图像分类为清晰和模糊，从而实现地球科学中数据清洗的自动化。我们比较基于从几个数学模型提取的特征的分类结果。我们的机器学习工具的一些实现可以免费获得：https://github.com/zachgolden/geoai。 本文利用机器学习技术对地球科学领域的高清图像进行清晰与模糊分类，实现自动化数据清洗。 Yajun An,Zachary Golden,Tarka Wilcox,Renzhi Cao eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: M. Shabanian,A. Siddiqui,H. Chen,J. P. DeVincenzo
title: Neurodevelopmental Age Estimation of Infants Using a 3D-Convolutional Neural Network Model based on Fusion MRI Sequences
title_zh: 使用基于融合 MRI 序列的 3D 卷积神经网络模型估计婴儿的神经发育年龄
comment: 18 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables. Supplementary information: 7 figures, 3 tables
comments: 18 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables. Supplementary information: 7 figures, 3 tables
abstract: The ability to determine if the brain is developing normally is a key component of pediatric neuroradiology and neurology. Brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of infants demonstrates a specific pattern of development beyond simply myelination. While radiologists have used myelination patterns, brain morphology and size characteristics in determining if brain maturity matches the chronological age of the patient, this requires years of experience with pediatric neuroradiology. Due to the lack of standardized criteria, estimation of brain maturity before age three remains fraught with interobserver and intraobserver variability. An objective measure of brain developmental age estimation (BDAE) could be a useful tool in helping physicians identify developmental delay as well as other neurological diseases. We investigated a three-dimensional convolutional neural network (3D CNN) to rapidly classify brain developmental age using common MRI sequences. MRI datasets from normal newborns were obtained from the National Institute of Mental Health Data Archive from birth to 3 years. We developed a BDAE method using T1-weighted, as well as a fusion of T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and proton density (PD) sequences from 112 individual subjects using 3D CNN. We achieved a precision of 94.8% and a recall of 93.5% in utilizing multiple MRI sequences in determining BDAE.
summary: The ability to determine if the brain is developing normally is a key component of pediatric neuroradiology and neurology. Brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of infants demonstrates a specific pattern of development beyond simply myelination. While radiologists have used myelination patterns, brain morphology and size characteristics in determining if brain maturity matches the chronological age of the patient, this requires years of experience with pediatric neuroradiology. Due to the lack of standardized criteria, estimation of brain maturity before age three remains fraught with interobserver and intraobserver variability. An objective measure of brain developmental age estimation (BDAE) could be a useful tool in helping physicians identify developmental delay as well as other neurological diseases. We investigated a three-dimensional convolutional neural network (3D CNN) to rapidly classify brain developmental age using common MRI sequences. MRI datasets from normal newborns were obtained from the National Institute of Mental Health Data Archive from birth to 3 years. We developed a BDAE method using T1-weighted, as well as a fusion of T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and proton density (PD) sequences from 112 individual subjects using 3D CNN. We achieved a precision of 94.8% and a recall of 93.5% in utilizing multiple MRI sequences in determining BDAE.
abstract_zh: 确定大脑是否正常发育的能力是儿科神经放射学和神经病学的关键组成部分。婴儿的脑部磁共振成像（MRI）显示出除了简单的髓鞘形成之外的特定发育模式。虽然放射科医生使用髓鞘形成模式、大脑形态和大小特征来确定大脑成熟度是否与患者的实际年龄相匹配，但这需要多年的儿科神经放射学经验。由于缺乏标准化标准，对三岁之前大脑成熟度的估计仍然充满观察者间和观察者内的变异性。大脑发育年龄估计（BDAE）的客观测量可能是帮助医生识别发育迟缓以及其他神经系统疾病的有用工具。我们研究了三维卷积神经网络 (3D CNN)，以使用常见的 MRI 序列快速对大脑发育年龄进行分类。正常新生儿的 MRI 数据集来自国家心理健康研究所从出生到 3 岁的数据档案。我们使用 3D CNN 开发了一种 BDAE 方法，该方法使用 T1 加权以及来自 112 个个体受试者的 T1 加权、T2 加权和质子密度 (PD) 序列的融合。在利用多个 MRI 序列确定 BDAE 时，我们实现了 94.8% 的精确度和 93.5% 的召回率。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于融合MRI序列的3D卷积神经网络模型，用于快速估计婴儿的神经发育年龄。
AI.motivation: 目前通过放射科医生经验判断婴儿脑发育年龄存在较大主观差异，缺乏标准化客观指标，需开发自动化工具辅助诊断发育迟缓等神经疾病。
AI.method: 使用国家心理健康研究所的112例正常新生儿MRI数据，融合T1加权、T2加权和质子密度序列，构建3D卷积神经网络模型进行脑发育年龄估计。
AI.result: 多序列MRI输入下模型达到94.8%的精确率和93.5%的召回率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该3D CNN方法可为临床提供客观量化脑发育评估工具，有助于早期发现神经发育异常。

authors_text: Seung Gyu Hyun,Christopher Leung
title: Test-Cost Sensitive Methods for Identifying Nearby Points
title_zh: 用于识别附近点的测试成本敏感方法
abstract: Real-world applications that involve missing values are often constrained by the cost to obtain data. Test-cost sensitive, or costly feature, methods additionally consider the cost of acquiring features. Such methods have been extensively studied in the problem of classification. In this paper, we study a related problem of test-cost sensitive methods to identify nearby points from a large set, given a new point with some unknown feature values. We present two models, one based on a tree and another based on Deep Reinforcement Learning. In our simulations, we show that the models outperform random agents on a set of five real-world data sets.
summary: Real-world applications that involve missing values are often constrained by the cost to obtain data. Test-cost sensitive, or costly feature, methods additionally consider the cost of acquiring features. Such methods have been extensively studied in the problem of classification. In this paper, we study a related problem of test-cost sensitive methods to identify nearby points from a large set, given a new point with some unknown feature values. We present two models, one based on a tree and another based on Deep Reinforcement Learning. In our simulations, we show that the models outperform random agents on a set of five real-world data sets.
abstract_zh: 涉及缺失值的实际应用程序通常受到获取数据成本的限制。测试成本敏感或昂贵的特征方法还考虑获取特征的成本。此类方法在分类问题中已得到广泛研究。在本文中，我们研究了测试成本敏感方法的相关问题，以在给定具有一些未知特征值的新点的情况下从大集合中识别附近的点。我们提出了两种模型，一种基于树，另一种基于深度强化学习。在我们的模拟中，我们表明模型在五个真实世界数据集上的表现优于随机代理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在未知特征值的情况下，如何通过测试成本敏感方法从大型数据集中高效识别邻近点。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中数据获取成本限制了缺失值的处理，而现有测试成本敏感方法多聚焦于分类问题，邻近点识别的研究较少。
AI.method: 提出两种模型：基于树的结构和深度强化学习方法，以应对特征获取成本约束下的邻近点识别问题。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集的模拟实验中，两种模型均显著优于随机策略。
AI.conclusion: 测试成本敏感方法在邻近点识别任务中有效，未来可探索更复杂的模型优化方向。

authors_text: Kexin Huang,Tianfan Fu,Dawood Khan,Ali Abid,Ali Abdalla,Abubakar Abid,Lucas M. Glass,Marinka Zitnik,Cao Xiao,Jimeng Sun
title: MolDesigner: Interactive Design of Efficacious Drugs with Deep Learning
title_zh: MolDesigner：利用深度学习交互设计有效药物
abstract: The efficacy of a drug depends on its binding affinity to the therapeutic target and pharmacokinetics. Deep learning (DL) has demonstrated remarkable progress in predicting drug efficacy. We develop MolDesigner, a human-in-the-loop web user-interface (UI), to assist drug developers leverage DL predictions to design more effective drugs. A developer can draw a drug molecule in the interface. In the backend, more than 17 state-of-the-art DL models generate predictions on important indices that are crucial for a drug's efficacy. Based on these predictions, drug developers can edit the drug molecule and reiterate until satisfaction. MolDesigner can make predictions in real-time with a latency of less than a second.
summary: The efficacy of a drug depends on its binding affinity to the therapeutic target and pharmacokinetics. Deep learning (DL) has demonstrated remarkable progress in predicting drug efficacy. We develop MolDesigner, a human-in-the-loop web user-interface (UI), to assist drug developers leverage DL predictions to design more effective drugs. A developer can draw a drug molecule in the interface. In the backend, more than 17 state-of-the-art DL models generate predictions on important indices that are crucial for a drug's efficacy. Based on these predictions, drug developers can edit the drug molecule and reiterate until satisfaction. MolDesigner can make predictions in real-time with a latency of less than a second.
abstract_zh: 药物的功效取决于其与治疗靶点的结合亲和力和药代动力学。深度学习（DL）在预测药物疗效方面取得了显着进展。我们开发了 MolDesigner，一种人机交互网络用户界面 (UI)，以帮助药物开发人员利用 DL 预测来设计更有效的药物。开发人员可以在界面中绘制药物分子。在后端，超过 17 个最先进的深度学习模型生成对药物功效至关重要的重要指标的预测。根据这些预测，药物开发人员可以编辑药物分子并重复直到满意为止。 MolDesigner 可以实时做出预测，延迟小于一秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MolDesigner，一个结合深度学习预测的交互式药物设计工具，帮助开发者实时优化药物分子结构。
AI.motivation: 药物疗效取决于结合亲和力和药代动力学特性，传统方法难以高效利用深度学习预测结果进行分子设计。
AI.method: 开发基于Web的交互界面，集成17个前沿深度学习模型，实时预测药物关键指标并提供可视化反馈供开发者迭代优化分子结构。
AI.result: 实现亚秒级实时预测，支持药物开发者通过人机协作循环改进分子设计，提升药物效能预测效率。
AI.conclusion: MolDesigner通过深度学习与人类专家的协同设计，为高效药物开发提供了可交互的智能辅助平台。

search_text: MolDesigner: Interactive Design of Efficacious Drugs with Deep Learning MolDesigner：利用深度学习交互设计有效药物 The efficacy of a drug depends on its binding affinity to the therapeutic target and pharmacokinetics. Deep learning (DL) has demonstrated remarkable progress in predicting drug efficacy. We develop MolDesigner, a human-in-the-loop web user-interface (UI), to assist drug developers leverage DL predictions to design more effective drugs. A developer can draw a drug molecule in the interface. In the backend, more than 17 state-of-the-art DL models generate predictions on important indices that are crucial for a drug's efficacy. Based on these predictions, drug developers can edit the drug molecule and reiterate until satisfaction. MolDesigner can make predictions in real-time with a latency of less than a second. 药物的功效取决于其与治疗靶点的结合亲和力和药代动力学。深度学习（DL）在预测药物疗效方面取得了显着进展。我们开发了 MolDesigner，一种人机交互网络用户界面 (UI)，以帮助药物开发人员利用 DL 预测来设计更有效的药物。开发人员可以在界面中绘制药物分子。在后端，超过 17 个最先进的深度学习模型生成对药物功效至关重要的重要指标的预测。根据这些预测，药物开发人员可以编辑药物分子并重复直到满意为止。 MolDesigner 可以实时做出预测，延迟小于一秒。 本文提出MolDesigner，一个结合深度学习预测的交互式药物设计工具，帮助开发者实时优化药物分子结构。 Kexin Huang,Tianfan Fu,Dawood Khan,Ali Abid,Ali Abdalla,Abubakar Abid,Lucas M. authors_text: Rodrigo Toro Icarte,Toryn Q. Klassen,Richard Valenzano,Sheila A. McIlraith
title: Reward Machines: Exploiting Reward Function Structure in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 奖励机器：在强化学习中利用奖励函数结构
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) methods usually treat reward functions as black boxes. As such, these methods must extensively interact with the environment in order to discover rewards and optimal policies. In most RL applications, however, users have to program the reward function and, hence, there is the opportunity to make the reward function visible -- to show the reward function's code to the RL agent so it can exploit the function's internal structure to learn optimal policies in a more sample efficient manner. In this paper, we show how to accomplish this idea in two steps. First, we propose reward machines, a type of finite state machine that supports the specification of reward functions while exposing reward function structure. We then describe different methodologies to exploit this structure to support learning, including automated reward shaping, task decomposition, and counterfactual reasoning with off-policy learning. Experiments on tabular and continuous domains, across different tasks and RL agents, show the benefits of exploiting reward structure with respect to sample efficiency and the quality of resultant policies. Finally, by virtue of being a form of finite state machine, reward machines have the expressive power of a regular language and as such support loops, sequences and conditionals, as well as the expression of temporally extended properties typical of linear temporal logic and non-Markovian reward specification.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) methods usually treat reward functions as black boxes. As such, these methods must extensively interact with the environment in order to discover rewards and optimal policies. In most RL applications, however, users have to program the reward function and, hence, there is the opportunity to make the reward function visible -- to show the reward function's code to the RL agent so it can exploit the function's internal structure to learn optimal policies in a more sample efficient manner. In this paper, we show how to accomplish this idea in two steps. First, we propose reward machines, a type of finite state machine that supports the specification of reward functions while exposing reward function structure. We then describe different methodologies to exploit this structure to support learning, including automated reward shaping, task decomposition, and counterfactual reasoning with off-policy learning. Experiments on tabular and continuous domains, across different tasks and RL agents, show the benefits of exploiting reward structure with respect to sample efficiency and the quality of resultant policies. Finally, by virtue of being a form of finite state machine, reward machines have the expressive power of a regular language and as such support loops, sequences and conditionals, as well as the expression of temporally extended properties typical of linear temporal logic and non-Markovian reward specification.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）方法通常将奖励函数视为黑匣子。因此，这些方法必须与环境广泛交互，才能发现奖励和最优策略。然而，在大多数强化学习应用中，用户必须对奖励函数进行编程，因此有机会使奖励函数可见——向强化学习代理显示奖励函数的代码，以便它可以利用该函数的内部结构以更有效的样本方式学习最优策略。在本文中，我们展示了如何分两步实现这个想法。首先，我们提出奖励机，一种有限状态机，支持奖励函数的规范，同时公开奖励函数结构。然后，我们描述了利用这种结构来支持学习的不同方法，包括自动奖励塑造、任务分解以及通过离策略学习进行反事实推理。在不同任务和 RL 代理的表格和连续域上进行的实验显示了利用奖励结构在样本效率和最终策略质量方面的好处。最后，由于是有限状态机的一种形式，奖励机具有常规语言的表达能力，因此支持循环、序列和条件，以及线性时间逻辑和非马尔可夫奖励规范典型的时间扩展属性的表达。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为奖励机器的有限状态机，用于在强化学习中利用奖励函数的结构，以提高样本效率和策略质量。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习将奖励函数视为黑箱，需大量环境交互才能学习最优策略。然而用户通常需要编程定义奖励函数，因此应利用其结构信息以提升学习效率。
AI.method: 设计奖励机器作为有限状态机以暴露奖励函数结构，并结合自动奖励塑形、任务分解及基于离线策略的反事实推理等方法进行学习。
AI.result: 在表格型和连续型领域多任务实验中，利用奖励结构的方法显著提升了样本效率和策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 奖励机器通过有限状态机形式支持复杂时序属性表达，有效利用奖励函数结构优化强化学习过程。

authors_text: Minqi Jiang,Edward Grefenstette,Tim Rocktäschel
title: Prioritized Level Replay
title_zh: 优先关卡重播
abstract: Environments with procedurally generated content serve as important benchmarks for testing systematic generalization in deep reinforcement learning. In this setting, each level is an algorithmically created environment instance with a unique configuration of its factors of variation. Training on a prespecified subset of levels allows for testing generalization to unseen levels. What can be learned from a level depends on the current policy, yet prior work defaults to uniform sampling of training levels independently of the policy. We introduce Prioritized Level Replay (PLR), a general framework for selectively sampling the next training level by prioritizing those with higher estimated learning potential when revisited in the future. We show TD-errors effectively estimate a level's future learning potential and, when used to guide the sampling procedure, induce an emergent curriculum of increasingly difficult levels. By adapting the sampling of training levels, PLR significantly improves sample efficiency and generalization on Procgen Benchmark--matching the previous state-of-the-art in test return--and readily combines with other methods. Combined with the previous leading method, PLR raises the state-of-the-art to over 76% improvement in test return relative to standard RL baselines.
summary: Environments with procedurally generated content serve as important benchmarks for testing systematic generalization in deep reinforcement learning. In this setting, each level is an algorithmically created environment instance with a unique configuration of its factors of variation. Training on a prespecified subset of levels allows for testing generalization to unseen levels. What can be learned from a level depends on the current policy, yet prior work defaults to uniform sampling of training levels independently of the policy. We introduce Prioritized Level Replay (PLR), a general framework for selectively sampling the next training level by prioritizing those with higher estimated learning potential when revisited in the future. We show TD-errors effectively estimate a level's future learning potential and, when used to guide the sampling procedure, induce an emergent curriculum of increasingly difficult levels. By adapting the sampling of training levels, PLR significantly improves sample efficiency and generalization on Procgen Benchmark--matching the previous state-of-the-art in test return--and readily combines with other methods. Combined with the previous leading method, PLR raises the state-of-the-art to over 76% improvement in test return relative to standard RL baselines.
abstract_zh: 具有程序生成内容的环境是测试深度强化学习中系统泛化的重要基准。在此设置中，每个级别都是一个通过算法创建的环境实例，其变化因素具有独特的配置。对预先指定的级别子集进行训练可以测试对未见过的级别的泛化。从某个级别可以学到什么取决于当前的策略，但之前的工作默认独立于策略对训练级别进行统一采样。我们引入了优先级重放（PLR），这是一种通用框架，用于通过在未来重新访问时优先考虑具有较高估计学习潜力的那些来选择性地采样下一个训练级别。我们证明 TD 误差可以有效地估计某个级别的未来学习潜力，并且当用于指导抽样程序时，会引发难度越来越大的级别的新兴课程。通过调整训练水平的采样，PLR 显着提高了 Procgen Benchmark 上的样本效率和泛化能力，与之前测试返回的最先进水平相匹配，并且很容易与其他方法结合。与之前的领先方法相结合，PLR 将最先进的测试回报率相对于标准 RL 基线提高了 76% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Prioritized Level Replay（PLR）的框架，通过优先采样具有更高未来学习潜力的训练关卡，提升深度强化学习在程序生成环境中的样本效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在程序生成环境中采用均匀采样关卡，忽略当前策略对学习效果的影响，导致样本效率低下且泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 利用TD误差估计关卡的未来学习潜力，指导采样策略形成渐进式难度课程，动态调整训练关卡的采样分布。
AI.result: PLR在Procgen基准测试中显著提升样本效率，与先前最佳方法结合后测试回报较标准RL基线提高76%。
AI.conclusion: PLR通过优先采样机制有效提升强化学习效率，其框架具有良好的扩展性，可与其他方法结合进一步优化性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Prioritized Level Replay（PLR）的框架，通过优先采样具有更高未来学习潜力的训练关卡，提升深度强化学习在程序生成环境中的样本效率和泛化能力。

motivation: 传统方法在程序生成环境中采用均匀采样关卡，忽略当前策略对学习效果的影响，导致样本效率低下且泛化能力不足。
method: 利用TD误差估计关卡的未来学习潜力，指导采样策略形成渐进式难度课程，动态调整训练关卡的采样分布。
result: PLR在Procgen基准测试中显著提升样本效率，与先前最佳方法结合后测试回报较标准RL基线提高76%。
conclusion: PLR通过优先采样机制有效提升强化学习效率，其框架具有良好的扩展性，可与其他方法结合进一步优化性能。
search_text: Prioritized Level Replay 优先关卡重播 Environments with procedurally generated content serve as important benchmarks for testing systematic generalization in deep reinforcement learning. In this setting, each level is an algorithmically created environment instance with a unique configuration of its factors of variation. Training on a prespecified subset of levels allows for testing generalization to unseen levels. What can be learned from a level depends on the current policy, yet prior work defaults to uniform sampling of training levels independently of the policy. We introduce Prioritized Level Replay (PLR), a general framework for selectively sampling the next training level by prioritizing those with higher estimated learning potential when revisited in the future. We show TD-errors effectively estimate a level's future learning potential and, when used to guide the sampling procedure, induce an emergent curriculum of increasingly difficult levels. By adapting the sampling of training levels, PLR significantly improves sample efficiency and generalization on Procgen Benchmark--matching the previous state-of-the-art in test return--and readily combines with other methods. Combined with the previous leading method, PLR raises the state-of-the-art to over 76% improvement in test return relative to standard RL baselines. 具有程序生成内容的环境是测试深度强化学习中系统泛化的重要基准。在此设置中，每个级别都是一个通过算法创建的环境实例，其变化因素具有独特的配置。对预先指定的级别子集进行训练可以测试对未见过的级别的泛化。从某个级别可以学到什么取决于当前的策略，但之前的工作默认独立于策略对训练级别进行统一采样。我们引入了优先级重放（PLR），这是一种通用框架，用于通过在未来重新访问时优先考虑具有较高估计学习潜力的那些来选择性地采样下一个训练级别。我们证明 TD 误差可以有效地估计某个级别的未来学习潜力，并且当用于指导抽样程序时，会引发难度越来越大的级别的新兴课程。通过调整训练水平的采样，PLR 显着提高了 Procgen Benchmark 上的样本效率和泛化能力，与之前测试返回的最先进水平相匹配，并且很容易与其他方法结合。与之前的领先方法相结合，PLR 将最先进的测试回报率相对于标准 RL 基线提高了 76% 以上。 本文提出了一种名为Prioritized Level Replay（PLR）的框架，通过优先采样具有更高未来学习潜力的训练关卡，提升深度强化学习在程序生成环境中的样本效率和泛化能力。 Minqi Jiang,Edward Grefenstette,Tim Rocktäschel cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhenlong Xu,Ziqi Xu,Jixue Liu,Debo Cheng,Jiuyong Li,Lin Liu,Ke Wang,Ziqi Xu,Zhenlong Xu contributed equally to this paper
title: Assessing Classifier Fairness with Collider Bias
title_zh: 使用碰撞器偏差评估分类器公平性
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures and 9 tables. The work has been accepted by PAKDD2022
comments: 16 pages, 7 figures and 9 tables. The work has been accepted by PAKDD2022
abstract: The increasing application of machine learning techniques in everyday decision-making processes has brought concerns about the fairness of algorithmic decision-making. This paper concerns the problem of collider bias which produces spurious associations in fairness assessment and develops theorems to guide fairness assessment avoiding the collider bias. We consider a real-world application of auditing a trained classifier by an audit agency. We propose an unbiased assessment algorithm by utilising the developed theorems to reduce collider biases in the assessment. Experiments and simulations show the proposed algorithm reduces collider biases significantly in the assessment and is promising in auditing trained classifiers.
summary: The increasing application of machine learning techniques in everyday decision-making processes has brought concerns about the fairness of algorithmic decision-making. This paper concerns the problem of collider bias which produces spurious associations in fairness assessment and develops theorems to guide fairness assessment avoiding the collider bias. We consider a real-world application of auditing a trained classifier by an audit agency. We propose an unbiased assessment algorithm by utilising the developed theorems to reduce collider biases in the assessment. Experiments and simulations show the proposed algorithm reduces collider biases significantly in the assessment and is promising in auditing trained classifiers.
abstract_zh: 机器学习技术在日常决策过程中的日益应用引起了人们对算法决策公平性的担忧。本文关注对撞机偏差问题，该问题会在公平性评估中产生虚假关联，并提出定理来指导公平性评估，避免对撞机偏差。我们考虑由审计机构审计经过训练的分类器的实际应用。我们提出了一种无偏见的评估算法，利用已开发的定理来减少评估中的碰撞偏差。实验和模拟表明，所提出的算法在评估中显着减少了碰撞偏差，并且在审核训练有素的分类器方面很有前景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在评估分类器公平性时存在的混淆偏差问题，提出定理指导评估方法并设计无偏算法以减少该偏差。
AI.motivation: 机器学习在决策中的广泛应用引发对算法公平性的关注，但混淆偏差会导致公平性评估出现虚假关联，影响结论准确性。
AI.method: 通过建立理论定理分析混淆偏差的产生机制，提出基于定理的无偏评估算法以消除偏差影响。
AI.result: 实验和模拟验证表明，该算法能显著降低评估中的混淆偏差，有效提升分类器审计的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为解决公平性评估中的混淆偏差问题提供了理论支持和实践方法，具有重要审计价值。

authors_text: Martin Vastl,Daniel Zeman,Rudolf Rosa
title: Predicting Typological Features in WALS using Language Embeddings and Conditional Probabilities: ÚFAL Submission to the SIGTYP 2020 Shared Task
title_zh: 使用语言嵌入和条件概率预测 WALS 中的类型特征：ÚFAL 提交给 SIGTYP 2020 共享任务
comment: ef:Proc. SIGTYP Workshop on Computational Research in Linguistic Typology (2020) 29-35
comments: ef:Proc. SIGTYP Workshop on Computational Research in Linguistic Typology (2020) 29-35
abstract: We present our submission to the SIGTYP 2020 Shared Task on the prediction of typological features. We submit a constrained system, predicting typological features only based on the WALS database. We investigate two approaches. The simpler of the two is a system based on estimating correlation of feature values within languages by computing conditional probabilities and mutual information. The second approach is to train a neural predictor operating on precomputed language embeddings based on WALS features. Our submitted system combines the two approaches based on their self-estimated confidence scores. We reach the accuracy of 70.7% on the test data and rank first in the shared task.
summary: We present our submission to the SIGTYP 2020 Shared Task on the prediction of typological features. We submit a constrained system, predicting typological features only based on the WALS database. We investigate two approaches. The simpler of the two is a system based on estimating correlation of feature values within languages by computing conditional probabilities and mutual information. The second approach is to train a neural predictor operating on precomputed language embeddings based on WALS features. Our submitted system combines the two approaches based on their self-estimated confidence scores. We reach the accuracy of 70.7% on the test data and rank first in the shared task.
abstract_zh: 我们向 SIGTYP 2020 共享任务提交了有关类型特征预测的意见书。我们提交了一个约束系统，仅根据 WALS 数据库预测类型特征。我们研究了两种方法。两者中更简单的是基于通过计算条件概率和互信息来估计语言内特征值相关性的系统。第二种方法是训练基于 WALS 特征的预计算语言嵌入运行的神经预测器。我们提交的系统根据自我估计的置信度分数结合了这两种方法。我们在测试数据上达到了 70.7% 的准确率，在共享任务中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于WALS数据库预测语言类型学特征的方法，结合条件概率和语言嵌入模型，参加SIGTYP 2020共享任务。
AI.motivation: 通过结合统计方法和神经网络模型，提高对语言类型学特征预测的准确性，探索不同方法在语言学特征预测中的有效性。
AI.method: 采用两种方法：基于条件概率和互信息的统计模型，以及基于WALS特征预训练语言嵌入的神经预测器，并通过置信度评分融合两种方法结果。
AI.result: 在测试数据上达到70.7%的准确率，共享任务中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 融合统计模型与神经网络的方法能有效提升预测性能，为语言类型学特征预测提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Eneko Osaba,Javier Del Ser,Aritz D. Martinez,Jesus L. Lobo,Francisco Herrera
title: AT-MFCGA: An Adaptive Transfer-guided Multifactorial Cellular Genetic Algorithm for Evolutionary Multitasking
title_zh: AT-MFCGA：一种用于进化多任务处理的自适应转移引导的多因素细胞遗传算法
comment: 31 pages, 4 figures, paper accepted for being published in Information Sciences journal
comments: 31 pages, 4 figures, paper accepted for being published in Information Sciences journal
abstract: Transfer Optimization is an incipient research area dedicated to solving multiple optimization tasks simultaneously. Among the different approaches that can address this problem effectively, Evolutionary Multitasking resorts to concepts from Evolutionary Computation to solve multiple problems within a single search process. In this paper we introduce a novel adaptive metaheuristic algorithm to deal with Evolutionary Multitasking environments coined as Adaptive Transfer-guided Multifactorial Cellular Genetic Algorithm (AT-MFCGA). AT-MFCGA relies on cellular automata to implement mechanisms in order to exchange knowledge among the optimization problems under consideration. Furthermore, our approach is able to explain by itself the synergies among tasks that were encountered and exploited during the search, which helps us to understand interactions between related optimization tasks. A comprehensive experimental setup is designed to assess and compare the performance of AT-MFCGA to that of other renowned evolutionary multitasking alternatives (MFEA and MFEA-II). Experiments comprise 11 multitasking scenarios composed of 20 instances of 4 combinatorial optimization problems, yielding the largest discrete multitasking environment solved to date. Results are conclusive in regard to the superior quality of solutions provided by AT-MFCGA with respect to the rest of the methods, which are complemented by a quantitative examination of the genetic transferability among tasks throughout the search process.
summary: Transfer Optimization is an incipient research area dedicated to solving multiple optimization tasks simultaneously. Among the different approaches that can address this problem effectively, Evolutionary Multitasking resorts to concepts from Evolutionary Computation to solve multiple problems within a single search process. In this paper we introduce a novel adaptive metaheuristic algorithm to deal with Evolutionary Multitasking environments coined as Adaptive Transfer-guided Multifactorial Cellular Genetic Algorithm (AT-MFCGA). AT-MFCGA relies on cellular automata to implement mechanisms in order to exchange knowledge among the optimization problems under consideration. Furthermore, our approach is able to explain by itself the synergies among tasks that were encountered and exploited during the search, which helps us to understand interactions between related optimization tasks. A comprehensive experimental setup is designed to assess and compare the performance of AT-MFCGA to that of other renowned evolutionary multitasking alternatives (MFEA and MFEA-II). Experiments comprise 11 multitasking scenarios composed of 20 instances of 4 combinatorial optimization problems, yielding the largest discrete multitasking environment solved to date. Results are conclusive in regard to the superior quality of solutions provided by AT-MFCGA with respect to the rest of the methods, which are complemented by a quantitative examination of the genetic transferability among tasks throughout the search process.
abstract_zh: 传输优化是一个新兴的研究领域，致力于同时解决多个优化任务。在可以有效解决这个问题的不同方法中，进化多任务处理利用进化计算的概念来解决单个搜索过程中的多个问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的自适应元启发式算法来处理进化多任务环境，称为自适应转移引导的多因素细胞遗传算法（AT-MFCGA）。 AT-MFCGA 依靠元胞自动机来实现机制，以便在所考虑的优化问题之间交换知识。此外，我们的方法本身能够解释搜索过程中遇到和利用的任务之间的协同作用，这有助于我们理解相关优化任务之间的相互作用。综合实验装置旨在评估和比较 AT-MFCGA 与其他著名的进化多任务替代方案（MFEA 和 MFEA-II）的性能。实验包括 11 个多任务场景，由 4 个组合优化问题的 20 个实例组成，产生迄今为止解决的最大离散多任务环境。结果表明 AT-MFCGA 提供的解决方案相对于其他方法具有更高的质量，并通过对整个搜索过程中任务之间的遗传可转移性的定量检查进行补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AT-MFCGA的自适应知识迁移多因子细胞遗传算法，用于解决进化多任务优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有进化多任务算法在处理多优化任务时存在知识迁移效率低、任务协同机制不明确等问题，需开发更高效的算法以提升多任务求解性能。
AI.method: 基于细胞自动机设计知识共享机制，结合自适应迁移策略与多因子遗传算法框架，实现任务间遗传信息的动态交互与协同优化。
AI.result: 在包含4类组合优化问题的11个多任务场景（共20个实例）中，AT-MFCGA的解质量显著优于MFEA和MFEA-II等基准算法，并通过量化分析验证了任务间遗传迁移的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: AT-MFCGA通过细胞结构与自适应迁移机制有效提升了多任务优化性能，为理解任务间协同关系提供了新的分析视角。

search_text: AT-MFCGA: An Adaptive Transfer-guided Multifactorial Cellular Genetic Algorithm for Evolutionary Multitasking AT-MFCGA：一种用于进化多任务处理的自适应转移引导的多因素细胞遗传算法 Transfer Optimization is an incipient research area dedicated to solving multiple optimization tasks simultaneously. Among the different approaches that can address this problem effectively, Evolutionary Multitasking resorts to concepts from Evolutionary Computation to solve multiple problems within a single search process. In this paper we introduce a novel adaptive metaheuristic algorithm to deal with Evolutionary Multitasking environments coined as Adaptive Transfer-guided Multifactorial Cellular Genetic Algorithm (AT-MFCGA). AT-MFCGA relies on cellular automata to implement mechanisms in order to exchange knowledge among the optimization problems under consideration. Furthermore, our approach is able to explain by itself the synergies among tasks that were encountered and exploited during the search, which helps us to understand interactions between related optimization tasks. A comprehensive experimental setup is designed to assess and compare the performance of AT-MFCGA to that of other renowned evolutionary multitasking alternatives (MFEA and MFEA-II). Experiments comprise 11 multitasking scenarios composed of 20 instances of 4 combinatorial optimization problems, yielding the largest discrete multitasking environment solved to date. Results are conclusive in regard to the superior quality of solutions provided by AT-MFCGA with respect to the rest of the methods, which are complemented by a quantitative examination of the genetic transferability among tasks throughout the search process. 传输优化是一个新兴的研究领域，致力于同时解决多个优化任务。在可以有效解决这个问题的不同方法中，进化多任务处理利用进化计算的概念来解决单个搜索过程中的多个问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的自适应元启发式算法来处理进化多任务环境，称为自适应转移引导的多因素细胞遗传算法（AT-MFCGA）。 AT-MFCGA 依靠元胞自动机来实现机制，以便在所考虑的优化问题之间交换知识。此外，我们的方法本身能够解释搜索过程中遇到和利用的任务之间的协同作用，这有助于我们理解相关优化任务之间的相互作用。综合实验装置旨在评估和比较 AT-MFCGA 与其他著名的进化多任务替代方案（MFEA 和 MFEA-II）的性能。实验包括 11 个多任务场景，由 4 个组合优化问题的 20 个实例组成，产生迄今为止解决的最大离散多任务环境。结果表明 AT-MFCGA 提供的解决方案相对于其他方法具有更高的质量，并通过对整个搜索过程中任务之间的遗传可转移性的定量检查进行补充。 本文提出了一种名为AT-MFCGA的自适应知识迁移多因子细胞遗传算法，用于解决进化多任务优化问题。 Eneko Osaba,Javier Del Ser,Aritz D. Martinez,Jesus L. Lobo,Francisco Herrera cs.NE

authors_text: Tiantian Liu,Huan Li,Hua Lu,Muhammad Aamir Cheema,Lidan Shou
title: An Experimental Analysis of Indoor Spatial Queries: Modeling, Indexing, and Processing
title_zh: 室内空间查询的实验分析：建模、索引和处理
abstract: Indoor location-based services (LBS), such as POI search and routing, are often built on top of typical indoor spatial queries. To support such queries and indoor LBS, multiple techniques including model/indexes and search algorithms have been proposed. In this work, we conduct an extensive experimental study on existing proposals for indoor spatial queries. We survey five model/indexes, compare their algorithmic characteristics, and analyze their space and time complexities. We also design an in-depth benchmark with real and synthetic datasets, evaluation tasks and performance metrics. Enabled by the benchmark, we obtain and report the performance results of all model/indexes under investigation. By analyzing the results, we summarize the pros and cons of all techniques and suggest the best choice for typical scenarios.
summary: Indoor location-based services (LBS), such as POI search and routing, are often built on top of typical indoor spatial queries. To support such queries and indoor LBS, multiple techniques including model/indexes and search algorithms have been proposed. In this work, we conduct an extensive experimental study on existing proposals for indoor spatial queries. We survey five model/indexes, compare their algorithmic characteristics, and analyze their space and time complexities. We also design an in-depth benchmark with real and synthetic datasets, evaluation tasks and performance metrics. Enabled by the benchmark, we obtain and report the performance results of all model/indexes under investigation. By analyzing the results, we summarize the pros and cons of all techniques and suggest the best choice for typical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 室内基于位置的服务 (LBS)，例如 POI 搜索和路由，通常构建在典型的室内空间查询之上。为了支持此类查询和室内 LBS，已经提出了包括模型/索引和搜索算法在内的多种技术。在这项工作中，我们对现有的室内空间查询提案进行了广泛的实验研究。我们调查了五个模型/指标，比较了它们的算法特征，并分析了它们的空间和时间复杂度。我们还利用真实和合成数据集、评估任务和性能指标设计了深入的基准。在基准测试的支持下，我们获得并报告了所调查的所有模型/指数的性能结果。通过分析结果，我们总结了所有技术的优缺点，并针对典型场景提出了最佳选择。

AI.tldr: 本文对现有室内空间查询的模型和索引方法进行了系统实验分析，评估其性能并提出典型场景下的最佳选择。
AI.motivation: 室内位置服务需要高效处理空间查询，但现有技术在效率和适用性上存在差异，需通过实验明确优劣以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 调查五种主流模型/索引，比较算法特性及时空复杂度；构建包含真实与合成数据集的基准测试，设计多维度评估任务与指标进行性能分析。
AI.result: 量化比较各方法性能差异，总结其适用场景，提出针对不同查询需求（如精度、速度）的最优技术方案。
AI.conclusion: 不同索引方法在特定场景下表现更优，实际应用需根据查询类型、数据规模及硬件条件综合选择技术方案。

authors_text: Biswajit Dev Sarma,Rohan Kumar Das
title: Emotion Invariant Speaker Embeddings for Speaker Identification with Emotional Speech
title_zh: 用于情感语音说话人识别的情感不变说话人嵌入
comment: Accepted for publication in APSIPA ASC 2020
comments: Accepted for publication in APSIPA ASC 2020
abstract: Emotional state of a speaker is found to have significant effect in speech production, which can deviate speech from that arising from neutral state. This makes identifying speakers with different emotions a challenging task as generally the speaker models are trained using neutral speech. In this work, we propose to overcome this problem by creation of emotion invariant speaker embedding. We learn an extractor network that maps the test embeddings with different emotions obtained using i-vector based system to an emotion invariant space. The resultant test embeddings thus become emotion invariant and thereby compensate the mismatch between various emotional states. The studies are conducted using four different emotion classes from IEMOCAP database. We obtain an absolute improvement of 2.6% in accuracy for speaker identification studies using emotion invariant speaker embedding against average speaker model based framework with different emotions.
summary: Emotional state of a speaker is found to have significant effect in speech production, which can deviate speech from that arising from neutral state. This makes identifying speakers with different emotions a challenging task as generally the speaker models are trained using neutral speech. In this work, we propose to overcome this problem by creation of emotion invariant speaker embedding. We learn an extractor network that maps the test embeddings with different emotions obtained using i-vector based system to an emotion invariant space. The resultant test embeddings thus become emotion invariant and thereby compensate the mismatch between various emotional states. The studies are conducted using four different emotion classes from IEMOCAP database. We obtain an absolute improvement of 2.6% in accuracy for speaker identification studies using emotion invariant speaker embedding against average speaker model based framework with different emotions.
abstract_zh: 人们发现说话者的情绪状态对言语产生有显着影响，这可能会使言语偏离中性状态下的言语。这使得识别具有不同情绪的说话者成为一项具有挑战性的任务，因为说话者模型通常使用中性语音进行训练。在这项工作中，我们建议通过创建情感不变的说话者嵌入来克服这个问题。我们学习一个提取器网络，它将使用基于 i 向量的系统获得的不同情感的测试嵌入映射到情感不变空间。由此产生的测试嵌入变得情绪不变，从而补偿各种情绪状态之间的不匹配。这些研究是使用 IEMOCAP 数据库中的四种不同情绪类别进行的。我们使用情感不变的说话人嵌入与基于不同情感的平均说话人模型的框架进行说话人识别研究的准确率绝对提高了 2.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种情绪不变的说话人嵌入方法，用于解决情感语音中说话人识别的挑战。
AI.motivation: 说话人情绪状态会显著影响语音特征，导致传统基于中性语音训练的模型在情感语音识别中表现不佳。
AI.method: 构建提取器网络，将i-vector系统生成的不同情绪测试嵌入映射到情绪不变空间，消除情绪差异带来的特征偏差。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据库四类情绪实验中，相较传统框架实现2.6%的准确率绝对提升。
AI.conclusion: 情绪不变嵌入有效缓解了情感语音识别中的分布偏移问题，为跨情绪说话人识别提供了新思路。

conclusion: 情绪不变嵌入有效缓解了情感语音识别中的分布偏移问题，为跨情绪说话人识别提供了新思路。
search_text: Emotion Invariant Speaker Embeddings for Speaker Identification with Emotional Speech 用于情感语音说话人识别的情感不变说话人嵌入 Emotional state of a speaker is found to have significant effect in speech production, which can deviate speech from that arising from neutral state. This makes identifying speakers with different emotions a challenging task as generally the speaker models are trained using neutral speech. In this work, we propose to overcome this problem by creation of emotion invariant speaker embedding. We learn an extractor network that maps the test embeddings with different emotions obtained using i-vector based system to an emotion invariant space. The resultant test embeddings thus become emotion invariant and thereby compensate the mismatch between various emotional states. The studies are conducted using four different emotion classes from IEMOCAP database. We obtain an absolute improvement of 2.6% in accuracy for speaker identification studies using emotion invariant speaker embedding against average speaker model based framework with different emotions. 人们发现说话者的情绪状态对言语产生有显着影响，这可能会使言语偏离中性状态下的言语。这使得识别具有不同情绪的说话者成为一项具有挑战性的任务，因为说话者模型通常使用中性语音进行训练。在这项工作中，我们建议通过创建情感不变的说话者嵌入来克服这个问题。我们学习一个提取器网络，它将使用基于 i 向量的系统获得的不同情感的测试嵌入映射到情感不变空间。由此产生的测试嵌入变得情绪不变，从而补偿各种情绪状态之间的不匹配。这些研究是使用 IEMOCAP 数据库中的四种不同情绪类别进行的。我们使用情感不变的说话人嵌入与基于不同情感的平均说话人模型的框架进行说话人识别研究的准确率绝对提高了 2.6%。 本文提出一种情绪不变的说话人嵌入方法，用于解决情感语音中说话人识别的挑战。 Biswajit Dev Sarma,Rohan Kumar Das eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Rohan Kumar Das,Haizhou Li
title: Classification of Speech with and without Face Mask using Acoustic Features
title_zh: 使用声学特征对戴口罩和不戴口罩的语音进行分类
comment: Accepted for publication in APSIPA ASC 2020
comments: Accepted for publication in APSIPA ASC 2020
abstract: The understanding and interpretation of speech can be affected by various external factors. The use of face masks is one such factors that can create obstruction to speech while communicating. This may lead to degradation of speech processing and affect humans perceptually. Knowing whether a speaker wears a mask may be useful for modeling speech for different applications. With this motivation, finding whether a speaker wears face mask from a given speech is included as a task in Computational Paralinguistics Evaluation (ComParE) 2020. We study novel acoustic features based on linear filterbanks, instantaneous phase and long-term information that can capture the artifacts for classification of speech with and without face mask. These acoustic features are used along with the state-of-the-art baselines of ComParE functionals, bag-of-audio-words, DeepSpectrum and auDeep features for ComParE 2020. The studies reveal the effectiveness of acoustic features, and their score level fusion with the ComParE 2020 baselines leads to an unweighted average recall of 73.50% on the test set.
summary: The understanding and interpretation of speech can be affected by various external factors. The use of face masks is one such factors that can create obstruction to speech while communicating. This may lead to degradation of speech processing and affect humans perceptually. Knowing whether a speaker wears a mask may be useful for modeling speech for different applications. With this motivation, finding whether a speaker wears face mask from a given speech is included as a task in Computational Paralinguistics Evaluation (ComParE) 2020. We study novel acoustic features based on linear filterbanks, instantaneous phase and long-term information that can capture the artifacts for classification of speech with and without face mask. These acoustic features are used along with the state-of-the-art baselines of ComParE functionals, bag-of-audio-words, DeepSpectrum and auDeep features for ComParE 2020. The studies reveal the effectiveness of acoustic features, and their score level fusion with the ComParE 2020 baselines leads to an unweighted average recall of 73.50% on the test set.
abstract_zh: 对言语的理解和解释会受到各种外部因素的影响。使用口罩就是可能在沟通时造成言语障碍的因素之一。这可能会导致语音处理能力下降并影响人类的感知。了解说话者是否佩戴口罩对于不同应用的语音建模可能很有用。出于这个动机，从给定的语音中找出说话者是否戴口罩被纳入计算副语言学评估 (ComParE) 2020 的一项任务中。我们研究基于线性滤波器组、瞬时相位和长期信息的新颖声学特征，这些特征可以捕获伪影，从而对戴口罩和不戴口罩的语音进行分类。这些声学特征与 ComParE 2020 的最先进的 ComParE 泛函、音频词袋、DeepSpectrum 和 auDeep 特征基线一起使用。这些研究揭示了声学特征的有效性，其分数水平与 ComParE 2020 基线的融合导致测试集上的未加权平均召回率为 73.50%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用声学特征分类带和不带口罩的语音信号。
AI.motivation: 口罩会阻碍语音传播，影响语音处理效果，识别说话者是否佩戴口罩对语音建模应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出基于线性滤波器组、瞬时相位和长期信息的新型声学特征，并与ComParE 2020基准方法（如DeepSpectrum、auDeep等）进行特征级融合。
AI.result: 在测试集上实现73.50%的无权平均召回率，验证了新声学特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新声学特征能有效捕捉口罩引起的语音失真，与现有方法融合可提升分类性能。
